| | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, **making it easier for voters to participate in our elections**. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. **Mail-in voting has been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.** There's no good faith reason to get rid of it. **[Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Talking authoritarianism and pumpkin spice lattes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, Congress is back from our August district work period. Kids are back in school. Pumpkin spice lattes are back in coffee shops (not my fave, to be honest, but I’m happy for the PSL lovers in my life).
All of that to say: summer is over (except for San Diego where local’s summer has just started). And if last year was labeled “brat summer,” I think this year’s theme was more like... authoritarian summer?
Let’s do a quick rundown of what’s happened recently:
* Trump illegally deployed the National Guard and active-duty Marines to Los Angeles to police civilians exercising their First Amendment rights.
* ICE severely ramped up its immigration enforcement tactics, with masked agents conducting unannounced raids and snatching people off the streets.
* The administration has targeted the scientific community, stripped universities of research funding, and cut CDC and NIH funding.
* Trump stated he wants to unilaterally ban mail-in voting — a method of voting used by more than 46 million people during the 2024 elections, and that made up 30% of all the votes cast!
* And of course, Trump has seized control of the D.C. police force and deployed thousands of National Guard troops around the city.
That’s just a sample — but we all get the picture: this is what authoritarianism looks like.
Meanwhile, a lot of people I work with (and I’m sure a lot of people in your life too) are still trying to justify Trump’s actions: there’s a perspective, they say, where these actions make some sense. And surely the courts will do their part and stop him if he gets really bad. (In reality: the courts are helping curb some of the worst stuff, but it’s not enough — and we really can’t rely on this Supreme Court to quell Trump’s ego and delusion.)
That instinct to rationalize is part of the problem. When we start cherry-picking snippets of our current events to find a sliver of logic or legality or common sense in Trump’s actions, we become the frogs in the pot of water that’s slowly heating to a boil.
Maybe you already agree with what I’m saying, and want me to get to the point of what to DO about all of it.
Well, talking about all of this is a big, big part of what we need to do.
We need to have real conversations with real people — even and especially with people who may not agree with us on much! — about the lines being crossed. I’m not asking you to try to convince your neighbor to suddenly become a Democratic activist or go toe-to-toe with your uncle over the Thanksgiving table.
I’m asking you to connect with them on a human level and see if there’s anywhere at all you do agree. Like maybe, just maybe, on the idea that the Constitution and our democracy are important things to keep intact? That hard-working and respectable members of our community shouldn’t be violently arrested at work and disappeared into federal detention centers? That throwing flash-bangs into the middle of a peaceful neighborhood on a Friday night is irrational, dangerous, and unacceptable?
Try that. I know a lot of people are sick of talking about politics, so start slow. Connect around how nice their garden is or your adorable dog. Use real human stories to make your point. Start with listening, with empathy (as hard as that is). See where you end up!
OK, so you’re on board with that, but it doesn’t quite feel like enough, right? What else can we do?
I’ll tell you one of my top priorities right now: winning some elections for Democrats and kicking the GOP out of the House majority!
Next year’s elections are closer than we might think — and the truth is, most elections are won or lost way before votes are tallied. Campaigns that have resources and support are able to reach tons of voters, spread their message, respond to attacks, and turn people out. Campaigns that don’t, aren’t. And we know that people are (rightfully!) sick of only hearing from candidates and campaigns during an election year — as if voters are non-existent and their needs are unimportant unless their vote is on the line.
So, as sick as we all are of being asked (I’m even sick of doing the asking), donating when you can is an incredibly meaningful way to impact the outcomes of elections.
If you can, consider contributing to support my work — my team and I are laser-focused on flipping the House next year. In addition to my own re-election, we’re supporting vulnerable incumbent Democrats who we need to hold onto, and challengers looking to flip key seats blue. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you can’t donate right now, that’s OK, too. I really appreciate you reading these updates, and I’ll keep you posted on more news from the House and the campaign trail.
Thanks so much,
Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

clean_body: [] Friends, Congress is back from our August district work period. Kids are back in school. Pumpkin spice lattes are back in coffee shops (not my fave, to be honest, but I’m happy for the PSL lovers in my life). All of that to say: summer is over (except for San Diego where local’s summer has just started). And if last year was labeled “brat summer,” I think this year’s theme was more like... authoritarian summer? Let’s do a quick rundown of what’s happened recently: Trump illegally deployed the National Guard and active-duty Marines to Los Angeles to police civilians exercising their First Amendment rights. ICE severely ramped up its immigration enforcement tactics, with masked agents conducting unannounced raids and snatching people off the streets. The administration has targeted the scientific community, stripped universities of research funding, and cut CDC and NIH funding. Trump stated he wants to unilaterally ban mail-in voting — a method of voting used by more than 46 million people during the 2024 elections, and that made up 30% of all the votes cast! * And of course, Trump has seized control of the D.C. police force and deployed thousands of National Guard troops around the city. That’s just a sample — but we all get the picture: this is what authoritarianism looks like. Meanwhile, a lot of people I work with (and I’m sure a lot of people in your life too) are still trying to justify Trump’s actions: there’s a perspective, they say, where these actions make some sense. And surely the courts will do their part and stop him if he gets really bad. (In reality: the courts are helping curb some of the worst stuff, but it’s not enough — and we really can’t rely on this Supreme Court to quell Trump’s ego and delusion.) That instinct to rationalize is part of the problem. When we start cherry-picking snippets of our current events to find a sliver of logic or legality or common sense in Trump’s actions, we become the frogs in the pot of water that’s slowly heating to a boil. Maybe you already agree with what I’m saying, and want me to get to the point of what to DO about all of it. Well, talking about all of this is a big, big part of what we need to do. body:
Durango 9-R Dirty Dozen: Exposing 12 ways schools are failing our kids
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8q60268e94)
---
**September 7, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
This week at Rocky Mountain Voice, we launched one of the most important projects we’ve ever taken on:**the Durango 9-R Dirty Dozen.**
Durango’s 9-R School District has become ground zero for everything wrong in Colorado’s education system—where ideology trumps academics, parental rights are ignored, and children’s safety is put at risk. Over the next 7 days, we’re exposing the Dirty Dozen ways this district is failing our kids.
**So far, we’ve already revealed:**
* Day 1: Federal civil rights complaints accusing 9-R of [discriminatory practices](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sct734770a9).
* Day 2: A band teacher indicted on [56 counts of child pornography and sexual assault](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sckc66eea58) after pushing a radical agenda—raising serious questions about vetting and oversight.
* Day 3: $209,000 in taxpayer funds funneled into DEI consultants instead of classrooms. [Read the receipts here.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6k0b0f8b2d)
* Day 4: A [Gender Support Plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sase05f8f52) that sidelines parents while school staff make life-altering decisions for students.
* Day 5 (TODAY): The [harboring and secret gender transition](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0o384d082a) of a student by two former teachers—without her mother’s knowledge.

**And we’re only halfway through.**
[You can catch up here: [Instagram](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scud2d9cd02) | [Facebook](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2gc3206e56) | [X](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8o4dceabb7) | [TikTok](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scq841a3c3e)]
Each video in the series shines a light on corruption, misplaced priorities, and the danger of letting activists—not parents—run our schools. If this is happening in Durango, you can bet it’s happening elsewhere in Colorado too.
**👉 Follow along with the Dirty Dozen on our social media channels, share the videos, and mark your calendar: the[next school board meeting is September 23rd](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6r2a4580d5) at 6:00 PM MDT. Parents must be heard.**
This is about more than one district. It’s about restoring accountability, protecting kids, and putting education—not ideology—first. Together, we can reclaim Colorado’s schools.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[HGTV Can’t Save Small Town America. Fort Morgan Proves it.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8o449e2d83)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4v0dd40513)** BY DRAKE HUNTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8td032c536) _When HGTV came to Fort Morgan in 2023, we were promised a makeover, a shot at national attention, fresh energy, and maybe even prosperity. The pitch was simple: if a camera crew and a few celebrity designers could just spruce up our Main Street, our town would suddenly be “revived.” For a few weeks, it felt real. But now, two years later, the cameras are gone, and the reality is settling in. The revival was short-lived, and the disappointment is palpable._
__
**[Douglas County sheriff defies Freedom From Religion Foundation after it targeted Grandparents4Kids story hour](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6pa29e0a9f)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2m98f1e67c)** BY STEVE MCKENNA, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8h5379a06c) _A funny thing happened on my way to my 60s. Concepts of tolerance my parents, teachers, and others taught me as a child evolved. In the 1960s, tolerance meant accepting others, not persecuting them because they were different from you or your friends. Now, in my 60s, it seems more about persecuting those who fail to tolerate to the satisfaction of a bullying minority of ideologues._

**[Are you racist? The Durango School Board thinks so.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4h4757e6bd)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9o54b5c9e7)** BY PROTECT LA PLATA KIDS, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3p231e3892) _Durango School District 9-R has spent heavily on a quiet plan to bring diversity, equity and inclusion policies into local classrooms. Attached to this commentary are invoices obtained through CORA requests to the district. They show the board paid Make It Plain Consulting more than $209,000 between 2021 and 2025._

|
---
**STATE**
**[From ACIP to AAP: CDPHE proposes school vaccine rule shift amid 95% MMR goal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s7s6f85043b)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scga415703d) Colorado is proposing a new playbook for school vaccines. The Department of Public Health and Environment (CDPHE) plans to drop reliance on the federal Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP) — a CDC panel — and instead follow the American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP), which has rolled out its own schedule and supports only medical exemptions.
**[Colorado Liberal Coalition Seeks To Unwind TABOR With Graduated Income Tax Plan](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sfk3121cc00)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2i75a27d59) A group of liberal advocacy groups is pursuing a 2026 ballot measure that would change the state constitution to enact a graduated income tax rate in Colorado and raise more than $2 billion each year for services like health care, education and public safety. The plan would increase income taxes on people earning at least $506,000 in annual taxable income.
**[Section 8 Pays Colorado Rents Near $4,000 Per Month as Critics Call for Reform](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s7s71c15d1b)** [THE CENTER SQUARE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbt87b1b1ef) Taxpayers are covering rents of up to $3,879 per month in Colorado, leading taxpayer advocates to question the growing duration of federal Section 8 housing choice voucher (HCV) usage. “Section 8 needs to focus on lifting people out of the trap of poverty, not putting them into the lap of luxury,” said National Taxpayers Union president Pete Sepp in an interview with The Center Square.
**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sble64e86be)**
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Denver Highlighted as One of 10 U.S. Cities With Highest Crime Rates](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sau1c8ceca7)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s5q9f4af85a)**[KDVR FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sem6d2f315d) President Donald Trump has threatened to send National Guard troops into more American cities after deploying soldiers in Washington, D.C., and Los Angeles this year. He’s highlighted Baltimore and Chicago as cities in particular need of help fighting crime, though this week he appeared to back off his threat to unilaterally deploy the National Guard into cities uninvited. __
**[Transgenderism, Firearms, and the Conservative Dilemma](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s7ieb402fc0)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8j0b228149)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9gfe0ad93d) _Rumors are circulating across social media that a future Trump administration might consider restricting firearm ownership for individuals who identify as transgender. These claims, unverified as of now, have sparked sharp reactions on both sides of the aisle._

**[Sources say Trump plans to relocate Space Command from Colorado Springs to Huntsville](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9h6d8ad3b1)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s9l6e1736fc)**[ASSOCIATED PRESS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s0ke5ea9cd0) President Donald Trump’s administration will announce on Tuesday that U.S. Space Command will be located in Alabama, reversing a Biden-era decision to keep it at its temporary headquarters in Colorado, according to two people familiar with the announcement.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3sb22dac47)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Mile High City food scene sees turnover with August openings and closings](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scm5323dbd5)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s5oa43cfb5b)**[WESTWORD](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6t045dffd7) After a summer of long-anticipated openings (Bear Leek, Pig and Tiger, Fortezza in the former home of Farow in Niwot) and much-publicized closings (the Hornet, Middleman), August ended with a surprise: Noble Riot, the spinoff from the owners of Nocturne that was named one of 2021’s Best Bars in America by Esquire (and won top honors for Best Fried Chicken in the Best of Denver 2023), shuttered its brick-and-mortar location in RiNo on August 30, after six years.
**[Pueblo County Urges Trump To Step In To Preserve Coal Plant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3v98dc4485)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sej3e271ce8)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6i5345294a) Big economic impacts are on the line as Xcel Energy transitions from generating power at the expensive Comanche Station. The county wonders if its citizens are being punished for twice voting for Donald Trump.

**[Victims Urge Accountability as Weld County Ex-Coach Awaits Sentencing in Child Sex Abuse Case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sdp9abfde98)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s3tff654e6a)**[KDVR FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6j2fbe619d) A former basketball coach in Weld County has been convicted of sexually abusing multiple players and is now awaiting sentencing. George “JR” Sagner was found guilty on multiple felony counts, including sexual assault on a child by one in a position of trust.

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6v9b9e70ba)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Colorado’s unelected energy board moves to give Xcel control over your appliances](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/ses5dab1549)** BY CORY GAINES,[ COLORADO ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sck48099f9b) _I have written in the past about our state’s model energy code.** Per the quote: “The Model Low Energy and Carbon Code, which is required by state law HB22-1362, becomes Colorado’s new minimum energy code on July 1, 2026. Any municipality or county that updates any of its building codes after that date must adopt the model code, or a code that will achieve greater energy efficiency and pollution reductions.”_
**[Space Command exit shows economic cost of political games in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s4td1f5296b)** BY CAPT. SETH KESHEL,[ CAPTAIN K'S CORNER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/scgf97246dd) _$1 billion in economic value is moving to Northern Alabama, and there is plenty more monetary damage to dish out if Colorado wants to keep political prisoners behind bars.__Economic impacts can slice like double-edged swords._

**[Reduce Taxes BY Eliminating the Government Middleman](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s6l3d391e13)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/seh4e22e1a7)** BY RUSS MINARY,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbuda380f4b) _"The power to tax is the power to destroy." – U.S. Supreme Court Chief Justice John Marshall, 1819. In this article, I’ll explain and contrast how and why the American free market works differently and better than government (in many cases) using two free market American businesses you know: Amazon and Costco._

**[The Sword of the Spirit: On the Offensive–Advancing with God’s Sword](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbm7e29e309)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s2r9befe41d)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/sbs383e8514) _As a boy, I loved playing with swords. Sometimes I’d pick up a stick and pretend to be Robin Hood, while other times I engaged in lightsaber duels reminiscent of Star Wars. Our battles were always grand—filled with heroic moves, slow-motion falls, and victory speeches nobody requested._
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._Q/s8t2998e5aa)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🍲 DID YOU KNOW?** **The inventor of the microwave got just $2 for it.** In 1945, Percy Spencer discovered that radar waves could heat food after a candy bar melted in his pocket while he worked at Raytheon. He built the first microwave oven, but the company patented it and kept the profits. Spencer’s entire reward? A token $2 bonus—no royalties, no fortune.
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!

Taxpayers are covering rents of up to $3,879 per month in Colorado, leading taxpayer advocates to question the growing duration of federal Section 8 housing choice voucher (HCV) usage. “Section 8 needs to focus on lifting people out of the trap of poverty, not putting them into the lap of luxury,” said National Taxpayers Union president Pete Sepp in an interview with The Center Square. | NATIONAL President Donald Trump has threatened to send National Guard troops into more American cities after deploying soldiers in Washington, D.C., and Los Angeles this year. He’s highlighted Baltimore and Chicago as cities in particular need of help fighting crime, though this week he appeared to back off his threat to unilaterally deploy the National Guard into cities uninvited. BY C. J. GARBO, Rumors are circulating across social media that a future Trump administration might consider restricting firearm ownership for individuals who identify as transgender. These claims, unverified as of now, have sparked sharp reactions on both sides of the aisle. President Donald Trump’s administration will announce on Tuesday that U.S. Space Command will be located in Alabama, reversing a Biden-era decision to keep it at its temporary headquarters in Colorado, according to two people familiar with the announcement. | LOCAL After a summer of long-anticipated openings (Bear Leek, Pig and Tiger, Fortezza in the former home of Farow in Niwot) and much-publicized closings (the Hornet, Middleman), August ended with a surprise: Noble Riot, the spinoff from the owners of Nocturne that was named one of 2021’s Best Bars in America by Esquire (and won top honors for Best Fried Chicken in the Best of Denver 2023), shuttered its brick-and-mortar location in RiNo on August 30, after six years. Big economic impacts are on the line as Xcel Energy transitions from generating power at the expensive Comanche Station. The county wonders if its citizens are being punished for twice voting for Donald Trump. A former basketball coach in Weld County has been convicted of sexually abusing multiple players and is now awaiting sentencing. George “JR” Sagner was found guilty on multiple felony counts, including sexual assault on a child by one in a position of trust. | COMMENTARY BY CORY GAINES, I have written in the past about our state’s model energy code. Per the quote: “The Model Low Energy and Carbon Code, which is required by state law HB22-1362, becomes Colorado’s new minimum energy code on July 1, 2026. Any municipality or county that updates any of its building codes after that date must adopt the model code, or a code that will achieve greater energy efficiency and pollution reductions.” BY CAPT. SETH KESHEL, $1 billion in economic value is moving to Northern Alabama, and there is plenty more monetary damage to dish out if Colorado wants to keep political prisoners behind bars.Economic impacts can slice like double-edged swords. BY RUSS MINARY, "The power to tax is the power to destroy." – U.S. Supreme Court Chief Justice John Marshall, 1819. In this article, I’ll explain and contrast how and why the American free market works differently and better than government (in many cases) using two free market American businesses you know: Amazon and Costco. BY DRAKE HUNTER, As a boy, I loved playing with swords. Sometimes I’d pick up a stick and pretend to be Robin Hood, while other times I engaged in lightsaber duels reminiscent of Star Wars. Our battles were always grand—filled with heroic moves, slow-motion falls, and victory speeches nobody requested. | Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com or send us a message on social media to chat! | 🍲 DID YOU KNOW? The inventor of the microwave got just $2 for it. In 1945, Percy Spencer discovered that radar waves could heat food after a candy bar melted in his pocket while he worked at Raytheon. He built the first microwave oven, but the company patented it and kept the profits. Spencer’s entire reward? A token $2 bonus—no royalties, no fortune. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | QUOTE OF THE DAY "This nation will remain the land of the free only so long as it is the home of the brave." – Elmer Davis | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. name: Rob Bonta
subject: Absolutely horrified
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Companies developing and deploying AI technologies must exercise sound judgment.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250907&t=1&akid=1940%2E1088799%2Ejj-e2z)
I’m absolutely horrified by increased reports of children being harmed by interactions with AI — including one young Californian who died by suicide after engaging with a chatbot.
As a parent, this is extremely worrying to me. And as Attorney General, I am committed to protecting children here in California and across the country from harm by AI companies.
Alarm bells should be ringing inside every AI company. Protecting kids and pursuing innovation cannot be at odds — they must go hand in hand.
**This week I sent a letter to OpenAI expressing my deep concern over how their products interact with children.** My office is also investigating OpenAI’s proposed restructuring. As a nonprofit with a stated safety mission, that commitment must remain front and center.
Here’s the simple truth: one child harmed is one too many. Companies developing and deploying AI technologies *must* exercise sound judgement and not harm children.
[**Please add your name to my petition if you agree that safety for our kids is a non-negotiable priority when it comes to AI.**](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250907/?t=2&akid=1940%2E1088799%2Ejj-e2z)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250907/?t=3&akid=1940%2E1088799%2Ejj-e2z)**
Thank you for speaking up with me on this important issue. California is watching closely — and we will not stand by while companies allow irreparable harm to our kids.
Sincerely,
Rob
[](https://act.robbonta.com/go/1077?t=4&akid=1940%2E1088799%2Ejj-e2z)
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em250907&t=5&refcode2=1940_1088799_jj-e2z&akid=1940%2E1088799%2Ejj-e2z)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: Companies developing and deploying AI technologies must exercise sound judgment. I’m absolutely horrified by increased reports of children being harmed by interactions with AI — including one young Californian who died by suicide after engaging with a chatbot. As a parent, this is extremely worrying to me. And as Attorney General, I am committed to protecting children here in California and across the country from harm by AI companies. Alarm bells should be ringing inside every AI company. Protecting kids and pursuing innovation cannot be at odds — they must go hand in hand. This week I sent a letter to OpenAI expressing my deep concern over how their products interact with children. My office is also investigating OpenAI’s proposed restructuring. As a nonprofit with a stated safety mission, that commitment must remain front and center. Here’s the simple truth: one child harmed is one too many. Companies developing and deploying AI technologies must exercise sound judgement and not harm children. Thank you for speaking up with me on this important issue. California is watching closely — and we will not stand by while companies allow irreparable harm to our kids. Sincerely, Rob Rob Bonta Attorney General of California

clean_body: Before Congress, I ran a trucking company. Now I'm fighting for something even bigger: the future of the Supreme Court. President Trump is preparing his shortlist for the next vacancy, and The Left knows it too. That's why billionaire dark-money donors like George Soros are pouring MILLIONS into Georgia to save Jon Ossoff -- Obama's handpicked puppet and Schumer's rubber stamp. Judges like Boasberg and Chutkan , who've freed illegals, stripped away your rights, and declared open rebellion against President Trump, could be appointed to become deciding votes in the Court. The Radical Left will burn down everything in their way to stack the bench. You've seen it already: So I'll put it simply: If we lose Georgia, we lose the Senate. ** If we lose the Senate, we lose the Court. And if we lose the Court, we lose the country we love. President Trump needs America First senators to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with him to: Defend the High Court from the Left's takeover and confirm bold constitutionalists in the mold of That 's why I'm in this fight. Because if we lose the Senate, we lose the Court. And once the Left gets their slimy hands on it, they 'll never give it back. Will you join me? . Thank you, Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MAGA TO 70622** If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

| | Hi Friend, The fear families are feeling right now is real. ICE raids are tearing communities apart, and Trump’s politics of intimidation are only growing louder. Across California, parents are worried about dropping their kids at school, and families are making impossible choices out of fear. This is not safety. It is tyranny. That’s why I co-sponsored Rep. Pramila Jayapal’s bill to rein in ICE by preventing agents from targeting U.S. citizens and immigrant families without accountability. It’s why I am working to make sure members of our community have the resources they need and know their rights. It’s why I’ve spoken out at rallies in our district, standing shoulder to shoulder with organizers to say: enough. But being an outspoken opponent of Trump’s cruel policies puts a target on my back. I will not hand-wave away the authoritarian streak of this presidency as “a distraction,” and I will take this threat seriously. [**We need to keep voices like mine that are honest, pointed, and informed by the people we represent in Congress. clean_body: ICE raids are tearing communities apart, and Trump’s politics of intimidation are only growing louder. | = = | | Hi Friend, The fear families are feeling right now is real. ICE raids are tearing communities apart, and Trump’s politics of intimidation are only growing louder. Across California, parents are worried about dropping their kids at school, and families are making impossible choices out of fear. This is not safety. It is tyranny. That’s why I co-sponsored Rep. Pramila Jayapal’s bill to rein in ICE by preventing agents from targeting U.S. citizens and immigrant families without accountability. It’s why I am working to make sure members of our community have the resources they need and know their rights. It’s why I’ve spoken out at rallies in our district, standing shoulder to shoulder with organizers to say: enough. But being an outspoken opponent of Trump’s cruel policies puts a target on my back. I will not hand-wave away the authoritarian streak of this presidency as “a distraction,” and I will take this threat seriously. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = We know what happens when unchecked power goes unanswered. Families suffer. Rights are stripped away. And communities like ours are silenced. But we are not powerless. Together, we can demand a future where every person is treated with dignity, where enforcement is rooted in justice, not fear. It’s our duty to continue pushing our government in the direction of justice, even when it feels futile in the face of authoritarianism and white nationalism. = In solidarity, Lateefah | * | | ---|---|--- Lateefah Simon for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com = = Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Hi, it's **Brigadier General (Ret.) Shawn Harris**. I led troops in combat overseas--never in my life did I think I'd have to fight to keep our military from being used against our own people here at home. But Donald Trump keeps pushing this dangerous idea--and Marjorie Taylor Greene cheers him on every step of the way. Troops should _never_ be used against American citizens. Period. I'm running for Congress to stop her, defend our Constitution, and make sure our military is never turned into a political weapon. We're building momentum, but MTG's big donors are flooding her with cash. [**Can you rush a contribution right now so we can take the fight to her? * * *
**Cliff 's Note: **_This is a guest post by an old friend, Devon Ricci. He makes a compelling argument, one that touches upon some things we 've theorized here. I still need to think aspects of it over, but it's bold and based on a lot of data points!_
* * *
**By Devon Nicholas Ricci**
Something has been bugging me for a while. I have written long threads including, "If I were Trump," which was a thought experiment about how I would do it if I wanted to become America's first dictator.
The conclusion I reached was that I would have slow played it. Trump could have just sat back, watched Biden's economy keep rolling (because Biden DID fix much of the it), played golf, not rock the boat, and build political capital for an eventual takeover in 4 years.
But that's not what happened; Trump came in like a bull in a china shop and [has been completely unhinged from the moment he took the oath](https://substack.com/redirect/81e79c57-4755-4c5d-9f1b-96785af1414c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he immediately intended to break.
In the last 7 months Trump has done the exact opposite of every single campaign promise he made to his cult-like following. Including:
* ⁃ Lowering inflation (increased astronomically through illegal and reckless trade wars)
* ⁃ Ending wars in Ukraine and Israel ([Trump has actively made those conflicts worse](https://substack.com/redirect/8f1ec15a-e2f2-440b-90e8-2ae9e859ad63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
* ⁃ Not starting new wars (chose to bomb Iran and has threatened to attack Mexico, Canada, [Greenland](https://substack.com/redirect/c491f19b-6808-4287-ab27-943581d25191?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and just tried his hand at Venezuela)
* ⁃ Helping small businesses (because of his tariffs, small businesses are closing at record numbers)
* ⁃ Supporting farmers (by shutting down USAID Trump destroyed their largest single customer. USAID purchased ~2 billion dollars annually in American grown produce. Tariffs and deportations have bankrupted scores of farms)
* ⁃ Increasing job numbers (proceeded to fire huge swaths of government workers, again the tariffs, we went from record low unemployment under Biden to mass layoffs and our newest jobs numbers, 22,000 in a month, are beyond pathetic)
* ⁃ Favoring "Law-and-Order" (a tall order for a convicted criminal, [he's proceeded to shred the constitution so blatantly](https://substack.com/redirect/4efc1a42-ae0a-4a90-902e-c60c2cf12dc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), even MAGA has trouble defending it)
* ⁃ Lowering taxes (the big, beautiful bill actually raises taxes on the poorest Americans, many of whom make up his once-loyal base)
* ⁃ And, the big one... "Releasing the Epstein Files" (the con man conned himself into thinking he could run on something with this much conspiracy and cultural resonance to his base, and then just walk away from it. Oops.).

Trump has made policy decisions that almost seemed designed to erode support from his base. Especially when he could've just run his crypto grift and gone golfing for 4 years pumping in billions.
Some of these decisions have led state leaders to disqualify themselves by following along--[see sloppy Ron DeSantis making measles great again in Florida](https://substack.com/redirect/96b9e6c8-3da4-47d6-a723-b953bb581d28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Why would the Heritage Foundation put all their Christo-fascist dreams into the tiny, bruised hands of a lame duck president who was likely a partner in crime with Epstein, an actual convict, [and is decaying before our eyes](https://substack.com/redirect/9aefdd9d-7959-4bba-963d-9ec2b32f3235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
Because that has **always** been the plan!
We knew about Project 2025 for some time before the 2024 election (there's even a tracker on how much they've completed).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.lPb61iILTQ0v8cByssjlZnx0HrybHoKtA-ngy8hiGSQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173050045)
Trump famously said, "I don't know anything about it" and I now believe that maybe he didn't. Trump doesn't like to read; Project 2025 is a 1000-page document filled with legal and political jargon.
In Trump's first term they couldn't even get him to read a one-page PDB (presidential daily briefing) without pictures! You think he's sitting down to read a manifesto that's like War and Peace (with no drawings)?
Seriously!?
But because Trump can't ever admit to not knowing about something--or at least the details even if knew something called Project 2025 existed--he just said "sure, I know what project 2025 is and nobody in my administration is involved with it."
Right as one of its authors sat next to him with a shit-eating grin on his face.
Now, we know Christian Nationalists like The Heritage Foundation and MAGA Mike Johnson and the bro-ligarchs like Peter Thiel and Elon Musk all really want JD Vance as President to complete their authoritarian theocratic fantasies.
But how do you do that in a nation that still has a Constitution and some remaining trappings of democracy?
**You make JD Vance the hero that saves MAGA and America, thus creating your Christian nationalist anti-FDR who 's been bought and paid for.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7655e797-5934-4f62-9776-de3e0e09eb3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The main problem is Trump's a singular cult of personality.
Your average loyal MAGA voter isn't jumping from Trump to Vance--a guy so socially awkard he's challenged ordering donuts--_even if Trump tells them to_. (We've seen this in election after election when Trump's not on the ballot).
Vance lacks the right-wing charisma to punch down in a way that entertains MAGA masses and lacks the ability to tell big lies with Trump's confident glare.
But the Heritage Foundation, at its core, is a PR shop. The reason this all seems like the plot of a bad movie, is because it is!
It's a set up with Trump as the evil villain, one [who's even sickly at this point](https://substack.com/redirect/81e79c57-4755-4c5d-9f1b-96785af1414c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and JD Vance as a savior who can heroically stand up to his own President to save his country from Trump (and likely Putin).
Trump and almost his entire cabinet are all patsies in service of Project 2025, which is by design.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.lPb61iILTQ0v8cByssjlZnx0HrybHoKtA-ngy8hiGSQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173050045)
Everyone around Trump is an abject disaster. All expendable...
* ⁃ Pam Bondi
* ⁃ Pete Hegseth
* ⁃ Kash Patel
* ⁃ [Stephen Miller](https://substack.com/redirect/c62d1f7a-2352-4871-88ea-c1e77a706d16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* ⁃ [Tulsi Gabbard](https://substack.com/redirect/2d3ddad7-5ca6-40b4-916d-9578a2842c04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* ⁃ Marco Rubio
* ⁃ Sean Duffy
* ⁃ Tom Homan
* ⁃ Kristi Noem
* ⁃ RFK Jr
* ⁃ And (maybe) Elon Musk

... Save one!
Look who's been **oddly absent** from all this illegality within the administration. Publicly distancing himself from every terrible decision Trump and his regime have been making by taking "vacations" all over the world with lots of social media posts to prove it?
None other than former "Never Trumper" JD Vance!
Bear in mind, Vance hasn't really committed any impeachable offenses. He's mostly been a spectator.
They have set up Trump to take the fall, then have JD Vance step in as the hero.
Fighting for all the promises Trump made to America. Saving our democracy from the evil villain with the crazy 2am, all-caps tweeting, [delight in the suffering of families](https://substack.com/redirect/f2b648a2-c9a4-4d5c-9501-935cd4230282?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and pedophile-ring connection.
Vance as president can remove the entire cabinet filled with Fox flunkies and fuck-ups and say he's putting the country back together Trump smashed. Only now with 75% of Project 2025 completed.
And JD Vance as the heroic patriot who replaced the evil maniacal autocrat, and who just by not taking up every GD news cycle will seem like a breath of fresh air, almost...moderate.
Trump is only meant to last for 2 years, he's a means to an end. The far-right, like Rep. Thomas Massie and even MTG are now sabotaging Trump, helping shift the base to Vance.
Then with billionaire backing Vance can become the eventual hero to disgruntled Republicans, even independents and Democrats who just want someone who seems "normal" as Leader of the Free World.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.lPb61iILTQ0v8cByssjlZnx0HrybHoKtA-ngy8hiGSQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173050045)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/068ca46e-ce61-4030-bb12-f712ced58a8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There are many ways to do this.
From having Vance or the cabinet invoke the 25th amendment due to Trump's lost mental (and physical) capacity as more and more people see it to leaking the worst of the Epstein files. (Honestly, the options are unlimited).
This is how the Heritage Foundation and other Project 2025 lunatics usher in a future under Christian rule by a theocratic billionaire class. All by hanging this whole disaster around Trump and his Fox News cabinet's necks.
While leaving Vance relatively unscathed to be the hero that saved America.
The Heritage Foundation has been grooming America to accept JD Vance as our savior. Positioning him as the "hero" of American democracy who ended the chaos.
He may seem sane as he won't send out the angry middle-of-the-night tweets but he's a bridge. Between the Opus Dei Christian Nationalists like the Republicans on the Supreme Court and tech fascists like Thiel, Musk and David Sacks.
With the help of Palantir and Elon Musk--who remember is still in a huge feud with Trump, but loves himself some J.D. Vance--they can rig any election moving forward. After they've used the midterms to rid themselves of Trump.
Thus, leading to a "permanent Republican majority" because the _brave_ Republican Vice President stepped up to save America from Trump and the Democrats!
And there is it, the whole plan, and believe me, it's a good one. I wrote a while back "there is glory to be had" and "there is an open spot in the history books for a hero."
Vance will be that "hero," brought to you by Peter Theil, The Heritage Foundation, and the elite billionaire class.
[Unless we stop them](https://substack.com/redirect/a5db2702-b48e-4f36-aa2e-f2537dc92d55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So I say: [Not On Our Watch.](https://substack.com/redirect/05ed4904-63b0-4caa-ac70-390ef19049f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I am a member of "We the People" and _we will not_ allow these Christo-fascists to manipulate us into complacency to take over **our** country.
[There are ways to stop them, and we are stepping up](https://substack.com/redirect/05ed4904-63b0-4caa-ac70-390ef19049f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), **but where are our Democratic congressional leaders??**
If you don't step up, we'll be running right past you forthwith, because we don't intend to wait for this forever-disaster to take hold in our America
* * *
_Devon Nicholas Ricci, AKA["The Angry Progressive" ](https://substack.com/redirect/f3884e86-5c32-493f-9d79-df39808307f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)has been a longtime political activist and is a proud member of "We the People." None other than former "Never Trumper" JD Vance! Bear in mind, Vance hasn't really committed any impeachable offenses. He's mostly been a spectator. They have set up Trump to take the fall, then have JD Vance step in as the hero. Fighting for all the promises Trump made to America. Saving our democracy from the evil villain with the crazy 2am, all-caps tweeting, and pedophile-ring connection. Vance as president can remove the entire cabinet filled with Fox flunkies and fuck-ups and say he's putting the country back together Trump smashed. Only now with 75% of Project 2025 completed. And JD Vance as the heroic patriot who replaced the evil maniacal autocrat, and who just by not taking up every GD news cycle will seem like a breath of fresh air, almost...moderate. Trump is only meant to last for 2 years, he's a means to an end. The far-right, like Rep. Thomas Massie and even MTG are now sabotaging Trump, helping shift the base to Vance. Then with billionaire backing Vance can become the eventual hero to disgruntled Republicans, even independents and Democrats who just want someone who seems "normal" as Leader of the Free World. | | ---|---|--- There are many ways to do this. From having Vance or the cabinet invoke the 25th amendment due to Trump's lost mental (and physical) capacity as more and more people see it to leaking the worst of the Epstein files. (Honestly, the options are unlimited). This is how the Heritage Foundation and other Project 2025 lunatics usher in a future under Christian rule by a theocratic billionaire class. All by hanging this whole disaster around Trump and his Fox News cabinet's necks. While leaving Vance relatively unscathed to be the hero that saved America. The Heritage Foundation has been grooming America to accept JD Vance as our savior. Positioning him as the "hero" of American democracy who ended the chaos. He may seem sane as he won't send out the angry middle-of-the-night tweets but he's a bridge. Between the Opus Dei Christian Nationalists like the Republicans on the Supreme Court and tech fascists like Thiel, Musk and David Sacks. With the help of Palantir and Elon Musk--who remember is still in a huge feud with Trump, but loves himself some J.D. Vance--they can rig any election moving forward. After they've used the midterms to rid themselves of Trump. Thus, leading to a "permanent Republican majority" because the brave Republican Vice President stepped up to save America from Trump and the Democrats! And there is it, the whole plan, and believe me, it's a good one. I wrote a while back "there is glory to be had" and "there is an open spot in the history books for a hero." Vance will be that "hero," brought to you by Peter Theil, The Heritage Foundation, and the elite billionaire class. . So I say: I am a member of "We the People" and we will not allow these Christo-fascists to manipulate us into complacency to take over our country. , but where are our Democratic congressional leaders?? If you don't step up, we'll be running right past you forthwith, because we don't intend to wait for this forever-disaster to take hold in our America Devon Nicholas Ricci, AKA been a longtime political activist and is a proud member of "We the People." Susbscribe to his Substack ! After your Big response to our Labor Day Sale -- extended it all week! But it ends at midnight! So you have 3 hours left to get one 25% off! | A guest post by| do not bend, I do not break, and my voice is one of moral clarity. Don't make me angry, you wouldn't like me when I am angry. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

# Monday, September 8, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1951, the United States and 47 other nations signed the Treaty of San Francisco, formally [ending the war with Japan](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTmM5oGEOAwsVr6PLaLdFgD8GRwZaZBOX2q90r7AX-X_q-7vOdQgzH4z_tbGVN88HXGVmEyyzltWeS15kyHxQDH7mkhemYEbDTMGoYZk8hfua28nZlRjYV26bveoPd0Jpqsw5M01Lf8-jcsKzGYb8gGTC0NMPq1yrYnxqMMDQALWDtPNA4dm68Od91MKgW2AdJpX6mcMjGa_ykN5fapb2KdhPJpzL_FE4KJ_Kn1Kk8FE4IzU3h1IDC6UmZDn2lEr2-qOgQdGZyrKUwyUfv5KjI9ipVsT5fIcZw3nrVwmOnEH9P8ieet8XvAAAA___7qHm0) and affirming America's postwar role in the Pacific. Today we're covering an interstellar [comet called 3I/ATLAS](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO4zAMRU8jdwwY2RpbhYpt3M22WxqMRE80kCVBYiab2y-cK2xDECDx8N__87l9Ukwxf_2mg53sZcv87IlFuG3SHkclefRSOVOKnGsrN6a8adQG0AIuW6CYXts0BLczax4HdtfZzKM2yzQOdxf8crM4z4Q8-cnSZBhN2O0-8x70NQzRnTS0uFwRJ9QXH5CsNd5--GAMLmpCDlFKu3yXmOXOe3qVH24XX44hubtI7Wr8pfSq9JpftXQ5T0qvJ1jpFe05zu1ZWgpwKiq9xizcunBK1KDcvtkLjBFIEnXw5ZECNE5MneGIOcJbvoPcSeAZUwKqlakBdXhQ7cB_Kzfp8KSWlV6H5kI9_2L_mNWEXwfF9M4s_1X0j9P_AgAA__8TopR5), which some scientists say might release "mini-probes" that look like UFOs. Have you ever spotted something in the sky that made you wonder if it was more than meets the eye? Reply to let us know. With today's sponsor [Raisin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3uozAQBfDTmA402DhA4WKliC7bbokm9pB45S_ZJii3X7GKlAP8qyl-0puZ9-e23tA6Gx6_0ZOqW1wDHcVRrZTXmnefsO4lJgroLIWU450wrBy4bGFuYVoNWvdeh8aojYiTaEj1oxwFl9Mgmqe6S8MnmMH0I26CD72YADc998OEAvqxsepMgxmmHmAA3mkDOM9SzxdtpISJDUDG1pi7v9GG-qTNveOLcqejb5x61poKE78YXxhfjuPoMtpiw8mMLxTavZwTy7utsSXMgYllr371ZOzumbh-f2b8ckqJe9bExPW77SMafUL7CExcC6XKZcs_UimfWbJNlDWF2mRl0mGds-UysgEeHq37f3P9UdEvxf8FAAD__5nfk-8), you can keep your savings strong even if the Fed cuts rates--earning 4.30%+ APY, accessing dozens of banks in one place, and grabbing up to a $1,000 bonus before rates drop.

## South Korea Secures Hyundai Workers' Release
South Korean officials announced Sunday that they [reached a deal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdBNNDCZQUGxD97bdEg3MALPPsZFtEuXvV-wvvOY2Vzq69_z5mr5IvYbtNz1lKGucgryzl1IkTSWdz4PKmeMhgbxKOFKchcJk0TrAHrCbmNR_pqbiYRWxUlcy3B_uUVvXNXW1Dy3L0s61ZcLW0cr9PKPr7g6xnmkRW-lw0bDH7o7YoL0tjNT3bunbhZ3DzjQorCWm29-ooeyy-k98Sbot8Vn5YS_lyKb-Zexo7Bg-R8zlqowdL7CxI_ZXPIwdzwzXP2PHHM-yw3dMQkCB4cyQhJYdWMjDGhMk8UJZIK7wjulbUgaWQhqEgc-kYYP9cwYmhcNTKJBIGTTAJjFtSsaOVRr4eKv3mtuHaXB7kvr_s8uPXL8G-y8AAP__YjOVAA) with the Trump administration to release more than 300 workers detained by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) after a raid last week at a Hyundai plant in Georgia. President Lee Jae Myung's chief of staff indicated a charter plane would bring the workers back to South Korea in the coming days as final administrative steps are completed. Meanwhile, Hyundai announced that "none of those detained are [directly employed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ8GOiOfsfkpXKShu7Qp0YKXY3PGRvZy5N4-Iq-QdkYazfd93cc7kKfw-IQNLS9xDHhmj8yYRk7HtgMfOe4YwBOGPcUJIYxKKiNkL2Q3OiD_HnXp7IKosC7R3lrT1sp0ui5X63Qt6wkmA9r0upmaTk1138Ct1W3XNFiSvdZkL7ublFqqanYS-t7MfTM7Y2RXaImOOKbqO1LgFRf_ji9M1Ry30tuVec9F_VGooVDDeZ7VEn8uiqsv1LBHT0xzLtSQ48GreMaEIBLCvGIWDsGLI4uEHiGjOGN6YrpyBgroBCyMSdC20SMBUwwiAbkyWbef5D3lpi20fGxA_u8R_0vjy6rfAAAA__8OvopU)" by the motor company. The Department of Homeland Security said that most of those detained were subcontractors working in the U.S. illegally. Responding to the raid, South Korea's Foreign Ministry issued a statement expressing "[concern and regret](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OozAUhZ8GOkfG-LdwsU26bLslurEvcHeMjYxJlLcfMa8w5dGRjs73_XtMD6BEefkLG_o2lynj-0jYGtap1XPboZ1H2TFDIsx7LU-EPAkuFOOOcTtFoPSZZB_9jChw7NEPRplRKCvHfvU6Oq1jHOdZi-ieJozSGGtAjxIGmE1P_lrjjtuBc8nFLUQOzqngdIhKcdtJjpFaqbf_hXJbcU6f8sJ6C2Xrk19b249u_NOJeyfusF8AV3WF2igk7MT9PNhRzrayr1IRGAVkFSiyBUtdCNj6OXMEYojW2CE6rYKRoBAHq4QKaI1T7gmyrz7ub0qJDm06yZcNKP0cab-y9_LiOwAA___3NINA)," as ICE workplace raids ramp up across the U.S.
## Alcaraz Wins US Open as Trump Attends
Carlos Alcaraz of Spain captured the 2025 [U.S. Open men’s singles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQBeDT2B3ReGwwFBTbpMu2W1pjGBJWGCxMEmVPv3Ku8JejkZ7e9_7clhvFFPP9N21sWyhL5veRuDWuS6vPbaf2PMrOmVLkvNeyMuUFAaUAI0AvnmL6LFPvbWBGHnu2wyznEaWexv5hV1gVaD9r0hiC5xmUZz0qNTOjl6GP9kwDA3oAmAAvzgMZI51RzksJupuAfWylXv6WmNuDQ_qUF9eLK1uf7KO1_ejGXx1eO7zSfgLO13nUFl3iDq_PQ5wI8SWJEDMlQclRpX_iiDlzFaOWqAf0BpWWDie3SrUOfjWsR_Ls-mr9_o4pxUPN3QT3jWL6dmg_Gu5l8X8AAAD__8Q7gf4) title Sunday in New York, defeating Italy’s Jannik Sinner 6-2, 3-6, 6-1, 6-4 in a clash billed as the latest chapter of the “Sincaraz” rivalry. The [victory marked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu8yAQwPGnwVsifICBgeHT13pL144WxWeHChsLLnHz9pXTvkGnk37D6X_3fhkuPqa4zm9-QUdTHlbca0IiLAOV27J5utW84epTxHUr-QP9OgAHdeL2xM0w-pgeg2xGNyECigZdq5UWoIwUzdUZFTS3xnSyRRFsECBbAV4Jr5U1Gpvojm3cctNyLjmcw8i9tSrYLoxKccMkxzFSLufPHFe64pQe-Y7lHPLSJHcl2ioT_xj0DPqvQxn0P9EM-krHBQz61nbScAsWpBJdJ1rQTPQFp6GWwMQL7ccEpV7nnOeEDJT-T3vwy_bUimX7tbk8hXZEaoobtz2mFGunmeTz4mN6ptGf_nl38B0AAP__AFGFdw) their third consecutive Grand Slam final meeting this season, giving Alcaraz his second Flushing Meadows crown, sixth major overall, and the No. 1 ranking back from Sinner. The champion takes home $5 million, part of a record prize pool, as a high-profile crowd looked on, [including President Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ_GdD4ZA4cpXKShu7Qp0WIvsJGxkb1wubePuFf4m2lG-jTf_HlNL6BAcf0NO1pe0hTxXQIyY544n_sBfJZ0YIRAGI-cZoQ4aaU7qQapzOSBwmdqK28XRI1Nhbbuu77RnWmbarOdMTi39WBMo93snqoGZxrnvWtaWLyryN40NShTK9Uq_XBewTB0bng633XKiFahJ0758TdR5A2X8EkX5odLexXsxnwU0fwSehR6PGDFQv_uTujxJgs9quGOXugRI2NmoLhjZKHHr2KRZ5G3o7yoEEuXERiLdBukIpeUpcOAcyYmLPKio0hguYSzbBRXuSP49C5Vtv54UwhUnr1o1boDhe9G_tGxl9X_AwAA__9FAI96), whose appearance delayed the start by about a half-hour and drew a mix of cheers and boos amid heavy security that caused chaos outside the stadium. On Saturday, Belarus’ Aryna Sabalenka defended her crown by beating American Amanda Anisimova for her second straight U.S. Open title. Read [Sabalenka's thoughts on X](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7GOqzAQAL_G7oKWxQZcuHgNXV57pbXgJfjO2Mg4yeXvT7lfuHakGWk-ru5KIYZ0-08727pml_h5Rq6Vi6vlvh9U72c-OFEMnI6SZ6bkEFBfwFxgdJ5CfDklvV2ZkTvJth300KEeVSc3S35l347YoleKeVAAS-uZYJh71kbJYN81MDC2AAqwWTyQMXox_eK1hlEoYB9qLs1nDqluvMZXfnBplrzLaLdaj1N0_wROAqfvNxU4nTRT5PRFJIv1xzPEGM5-EApuO4X469Y_DT8s_gQAAP__BxRqLw).
## Florida Rep. and Scientist Warn of Alien Probe
Harvard’s Avi Loeb and Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-Fla.) are [urging NASA to monitor 3I/ATLAS](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO4zAMRU8jdwwY2RpbhYpt3M22WxqMRE80kCVBYiab2y-cK2xDECDx8N__87l9Ukwxf_2mg53sZcv87IlFuG3SHkclefRSOVOKnGsrN6a8adQG0AIuW6CYXts0BLczax4HdtfZzKM2yzQOdxf8crM4z4Q8-cnSZBhN2O0-8x70NQzRnTS0uFwRJ9QXH5CsNd5--GAMLmpCDlFKu3yXmOXOe3qVH24XX44hubtI7Wr8pfSq9JpftXQ5T0qvJ1jpFe05zu1ZWgpwKiq9xizcunBK1KDcvtkLjBFIEnXw5ZECNE5MneGIOcJbvoPcSeAZUwKqlakBdXhQ7cB_Kzfp8KSWlV6H5kI9_2L_mNWEXwfF9M4s_1X0j9P_AgAA__8TopR5), an interstellar object they say could release mini-probes resembling UFOs as it nears the sun on Oct. 30. Luna, who chairs the House Declassification Task Force, joined the push in early September and wants the Juno mission redirected to study it. Listen to the [podcast interview here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVvQYWOwBw-VoqiqlAxdOqKLOQe3BiM4QHn7Kn2Frt8n_Yb_17W7YkxxetxwJMchdxMdayJmWjpetnFG3tY804Qp0jQv-U44dRKkPoE9gel6jOnZ1UXvApEkVZCrWt0qqU2tisH5JqCRsrK-CqENlVENBhOQLKGXqIvoXhpYMBVADbL0PaC12tvG91qDETVQHzkv5XeOEw8U0jPvtJQ-j0VyA_O8CvUm5EXIy3Ec5TNvvN3p9b8WZD8IddmFOo_1J59vP_vHOxSL6-cjphTXphU1PEaM6Y_kf3XYnfwNAAD__xGFcio). Loeb points to its odd glow and near-perfect planetary alignment as signs it may be artificial. Read Loeb’s [speculative 2025 paper on 3I/ATLAS](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuwyAUANDT4C3o-wOxPTBUlawOTdeOFuZ_YipsLEwSZenZq_YKvcAb3udluriY4nb9cCvbGvK08eNIXCuXqZbburt6O_LOm0uRt73kmd02IaA5wXCCfiIX03PSDdnAjKwatm1nOoWm16pZrOo7Rxo0hdaj8mh0a87t4HEOqiXsmmh_NRigbwE0oPQEbhiMH86ejIFeaGCKNRf5leNWFw7pme9cpM9rk-xS634I9SJwFDimB8_SBycXV-6ukGS6CRy_U-ZZ4Pj2-o5G7hSaYml_xJTice6EhuvqYvoT678a7hZ_AgAA__95WnBr). Loeb says the object may deploy "mini-probes" that could resemble UFOs, citing unusual traits like forward-facing luminosity and precise orbital alignment. Most scientists still say it’s just a comet, but the object’s odd behavior has some folks in Washington taking a second look.

subject: TOMORROW: Our September Monthly Meeting with Fmr. Colorado GOP Vice Chair: Priscilla Rahn!
body:
Please open this important message about our September meeting of the Arapahoe Tea Party...

Hey Everyone!
Following our incredible event with Congressman Louie Gohmert last month, we are excited to invite you to the Arapahoe Tea Party Regular Monthly Meeting for September.
This month, we will hear from Former Vice Chair of the Colorado GOP, Priscilla Rahn, on her new book, Restoring Education in America: An Inspirational Teacher Toolbox.
As you may know, Priscilla is a teacher in the Denver Public School system and has a front row seat to the disastrous policies our school boards are inflicting on our children.
We also invite candidates up for election in November 2025 to join us and share your message, so we can best support you.
This year, we will have critical elections for School Boards, City Councils, mayoral races, and other municipal offices that make a difference in our communities.
All politics are local, and we must support these individuals as best we can!
As always, click the image or button below to RSVP for our meeting.

body:
A convenience store near Fredericksburg sold [one of two winning tickets](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL_GdCB7wSEuXLyGLq-9JTJ4CassNoJVnPz9VfILtx2NzmjOz228BWJK9_9hQy-vJY8Jy8kogsdYKCVKd6H5gWKt1hsxTvTAETTYWrtaX8cYiN9jV0U_6ehMhd70tm_BQX-tVu_Q2a7F6TJDnLuoA6BxtnNL29vQL64i_4Fpp6_GaGNsE-1lcnaZdLQ9LNOiOo2RJB-NrCj4CufC7_zEo5nzVrFfRfZTtf8UDAqGUkqzvc-QQpKcKH9KCobPKwUD5zmwgiEcQjPjNxHJ9Rdb77ngMQXmGoxubWtss697dfi4F2Km89KrTt-3QPzdlr8Ze3r4DQAA___gdX9t) for Saturday's $1.78 billion Powerball drawing, the second-largest U.S. lottery prize ever. ## Winning Powerball Ticket Sold in Texas
A convenience store near Fredericksburg sold [one of two winning tickets](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL_GdCB7wSEuXLyGLq-9JTJ4CassNoJVnPz9VfILtx2NzmjOz228BWJK9_9hQy-vJY8Jy8kogsdYKCVKd6H5gWKt1hsxTvTAETTYWrtaX8cYiN9jV0U_6ehMhd70tm_BQX-tVu_Q2a7F6TJDnLuoA6BxtnNL29vQL64i_4Fpp6_GaGNsE-1lcnaZdLQ9LNOiOo2RJB-NrCj4CufC7_zEo5nzVrFfRfZTtf8UDAqGUkqzvc-QQpKcKH9KCobPKwUD5zmwgiEcQjPjNxHJ9Rdb77ngMQXmGoxubWtss697dfi4F2Km89KrTt-3QPzdlr8Ze3r4DQAA___gdX9t) for Saturday's $1.78 billion Powerball drawing, the second-largest U.S. lottery prize ever. ## Corpus Christi Kills Desalination Plant
The Corpus Christi City Council voted last week to suspend plans for a [controversial desalination plant](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbHOozAQhJ8GOke2gRAKijRU9__tlWix18kqZkH2AuHtT8krXP2NZjT6_v6MP0CR-PELM_byDsvIeOSIIpjGg5iJH0LuhdI0Ws8UcaIXjlbbRulO6dvogeI51qXvJ-07U2Jv2qatbGfbW_nsvXGAVTDGdcZ509XBVujQ16GtGriakvpPme70zRhtTHPxzXXqmjBp37Q2TKGoNXqSJV3kiYJvyCGey47p4pa5jP1TZM1FdS_sUNjhOI7LnPnDCjsgqy0XdtjSBKyIQ4IsaXOyJfzindLCM7JAVHnLAsQwUSQ5CzucCCkrYiVPVDO8iB_KY4ZIDEILqzUCi4J1_QZlURMqj-AVBMGkHMmp3LKxo6j2RT6TkNT9bv78rmkvU-_Xg2KkfG2LWj9moPg9Jf-nYu_tvwAAAP__pouidw) after years of rising cost estimates and community pushback. The project was approved in 2019, when a plant with a treatment capacity of 10 million gallons was estimated to cost $140 million. Last month, the [estimated cost](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u2zAQBODTUB2N5UrUT6EijbqXNqWwJFf2wrT0QO6z7NsHzhVSf8BgZv58rV8kWfbrb3rwrK_tWHc-a2ZVLusp-y77VSXeWb0HeEjmIHdeEdBbmCyMayLJ77Vr0hwgTa7h2Q1-aHHCYWxuc4pT109upA47phT8GMMEvR9bIGRoG5k_YTDB6Bw45y_J92HyW4DkB9zCZjrgJHqUi95Y-UV1y-_jyeUSj0eT55vqdzXtL4OLweU8z8tdRPT5YYMLFZWY2eDyWWZwyUekbHBJUivvKsduSW3iStkmDqRs9VaYLZXCVTl9OIq-bTx-9ijZ6g_XRG-Di4fWOkr9gBwsBCLbxba3Y4TOhj5uLTO6cUtNmdP3KTlL7QfTwfVBkv_11_97_Tnj3wAAAP__GWKVdA) for a plant with a 30-million-gallon-per-day treatment capacity was $1.2 billion. Residents have raised concerns that the plant would increase the bay's salinity levels. Corpus Christi's public water system [has been strained](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFy5CAQRL8GZagGVqyWgOASZb70QhWCYTVlBCoYW_bfX61_wXFXd_V7_97WN0-ZyvOvP9DxV6prwatnZMa2XlQKlSdTeEc2BuCgjBu946pBGwlWwmONnvL3Og3RbRCtGtCp2cw3bfX8GHZnk4dk4n2zUU_zwwSLcFOTT9ZPaoJ5IPcaAwsPpUApM0Zz36xJG0Qz67QlMQFG4tpG3pHxy_eUv-sntjHUY8huZz67uP0RehF6ua5rDHur5ZUKvbxwhF56_eBd_rSFXnxjChmFXkJt50eXYW_UmWTE7jMVz1SLvDxjk2f2pcvgS8CMUWoFNwWTHs_9HJqL50U5U7_PYoLn4Sn_vOLfufx0-n8AAAD__27KiQM) by a new plastics plant and steel mill, and residents have been banned from outdoor water use since March. Industry representatives warned that the project's suspension would cripple the local economy. One council member claimed Gov. Greg Abbott's chief of staff threatened to withhold state funding for the city if it didn't continue to fund the plant's development. Three speakers [were arrested](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT2P2zAMQH-NvDHQR3S2Bw9dvF3XjoY-6JiNIhmUEl_-feGiS-cbifdI4IG_PpdPR4ny7ad74NS-1rJkPGrC1pCXg3KmfGsU7tislfJBCT3dcdFSW5AjyGGJjtJ7uXZx8jKOqsNJ9bY3etT90G1TVB5H782gRzNaVMb0cjAmmtirGPvQ0XQek6MclJJK2Uu0H360q5fR9nr1q7hKjNQKX9qGDb9cXdO7vJAvoTy6NG2t7VWYH0LPQs_HcVzuTLW9Tiz0fPYIPacSXIJ_A2V4lydDRrptvvBWShR6DoX3Z4Wwnfsk9Lwz1vpkBMeMtVX434BQnjlQAsbfGBoo0OApJSoZKGdk2Bz7whCxukTZtZPsXE674ynux2nXj15c5e3hKP1Nat97xGvSfwIAAP__fCahyQ) during the 13-hour meeting.
## Brothers Complete 5,500-Mile Bike Ride
Brothers Bobby and Raleigh Jenkins, business owners and Texas A&M graduates, [biked from Anchorage, Alaska, to Kyle Field](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMqOmB2MIHGxC9jfdEBncHloYGJnWMNx-xVzhJ5WU9FSv_v0MP54Tb8-_fiUnn7gPG51HIhHKw8nbxttTeFpIjAFYOdHICw0IaDR0GtoheE7XUBfBjRC6qiBXWWMf2KFti9lZmNoKfd0-CKEBgsbbaONkQ7STBV-wu2HQQVtVUFWmDKYZOxNHCMZiHKOqgQLLnkuZSejjj5iu_U25nPa1SG4WeR3q8Udhr7A_z7NcRvncpcL-ZivsobvDKuy_AD3mXWbKh5729ZVISN96-vbTLejgLz3NPrNcOnMg7ZM_Fq-XK5GOTCko7IvswuvklPhorKrhuXpO303yuyffDv8HAAD__19ahXU) over the summer to raise awareness for personal causes. The 5,500-mile journey took 80 days. Bobby Jenkins, the owner and CEO of ABC Home & Commercial Services in Bryan and Austin, rode [in memory of his grandson Moss](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3SAQhZ8Gd1wNGPxTUKRxt2lTWmCG68liY2F2fZ2nj7jKG6Q7I82Mzvf9-pg_LEXanz_thqa8Qpp3vM6IpWCeL9p32p-Flk8sWgNsFNHRJ84SpOYwchhmbynes2q8ceBH0aARve5bOcp-aFYzKAcgIIS-G7TuRLAOWznAaLVSLbYNmfoMRhiEACH0w-vOjTo48LqXwQWmAD2VlB9lxYIve4Z4p2_MjyVtTTRrKcfJ2h9MTkxO13U9QnopVTnqBpNTjUxOMS028n-Dy_ZPquFAb6sBflFZueXHVz7SidzlVFbMJw-007nyys-rAL7cy_vgd_rKO95MTk02_rgoRjq7nil4bpbiu175P6nfRv4NAAD__7TSi_E), who died at the age of 15 months. "_To go up the hills every single pedal, I’m thinking about Moss_ ," he said. Raleigh Jenkins is the chairman of the board for ABC Houston. He dedicated his ride to Mission Lazarus, an organization that supports families in Haiti and Honduras. "_It's time to lean in and help Haitians to get back on their feet_ ," he said. This is the third long bike ride the brothers have completed for charity. "_Yeah, we are physically tired, but we knew going into this that this would probably be the last big event that we do like this_ ," said Bobby. See photos of the trip [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzz-OqzAQgPHTmC5oPMGxXbh4DV1euyUyeIBRDI7MbP7cfpW9wl7gp-_7ug7XyJn35X_cKMhrLsNOzyOTCNXhyfvO-yI83UiMAdg408g3GhDQnMCfwA0pcn4PXZPCCMnrhoK2xp7Ro3XNGshZjWZKLhKgszC5eNbop6kzYL3xDYcPBh6c1qC1aZO5jN7MIyRjcR5n1QElllJbWUnoFY85v8uDajuVrclhFbkf6vxPYa-wH2uRlerxyWxLXRT25buepPJdYd_UkO5PzpmPi1UdLFvk_OvI3-4fAX8CAAD__0GebNk).

clean_body: A convenience store near Fredericksburg sold for Saturday's $1.78 billion Powerball drawing, the second-largest U.S. lottery prize ever. The other ticket was sold in Missouri. | | | | | | Monday, September 8, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1900, a powerful hurricane devastated Galveston, killing at least 6,000 people. It remains the in U.S. history. A convenience store sold one of two winning tickets for Saturday's $1.78 billion Powerball jackpot. Do you play the lottery? Let us know in today's Poll , and hit reply to tell us what you'd do with the money if you won. Save up to 80% on your favorite brands this fall with today's sponsor, Abilene 🌤️ 90/69° | Amarillo ☁️ 92/63° | Austin ☁️ 92/74° | Brownsville 🌧️ 90/77° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 88/78° | DFW 🌥️ 89/69° | El Paso ☁️ 95/76° | Houston ☁️ 92/73° | Laredo ☁️ 92/76° | Lubbock ☁️ 90/66° | Midland 🌥️ 90/69° | San Antonio 🌦️ 90/74° | Tyler ☀️ 86/61° | Waco ☀️ 89/69° Take The Flyoverwith you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Winning Powerball Ticket Sold in Texas A convenience store near Fredericksburg sold for Saturday's $1.78 billion Powerball drawing, the second-largest U.S. lottery prize ever. The other ticket was sold in Missouri. The $2 ticket was purchased at off U.S. Highway 290 east of town. The winning numbers—which were not selected with the quick pick method—were 11-23-44-61-62 with the Red Powerball number of 17. According to the Texas Lottery, the winner selected to receive a pretax rather than $893.5 million over 30 years of annuitized payments. The odds of winning the jackpot, which was , were 1 in 292.2 million. Corpus Christi Kills Desalination Plant The Corpus Christi City Council voted last week to suspend plans for a after years of rising cost estimates and community pushback. The project was approved in 2019, when a plant with a treatment capacity of 10 million gallons was estimated to cost $140 million. Last month, the for a plant with a 30-million-gallon-per-day treatment capacity was $1.2 billion. Residents have raised concerns that the plant would increase the bay's salinity levels. Corpus Christi's public water system by a new plastics plant and steel mill, and residents have been banned from outdoor water use since March. Industry representatives warned that the project's suspension would cripple the local economy. One council member claimed Gov. Greg Abbott's chief of staff threatened to withhold state funding for the city if it didn't continue to fund the plant's development. Three speakers during the 13-hour meeting. Brothers Complete 5,500-Mile Bike Ride Brothers Bobby and Raleigh Jenkins, business owners and Texas A&M graduates, over the summer to raise awareness for personal causes. The 5,500-mile journey took 80 days. Bobby Jenkins, the owner and CEO of ABC Home & Commercial Services in Bryan and Austin, rode , who died at the age of 15 months. "To go up the hills every single pedal, I’m thinking about Moss ," he said. Raleigh Jenkins is the chairman of the board for ABC Houston. He dedicated his ride to Mission Lazarus, an organization that supports families in Haiti and Honduras. "It's time to lean in and help Haitians to get back on their feet ," he said. This is the third long bike ride the brothers have completed for charity. "Yeah, we are physically tired, but we knew going into this that this would probably be the last big event that we do like this ," said Bobby. See photos of the trip . | Flying together with our sponsor And when you sign up, you'll get access to our personalized deals newsletter, with curated picks from your favorite brands at the best stores. Saving you money is at the heart of what we do. We know that saving money is more important now than ever. | ➤ Denton: A strong storm damaged multiple planes and a hangar at Denton Enterprise Airport on Friday night. The airport registered wind gusts up to 75 mph. () ➤ Houston: A high school football game between rivals Jack Yates and Madison was canceled just before halftime when a fight broke out in the stands and attendees thought they heard gunshots, causing hundreds of people to rush the field in an attempt to flee. () ➤ Odessa: Hundreds of residents are suing the city in a $1 million class-action lawsuit, claiming they have been incorrectly billed for water usage. One resident was allegedly charged for 96,000 gallons in a single month. () ➤ El Paso: About 3,000 soldiers in the U.S. Army's 3rd Brigade Combat Team, 1st Armored Division returned to Fort Bliss last week after a nine-month deployment in Europe. () ➤ Round Rock: Democratic State Rep. James Talarico is expected to announce a run for the U.S. Senate this week. Talarico, 36, was elected to the Texas House in 2018 and is one of the Democrats who participated in quorum breaks this year and in 2021. () ➤ The Harris County -Houston Sports Authority has filed a lawsuit against the Harris County Appraisal District, claiming the Toyota Center—the home of the Rockets—should not be listed on the appraisal rolls because it is exempt from property taxes. () ➤ A recently implemented state law requires school personnel to obtain parents' consent before providing students with medical treatment. The authors of the law have expressed concern over reports that school nurses have refused to give children bandages or ice packs for minor injuries. Decades of misinformation—visions of meltdowns, toxic waste, or plants as terrorist targets—have left many wary. As a State Representative fighting for [...]

name: Dem Alert
subject: This is the one race we can’t ignore
body:
Control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court could do more to decide the outcome of the 2026 and 2028 elections than any single Congressional race.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016l0wL7aIRTtATzTnXxXA6LXc4uzct2MI-b2zLFoDIqYx_C-i1dSVDyTk6jvXFEF2mJC783dzPHxH_AYaYsUcngQfIhWUhlBi_5m6f2CufdSW14yHKyDbgW37oiL2ehodmN1h0yJXRA4_8hJma4fSVTMMz7Fo3B2TS2IGP5Z4a8BycoJw92cqtejotMIIEML3Mu9Vt4afYIL9gzDFQvMvTDut9j52zPGSsJECj2bORhE=&c=uBx5y5e9_3GBqeK7PSUj374WR7d1DxmrCQLrMblsz4WzNC40Npn5Sg==&ch=XcijhxD-6T1v-JxL-oWQayhU2_4yr6gq7f7Jyy7ny_G8ODUaKGOcMg==)
---
| Peter,
If the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court race were a Congressional election, it would already be the most expensive in the country right now.
But here's the problem: Hardly any Democrats are paying attention.
MAGA operatives are spending millions to flip the PA courts red because they know what's at stake -- not just for Pennsylvania, but for the entire country.
They know that if they control the courts:

* They can block mail-in voting

* They can rig redistricting

* They can overturn election results they don't like

* They can ban abortion, attack unions, and dismantle basic rights

So while most donors are focused on the next House battleground or Senate toss-up, the truth is this:
Control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court could do more to decide the outcome of the 2026 and 2028 elections than any single Congressional race.
We need more people to understand that. And the only way we can do that is by an aggressive, targeted voter outreach program that gets this race on people's radars.
We're not going to lie to you: Those plans cost a LOT of money. Especially if we want to fight back against the MAGA billionaires emptying their pockets to help fund this judicial takeover.
[That's why we have to ask: Can you chip in $50, $25, or even $10 to help Defend Our Courts stop the MAGA takeover of Pennsylvania's judiciary?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016l0wL7aIRTtATzTnXxXA6LXc4uzct2MI-b2zLFoDIqYx_C-i1dSVDyTk6jvXFEF2mJC783dzPHxH_AYaYsUcngQfIhWUhlBi_5m6f2CufdSW14yHKyDbgW37oiL2ehodmN1h0yJXRA4_8hJma4fSVTMMz7Fo3B2TS2IGP5Z4a8BycoJw92cqtejotMIIEML3Mu9Vt4afYIL9gzDFQvMvTH4-p3oRwkz9ewIfvsMt6Oc=&c=uBx5y5e9_3GBqeK7PSUj374WR7d1DxmrCQLrMblsz4WzNC40Npn5Sg==&ch=XcijhxD-6T1v-JxL-oWQayhU2_4yr6gq7f7Jyy7ny_G8ODUaKGOcMg==)

clean_body: Control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court could do more to decide the outcome of the 2026 and 2028 elections than any single Congressional race. | | | | | == | Peter, If the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court race were a Congressional election, it would already be the most expensive in the country right now. But here's the problem: Hardly any Democrats are paying attention. MAGA operatives are spending millions to flip the PA courts red because they know what's at stake -- not just for Pennsylvania, but for the entire country. They know that if they control the courts: They can block mail-in voting They can rig redistricting They can overturn election results they don't like They can ban abortion, attack unions, and dismantle basic rights So while most donors are focused on the next House battleground or Senate toss-up, the truth is this: Control of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court could do more to decide the outcome of the 2026 and 2028 elections than any single Congressional race. We need more people to understand that. And the only way we can do that is by an aggressive, targeted voter outreach program that gets this race on people's radars. We're not going to lie to you: Those plans cost a LOT of money. Especially if we want to fight back against the MAGA billionaires emptying their pockets to help fund this judicial takeover. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == This race might be flying under the radar, but the stakes are life or death. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==
