name: Her Bold Move
subject: re: Congregants of this sexist church
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
In case you had your head in the sand and missed it... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114820173/568260358/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250906ICYMIC_N_HBM_NO_13_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMTMyYWQxLWI1OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PcrYF8IRXV50pNwJVXBgIyjNyLdHA6bRIwhbRsUMTYE=)
---
Hi Peter,

It was a busy summer at Her Bold Move, and in our country as a whole. We wanted to send you a quick summary of what you may have missed as it pertains to our work:
* We saw some bizarre headlines, like CNN’s profile of a pastor named Douglas Wilson and the influential movement he leads. **The piece explained that his movement preaches that women should not be allowed to _vote_ or hold leadership positions. **

**It was later revealed that members of the Trump administration are congregants of this church, and hold this dangerously sexist worldview as well...**
* Another headline came from Tennessee, where a 35-year-old pregnant woman was denied prenatal care by her physician because she was “unwed.” This type of formerly illegal discrimination has now been deemed legal in TN.
* In Colorado, a state Representative snapped a photo of his female colleague, another state lawmaker, without her knowledge or permission. Within an hour, the photo ended up on an “anonymous social media account with conservative followers” with the caption “Smash or Pass,” and the photo has continued to circulate online.
* We also saw the passing and signing of Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill.” The lack of women’s representation in the room where that bill was being written was abundantly clear as it explicitly stripped access to healthcare away from millions of people – and will have an outsized impact on American women.

[**If you’ve been away from the news this summer, we’re glad you’re back. But the reality is, we need you now more than ever. Donald Trump and his allies are aggressively rolling back women’s rights – and our best defense will be to have as many women in government as possible to block their efforts. You can be a part of this pushback by donating $20.26 today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250906ICYMIC_N_HBM_NO_13_NG_N_L1&amount=20.26)

On that note, here’s some much-needed GOOD NEWS:
* Her Bold Move spent the summer endorsing and supporting qualified women candidates across the country. We even added our first candidate from Utah, which means Her Bold Move has worked in 43 states + 1 U.S. territory since we started doing this work 5 years ago. We can’t wait to hit all 50 in the coming year!
* We have achieved a 100% win rate in the 2025 primaries, a truly remarkable accomplishment that fills us with pride. Despite some extremely challenging races and formidable opponents, our candidates have ALL managed to emerge from the primary season victorious – [**rush $20.26 right now to help these candidates prepare for the General election this November. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250906ICYMIC_N_HBM_NO_13_NG_N_L2&amount=20.26)

Oh, and Taylor Swift got engaged in case you missed that. :)

Our mission here at Her Bold Move is as clear as ever – we need to elect women into rooms where decisions are being made. The anti-woman movement is growing more and more powerful every day, and Her Bold Move is on the front line of the pushback. We know exactly what we need to do to fight back.

[**We will continue this winning streak, but we’ll need your help along the way. Donate to Her Bold Move TODAY!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250906ICYMIC_N_HBM_NO_13_NG_N_L3&amount=20.26)

clean_body: In case you had your head in the sand and missed it... | | | | | = Hi Peter, It was a busy summer at Her Bold Move, and in our country as a whole. We wanted to send you a quick summary of what you may have missed as it pertains to our work: We saw some bizarre headlines, like CNN’s profile of a pastor named Douglas Wilson and the influential movement he leads. The piece explained that his movement preaches that women should not be allowed to vote or hold leadership positions. It was later revealed that members of the Trump administration are congregants of this church, and hold this dangerously sexist worldview as well... Another headline came from Tennessee, where a 35-year-old pregnant woman was denied prenatal care by her physician because she was “unwed.” This type of formerly illegal discrimination has now been deemed legal in TN. In Colorado, a state Representative snapped a photo of his female colleague, another state lawmaker, without her knowledge or permission. Within an hour, the photo ended up on an “anonymous social media account with conservative followers” with the caption “Smash or Pass,” and the photo has continued to circulate online. We also saw the passing and signing of Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill.” The lack of women’s representation in the room where that bill was being written was abundantly clear as it explicitly stripped access to healthcare away from millions of people – and will have an outsized impact on American women. The anti-woman movement is growing more and more powerful every day, and Her Bold Move is on the front line of the pushback. We know exactly what we need to do to fight back. This is HUGE, friend...

**Top Democrats in Washington are calling for a federal investigation into what might be one of the most suspicious settlements in recent history.**

Here’s what we know:

➡️ Trump sued Paramount over a “60 Minutes” segment with Kamala Harris.

➡️ Instead of fighting back, Paramount settled and handed Trump **$16 MILLION.**

➡️ _This happened just as Paramount was seeking approval for a merger from Trump._

This reeks of corruption... and it is being called out!!!
If corporations are funneling hush money to Donald Trump in exchange for favorable treatment from his government — the American people have every right to know.

[**If you agree, citizen co-sign Top Democrats' investigation before 11:59PM:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68223?t=6&akid=23374%2E4449941%2ErKSvIo)
[PLEASE: CITIZEN COSIGN THE INVESTIGATION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68223?t=7&akid=23374%2E4449941%2ErKSvIo)

body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdq84u8uf94polamtpnrt9pip7lvke5d2j9c8ko0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkdkk0lduejdcpqkt7qvug9esgs6uka5s0er4j58_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0al1v1ku80c8s1ir051plqk7vfuu9jct6mvpt8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp2jv9i21tu2fr6vp51jd98lmrqs5u451pcun4p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)_**

---
[DONATE $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmdah5ds90ee1monnvb0ql7qep02rgkck1c3mp08_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
[DONATE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1perg2qrh3usn41eahceskgk5pjq0e3ereb1cao_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvseou3ld8hlrtobnnf8pqjre6bv3arrqqcc6c18_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zakn23nhk5bq6lretsfj43avorucd0aevjefinj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlrgpbid8rgbgqcg1m16q858rik3dhdikk3ksvu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3kc3d7sguu1ocgjjalfc4kvvfr5qdvgppjfjo00_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoopfn2q718nlps8h8f4aer9ksseaio8p51fqmf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)

| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
_[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0q04qa7d5qc52i2t9t7geer49g2pi2orj2kokhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim8pr6cph2bs)_
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

clean_body: Here’s how we make it happen | | | | | | Friend, I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda. | | Walz’s record is a warning for America: higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies. If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states. I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it. From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. I’m ready to take it on. This race isn’t just about Minnesota. It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state. But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now. If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget. | | Thank you for standing with me in this fight. Sincerely, Kendall Qualls Candidate for Governor of Minnesota | | | My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school. I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit. Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation. We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities. That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. With gratitude,Kendall Qualls | | | | | The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts. When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go. Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together. | | | | Prepared and paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082 | | **The appearance of Kendall Qualls in military uniform does not imply or constitute endorsement by the U.S. Army or U.S. Department of Defense. Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Niki Conforti
subject: It's Time to Get on the 2026 Ballot
body:
It's Time to Get on the 2026 Ballot | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/88a48fd7abd2/conforti-for-congress-10610737?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, It's Petition Season!

The Conforti for Congress campaign has been hard at work gathering signatures to get on the 2026 election ballot. Coming off a presidential election in 2024, our required number of signatures needed to make the ballot in 2026 has jumped. We need your help!

Come out to one of the events below and sign a petition to help us get on the ballot. You will be in and out in 10 minutes - and you will make a huge contribution to our campaign!
1. **Monday, September 8th** from 6p-9p at Papa Passero's, 6326 S Cass Ave, Westmont
2. **Tuesday, September 9th** from 6:30p - 8p at Papa Joe's, 14459 LaGrange Rd, Orland Park
3. **Monday, September 15th** from 5p - 8p at Bryan's American Grille, 2009 Ogden Ave, Downers Grove
4. **Every Saturday morning** from 9a - 12p at MTRO HQ, 650 Roosevelt Rd, Glen Ellyn

Help us get to WDC - and you will get a representative for District 6 that cares about its constituents!

Please consider a contribution to help us flip District 6 and Cast out Casten! Your support will go a long way in helping us retake the district - and turn it RED.

Click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=7bd294edaa&e=25f4fa3311)

Don't stop believing in what we can achieve when we work together!
Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=796d975099&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=f66aab8f9e&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=4dca1e0ec4&e=25f4fa3311)!

---

name: L.t. Gen. Michael Flynn
subject: Here’s the disturbing truth
body:
But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,**Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration?** My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. Their conspiracy was made possible by collaborators inside the FBI like James Comey and the House Intelligence Committee like Adam Schiff who lied to your face that they had evidence to “get” Trump.This is why I’ve partnered with my friends at the American Media Council to make sure we can reshape the media landscape before the next hoax can destroy our country. **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting their critical mission.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjsemb64ovuhql8fs0hmr1m7mii2u0eosufjlqlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** It’s a mission I care deeply about because I was the target of the Fake News’ lies.Here’s the truth: Obama and Hillary didn’t have a lick of evidence when they cooked up this hoax. Here’s the _disturbing_ truth: they didn’t need any.They could make up whatever they wanted to and feed it to the mainstream media monster. That’s exactly what they did.Let me explain:
---
1. They planted fake evidence in the mainstream media.

2. The mainstream media ran them as if they were fact.

3. The mainstream media's coverage was cited as proof the fake evidence was real.

---
It was terrible circular logic built on a mountain of lies.**But it worked.** It worked because the liberal media drilled it into the minds of millions of Americans that President Trump was some kind of traitor.The whole time, these Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality. The Washington Post even won a Pulitzer Prize over it!The level to which the liberal media went to justify this insanity was insane itself.That’s why today I’m honored to partner with a group who’s fighting to stop another hoax like this from destroying our country.The American Media Council understands what’s really going on:**The power-hungry radicals in Washington who have weaponized our government have also weaponized the mainstream media.** Their mission is to restore truth in the media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They’re the reason I’m able to write you this. What I deeply respect about the American Media Council is that they aren’t sitting back and watching it happen. They’re on the frontlines trying to make a difference.
---
* They publish the facts behind top media hoaxes.
* They hold journalists accountable with their “Truth in Journalism” Pledge.
* They give out “Trustworthy Ratings” to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust.

---
But that’s not all.Thanks to the generous support of patriots like you, they have a **“First Amendment Fund”** to help conservatives overcome lawfare waged by the mainstream media. **[Today, will you consider filling their “First Amendment Fund” with a donation of $35 or more?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4cgo0ggrckralt77aq30ea00m9qfm258a5418gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** A $35 donation would be a tremendous help. But if you feel called to make a monthly donation, say $15 or more, I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence.It’s so important to me that you support the American Media Council that I want to “Thank You” with a complimentary book.My friend, it’s hard to put into words just how impactful your support will be today...... but I’ll try.The Deep State wanted to destroy me.They tried to take away my career and financially bankrupt my family. I had to sell my house to pay the endless legal fees. It put my wife, Lori, through hell and back.That’s the Left’s goal.**Humiliation. Retaliation. Destruction.**Sadly, the damage to my reputation can’t be fixed in a courtroom or wiped from the internet.President Donald Trump pardoned me. My name has been officially cleared. But no matter where I go... certain people will always see me the way the liberal media painted me.That’s why the Left pushes these hoaxes. It’s all about inflicting **maximum punishment** on anybody who dares to stand up against their radical doctrine.Your support of the American Media Council and their **“First Amendment Fund”** today will directly help patriots like me clear their names and stand up against the liberal media’s lies.This is only possible with your support today. **[Will you support the American Media Council just like I do?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg6haca8n29qgfe6blje57eave0jssbsbiedvkgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** If you’re in a position to sign up for a monthly donation today – $15 or more – I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence as my sincere thanks.
---
Thank You and God Bless You
---
Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh421entnaq1enhpgulp1tn9m4fse8dapoqmqb6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)
---

P.S. As my deepest thanks for supporting the American Media Council and their critical mission, I want to send you a complimentary copy of my new book, Pardon of Innocence. **[All it takes is your monthly gift of $15 or more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb861b0be2o7sap54gv62rnm4qq3sbvbj9kk5hag_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** But in truth, any gift amount you can send today – whether $35 or some other amount – it will be a tremendous help. No matter the amount you can send today, I want you to know that I’m grateful there are still patriots like you out there who believe in the truth. As long as you’re still around, the Fake News liars will never win.
---
| | **American Media Council** PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

| Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: L.t. Gen. Michael Flynn
subject: Here’s the disturbing truth
body:
But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,**Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration?** My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. Their conspiracy was made possible by collaborators inside the FBI like James Comey and the House Intelligence Committee like Adam Schiff who lied to your face that they had evidence to “get” Trump.This is why I’ve partnered with my friends at the American Media Council to make sure we can reshape the media landscape before the next hoax can destroy our country. **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting their critical mission.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zecf80a36tfctga20ib3v9itghhunhvgu94c1kh0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** It’s a mission I care deeply about because I was the target of the Fake News’ lies.Here’s the truth: Obama and Hillary didn’t have a lick of evidence when they cooked up this hoax. Here’s the _disturbing_ truth: they didn’t need any.They could make up whatever they wanted to and feed it to the mainstream media monster. That’s exactly what they did.Let me explain:
---
1. They planted fake evidence in the mainstream media.

2. The mainstream media ran them as if they were fact.

3. The mainstream media's coverage was cited as proof the fake evidence was real.

---
It was terrible circular logic built on a mountain of lies.**But it worked.** It worked because the liberal media drilled it into the minds of millions of Americans that President Trump was some kind of traitor.The whole time, these Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality. The Washington Post even won a Pulitzer Prize over it!The level to which the liberal media went to justify this insanity was insane itself.That’s why today I’m honored to partner with a group who’s fighting to stop another hoax like this from destroying our country.The American Media Council understands what’s really going on:**The power-hungry radicals in Washington who have weaponized our government have also weaponized the mainstream media.** Their mission is to restore truth in the media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They’re the reason I’m able to write you this. What I deeply respect about the American Media Council is that they aren’t sitting back and watching it happen. They’re on the frontlines trying to make a difference.
---
* They publish the facts behind top media hoaxes.
* They hold journalists accountable with their “Truth in Journalism” Pledge.
* They give out “Trustworthy Ratings” to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust.

---
But that’s not all.Thanks to the generous support of patriots like you, they have a **“First Amendment Fund”** to help conservatives overcome lawfare waged by the mainstream media. **[Today, will you consider filling their “First Amendment Fund” with a donation of $35 or more?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhp9u63kri5ht0dno258jnja208smnu1r6tq1khg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** A $35 donation would be a tremendous help. But if you feel called to make a monthly donation, say $15 or more, I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence.It’s so important to me that you support the American Media Council that I want to “Thank You” with a complimentary book.My friend, it’s hard to put into words just how impactful your support will be today...... but I’ll try.The Deep State wanted to destroy me.They tried to take away my career and financially bankrupt my family. I had to sell my house to pay the endless legal fees. It put my wife, Lori, through hell and back.That’s the Left’s goal.**Humiliation. Retaliation. Destruction.**Sadly, the damage to my reputation can’t be fixed in a courtroom or wiped from the internet.President Donald Trump pardoned me. My name has been officially cleared. But no matter where I go... certain people will always see me the way the liberal media painted me.That’s why the Left pushes these hoaxes. It’s all about inflicting **maximum punishment** on anybody who dares to stand up against their radical doctrine.Your support of the American Media Council and their **“First Amendment Fund”** today will directly help patriots like me clear their names and stand up against the liberal media’s lies.This is only possible with your support today. **[Will you support the American Media Council just like I do?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsqt4pkhitktdah22aincnurfua2lnh190hnbet0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** If you’re in a position to sign up for a monthly donation today – $15 or more – I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence as my sincere thanks.
---
Thank You and God Bless You
---
Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4aovhhnq9avqn8bgc4islj29j9lst9e4aa89clo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)
---

P.S. As my deepest thanks for supporting the American Media Council and their critical mission, I want to send you a complimentary copy of my new book, Pardon of Innocence. **[All it takes is your monthly gift of $15 or more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs6nar8lirathhun8o0vl7f99g80rm8st8ler1k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim4or2cdh2bs)** But in truth, any gift amount you can send today – whether $35 or some other amount – it will be a tremendous help. No matter the amount you can send today, I want you to know that I’m grateful there are still patriots like you out there who believe in the truth. As long as you’re still around, the Fake News liars will never win.
---
| | **American Media Council** PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

| Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znrs95ilcle6f5uf0q0u72psqmbug4o1e2nfr470_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpimcpb2cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl1fv91vu7m29vr2d4aqlj2ha37snqtj5tkcfkb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpimcpb2cjh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb9mm47e5u7jlvkt4in7u3671k1gshbu06o6mnh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpimcpb2cjh2bs)
---

---

---

**** Hello! This year and next, communities across the country will vote to fill over 100,000 open seats. In over half of these races, Republicans will win without facing an opponent. The result? Literally thousands of MAGA extremists wrecking our school boards, our town councils, our sheriff’s office, and more — simply because no one stood up to run against them. How do we stop this? body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsin75hicb8cfchnjeegbrkgiljikh6stfgcs9c0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim2ob2cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh99p4bcuig51ghs57rk9cg4fmfemh63talpbbeg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim2ob2cdh2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znhh5ief4thtm4supm4i6kovlb8e59muegjueafo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim2ob2cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2osm2ss2vdgsovnjejb3ilu12vchhrmg9isvui0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim2ob2cdh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqjko3k3qomj11dq1pg4a6pmn3ivl8rl9s7sp580_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim2ob2cdh2bs)

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziqdgprjuh2m25q16v6bu0amvu1m395lce26rv00_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim2ob2cdh2bs)

Thank you and God bless you,

# [Florida ends vaccine mandates. Make it promise to use its own money to pay for its inevitable next plague](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b8994fa-86cb-4576-a218-61ab1c6d93a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T159a583d-8b34-42e5-8328-932c90927a46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ee98328-dff6-4cc2-97b6-4a40c8a0aca9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[,](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5f5ade5-d135-422f-9d20-64749fb004a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) then forward this email to friends to help build support!)_ Florida, a lovely state that is unfortunately run by morons, announced that it will end vaccine mandates for children. This will allow measels, mumps, rubella, and utter misery to once again run wild throughout the state. Scientists and public health officials across that globe agree that the move is batshit insane, and will lead to disastrous outbreaks that will cost billions to contain. [**Make them promise NOW that when that happens, these jackasses will pay for it themselves. No federal disaster funds, no other help, nada.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18dc99e2-3a64-4e7a-9303-df48db711257/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Why should the rest of us be responsible for their own self-inflicted stupidity? They're already putting the rest of us at risk, why should we pay? Enough is enough. [**Add your name: "Make Florida promise to use its own money to pay for the inevitable next plague**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40358059-8b6c-4054-bcb1-3c56918bb057/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Our mission:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We’ll win this race together.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94169?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j)
Peter, our mission is clear: _Stand up for the American people who are being pushed aside in favor of billionaires and corporations._
Elected leaders need to stand for something more than a political party or personal power. Our people deserve nothing less than leaders who will do everything possible to make their lives better.
_That’s why I’m running for Senate._
**[This is the most competitive Senate election of 2026 — and The Hill is already calling it the #1 most likely to flip. Join me in taking on the GOP and split a donation between me and State Democrats Committee to our campaign here >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94169?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j)**
Look, politicians in Washington are not serving their constituents — the millions of Americans just trying to get by day in and day out. They’re serving Donald Trump and the billionaires he wants to befriend.
**I will take them on.**
I will speak up for the people and speak out when those in power do us harm. I will defend the rights Americans hold dear and the democracy that is at the very core of who we are.
I am deeply grateful for the thousands of supporters who have stepped up in the last few days. Your enthusiasm, courage, and commitment to our shared cause is inspiring. **You are the reason I believe that our best days are ahead of us, Peter — but only if we stop the damage that’s happening now.**
**[But we have a long road ahead to Election Day, and I still need dedicated supporters to chip in. Can I ask you to split a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94169?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j)**
If you have stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94170?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94170?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94170?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94170?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94170?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94170?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94169?refcode=em20250908-9390&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9390%2E614464%2EIb5G1j)

body:

| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K4MTC9GAC4T4K8BGRW1RPA5X_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, We are sharing a message from Malcolm Kenyatta on accountability, justice, and dignity. If these values matter to you, please read on and join with a small donation today. More soon, Andy DemsGive.org
---
|
---
| |
---
| Hey Peter, The MAGA crowd is squirming under the spotlight—desperate to distract from Trump’s deep ties to Jeffrey Epstein. Instead of answering for shady White House meetings and buried files, they’re pointing fingers and hawking conspiracy smokescreens. It’s the same playbook we saw on January 6: chaos, loyalists firing prosecutors, and corruption to protect their own. Now, they’re calling this distraction campaign a “legal insurrection” while stonewalling the release of the full Epstein files. It’s an assault on the truth—and on our democracy. From personal scandals to rigging systems against working families, Trump has always been a cheater. Democrats are fighting for transparency, but MAGA’s only mission is cover-ups. I’ve seen this firsthand in Pennsylvania—extremists dividing us while shielding the rich and powerful at all costs. I’m not backing down. I’m demanding accountability to expose the truth and end corruption. But it takes all of us fighting together. [**Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today—your contribution helps me fight to uncover Trump’s secrets before he buries them for good.**](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K4MTC9GAC4T4K8BGRW1RPA5X_1)

name: Team Guzman
subject: MAGA Extremists are trying to roll back our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | ,
Right now, Virginia MAGA Republicans are working overtime to roll back the progress we’ve made — on workers’ rights, on reproductive freedom, and on public education.
They want to end the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates in November’s elections – a crucial bellwether ahead of next year’s midterms.

As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
_This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $25 contribution would help us counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters.
[_**So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute that $25 (or even more!) right now so we raise the resources we need by next week's mid-month deadline? Every dollar adds up and allows us to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and other critical investments.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114832072/568296171/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTY4NTdiMjYtYzA4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HJsHMSnstwRxnqe-xl5ZdumaMNUr5MiUFyZgcG135is=)

And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history. This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds. Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win. Well, together, we pulled off the impossible. Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term. National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line. name: Mark Warner
subject: I'm livid. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I'll be honest, folks: I'm livid. And that's not a statement I make lightly.

The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who's associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism – and it's directly undermining our career intelligence professionals.

If you're as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate for Democrats – please join me and the DSCC with a contribution to our campaigns:

[**www.dscc.org/DSCCAndWarner2026/**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21368?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250908-MarkWarner-WarnerLoomerAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250908-MarkWarner-WarnerLoomerAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21169%2E9716520%2ESXIwQX)

Hear me out:

Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency's headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. **And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now.**

Conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit.

**I can't overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is.** This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists.

Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention-seekers.

**And for goodness sake – the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes.** It doesn't matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right.

I've never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress. **But I can't be in this fight alone:**

[**Join me and the DSCC with an emergency donation today to help us defeat Trump's Republican allies in the midterms and flip the Senate. Your donation will be split between my reelection campaign and the DSCC.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21368?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250908-MarkWarner-WarnerLoomerAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250908-MarkWarner-WarnerLoomerAttacksTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21169%2E9716520%2ESXIwQX)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Friends of Mark Warner and the DSCC.

| | When it comes to gear, only the strongest should make the cut.

That's why we're excited to introduce the [**Skull Crusher – the ultimate hand held sword** – the ultimate hand held sword](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21905/6374453/043469e4ba8b00d7f01d913f41a11256f62bdbb8/cc6349d4aeedb66ed2865202aa7dd06c43cd47be) designed for those who demand power, precision, and performance. Crafted for those who understand the value of reliability and strength, the Skull Crusher is more than just a tool – it’s your go-to companion for whatever life throws at you.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21905/6374453/93675c474e46aaad821c2aa5bb9e30e3c2f4e0a8/cc6349d4aeedb66ed2865202aa7dd06c43cd47be)

You don’t settle for mediocrity, and neither should your gear. With the Skull Crusher, you get a tool that’s just as rugged and reliable as you are. **Ready to take your gear to the next level?

name: Mike Nellis - Endless Urgency
subject: Here’s How Stupid Donald Trump and the Republicans Think We Are
body:
They think we're idiots.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..FeFM1MSabK1p9xAKYMKieGbc_hOQvsbrWYw4KSqMBiI?) for more
---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9lbmRsZXNzdXJnZW5jeS5jb20vcC9oZXJlcy1ob3ctc3R1cGlkLWRvbmFsZC10cnVtcC1hbmQ_.675SSPai9s0PqeGF6iP_w6myKCS6jSyEWpTLOU18_lc?)
---
# [Here's How Stupid Donald Trump and the Republicans Think We Are](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173098750&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMDk4NzUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTczNDM4NzcsImV4cCI6MTc1OTkzNTg3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8bcLAgyN_7yLbJ9N0XUugq03D_IPkjuTOEN4zB8ECk8)
### They think we're idiots.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Sep 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173098750&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMDk4NzUwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NzM0Mzg3NywiZXhwIjoxNzU5OTM1ODc3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KoF--0gxvH_bn5BvbtOKEQrKYr7mm_3xw4oCy1sgZfs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173098750&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMDk4NzUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTczNDM4NzcsImV4cCI6MTc1OTkzNTg3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8bcLAgyN_7yLbJ9N0XUugq03D_IPkjuTOEN4zB8ECk8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173098750&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMDk4NzUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTczNDM4NzcsImV4cCI6MTc1OTkzNTg3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8bcLAgyN_7yLbJ9N0XUugq03D_IPkjuTOEN4zB8ECk8)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvZW5kbGVzc3VyZ2VuY3kvcC9oZXJlcy1ob3ctc3R1cGlkLWRvbmFsZC10cnVtcC1hbmQ_.XYoVPPmY8Yptp6ABBP415-5iA8tnPNKb04EHEwVsdkA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/heres-how-stupid-donald-trump-and?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Let's take a minute to talk about how stupid Donald Trump and the Republican Party think the American people are. It's honestly insulting.
Here's what set me off: just a few days ago, in the middle of the Trump administration's ongoing Epstein cover-up, Republican Speaker of the House Mike Johnson straight-up claimed--without a shred of evidence--that Donald Trump was an FBI informant trying to bring down Jeffrey Epstein.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/4073eac1-2ef1-4b38-8163-a4ddc66b404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/4073eac1-2ef1-4b38-8163-a4ddc66b404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let me repeat that: Trump. An FBI informant. On Epstein.
It might be the dumbest political lie I've ever heard--and that's saying a lot, considering the last decade of straight-up lunacy.
It makes zero sense. If there were even a flicker of truth to that, Trump would've screamed it from the rooftops. The man's pathologically incapable of keeping anything to himself. It's one of his biggest flaws: a complete inability to shut the fuck up.
But that's how dumb Republicans like Mike Johnson think we are--that he can just spit out something that laughably false, and a decent chunk of people will buy it without question.
The good news? He got absolutely roasted for it. Liberals, conservatives, comedians, the media--hell, even people in his own party--dragged him so hard he had to walk it back. He admitted yesterday he had no idea what he was talking about. That kind of public shaming is exactly what we need more of, because it proves people can be pulled back from the brink if we push back together.
But let's not pretend this is just about Epstein. It's the same playbook when it comes to the economy.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/4073eac1-2ef1-4b38-8163-a4ddc66b404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/4073eac1-2ef1-4b38-8163-a4ddc66b404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I was on NewsNation yesterday morning and got asked about where things stand on the economy. I pointed out--like I always do--that Trump promised to lower grocery prices on day one. And yet, here we are: everything is way more expensive because of the tariffs and his immigration policies. That's not just a vibe--it's in the data. Inflation is accelerating, not easing. Production costs are climbing. And that means prices are about to get worse, not better.
The Republican talking head I was debating looked at me like I'd lost my mind. Because these people live in a conservative media bubble--Fox News, Twitter echo chambers, right-wing blogs. Just saying something that's obviously true to most Americans sounds like a foreign language to them. My guess? That guy hasn't looked at his own grocery bill in years.
The reality is things are more expensive. It's harder to feed your family, retire with dignity, buy a home, or take a damn vacation. And yet Trump's out here claiming he "defeated inflation." That it doesn't exist. That everything is cheaper. That the economy is booming.
It's not.
As a Democratic strategist, I get that rattling off stats doesn't always move the needle. We made that mistake last cycle--telling people the economy was strong when it didn't feel strong. We didn't meet people where they were. We didn't show empathy. We didn't deliver direct relief. And voters punished us for it.
Now Republicans are making the same mistake--except they're not just downplaying the problem, they're flat-out pretending it doesn't exist. They're doing a full-on "there is no war in Ba Sing Se."
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/4073eac1-2ef1-4b38-8163-a4ddc66b404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/4073eac1-2ef1-4b38-8163-a4ddc66b404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Same play on crime, too. GOP leaders love to paint Democratic cities as hellholes, even though you're more likely to be murdered in red states like Alabama than in places like California or Illinois. Sure, crime is often about perception and Democratic cities like Chicago need to do better--but Republicans usually lean into feelings better than we do. Not this time. On the economy, they're getting smoked.
That's why Trump's approval is stuck in the high 30s. That's why Democrats are performing well in the generic ballot. Don't trust the polls? Just look at Republican behavior--gerrymandering in Texas and Missouri, Trump trying to ban mail-in voting. They know they can't win a fair fight right now.
And to be clear, the Democratic Party is a mess in plenty of ways. It needs serious fixing--something a lot of us are working on every day. But we've still got better candidates, better communicators, and a clearer message, while Republicans spiral further into denial.
Back to the original point: they think we're idiots. They think we'll believe Trump was an FBI informant instead of being neck-deep in Epstein's circle. They think we'll buy the myth that red states are safer, or that people are thriving in this economy when they can't afford rent, groceries, or gas. They think young people won't notice they're graduating into one of the worst job markets since COVID--or even the Great Recession.
But they're wrong. They can't gaslight us forever.
This is their economy. These are their immigration raids. This is their cover-up of Epstein's files. And people are paying attention. They want affordable groceries, safe communities, a belief that they can buy a home and one day retire, and a fair shot at building a life of their own. Not MAGA fantasyland.
This GOP gaslighting isn't confidence--it's desperation. And the more we speak up--loudly, clearly, and unapologetically--with strong voices like James Talarico, Mallory McMorrow, Paige Cognetti, and others--the more we remind them:
The American people aren't nearly as stupid as Donald Trump, Mike Johnson, or the Republican Party seem to think we are.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/4073eac1-2ef1-4b38-8163-a4ddc66b404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

name: AMAC Action
subject: Correcting the Narrative on Transgender Radicalism
body:
This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights.

| |
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgkinquf46tqtqmq9ildhak5odd5p05ss035ebb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1o32cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd41pupb2likd359hku7tptp49md5i26qvshmq0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1o32cth2bs)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.** But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have 'banned access' to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings?_ __Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker rooms”?_**_Or_****...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** _Or..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**_Or..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.**** ** **[And that’s why I need your immediate response: Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2cp07jet8bg3ifr61v989l27tlvipdtf3kajib0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1o32cth2bs)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5see1rfmt3mpirnpvddpd8dknst3qr5vr5ukud0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1o32cth2bs)
---
**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp8ihvu86jj42hs320mtm8ekv5r05334cfbjccj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1o32cth2bs)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it... The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. >From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere. _**They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough.**AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female......he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders. During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse.We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. **[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z937703e57k3p3ifupej6lk4q4gnr9fdo5ne7fr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1o32cth2bs)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5ku5j3sb4lvbi6e61rs4sqb7kuqmoiad82nl4do_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1o32cth2bs)
---

clean_body: This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists. But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have 'banned access' to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker rooms”?Or**...Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?Or...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it... The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. >From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough.AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female......he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders. During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse.We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight. To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=090825_1&amount=25]
Team,
We've told you that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate.
The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot.
While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely.
The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic.
We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=090825_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=090825_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=090825_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=090825_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=090825_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=090825_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=090825_1&amount=35]
The problem is not only that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike.
These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to resist $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=090825_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090825_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090825_1&amount=20]
