---
| |
---
| Greater Georgia Newsletter September 2025
---
| As election season heats up, Greater Georgia is on the move registering new voters, engaging neighbors across the state, and safeguarding fair, secure elections rooted in Georgia's values.
Here's what we're working on as we head into the final stretch before this November's General Election.
---
| |
---
|
## Psst... We've been keeping a secret!
---
The word is out -- Greater Georgia has launched our [largest voter registration drive](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IbFit6jSAWbRQCnLDZraTRUN_LYFfYHT0JJFuxDbWdWsuf16WUAp5dY9MqFeiYIQj-nrn5iRFGAmLA3y72kwwWlp_TqnfewcyKOqp-6v_DG7Eewx_merRn2fNMVCT_KYp4qRiKdsHg54EsjstiO7PXBWOYqqm-66ljXQFewKkjAKEHqlTNHLFV0DQ3rtbC4c6aBW4v3AiSfZLCrZoq0WlYkjd_sMux_dyNtP-kFCH3fDOXmIleEGIw==&c=PXrRhvQWn60yYTao25KMjSb-cAVYw46jkPK9NRPxYfJ7GsdIWToaNA==&ch=ilj3n0H-WP4hfxtiiI6hG58YZKGtfDKxxF9vORfYXih64sL15iT9pQ==) yet!
We are making sure every eligible Georgian who shares our values has the opportunity to vote this November and in the critical 2026 midterms.
We'll be in mailboxes, on cell phones, at rodeos, and grocery store parking lots... and we will need YOUR help to make sure more than 120,000 Georgians who share our core beliefs get registered in time to vote.
---
|
---
Use the link below to sign up to receive details about upcoming Greater Georgia volunteer opportunities, or contact Dylan Blitz at dylan@greatergeorgia.com.
---
| [HELP US REGISTER VOTERS](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IbFit6jSAWbRQCnLDZraTRUN_LYFfYHT0JJFuxDbWdWsuf16WUAp5Z_rM604ym5afPhptWUJpNriIiNJ6EwjrACHJRJpshcbMhL-fR8C7WUHEWrEdeFIgVImJ4cu82yRDHv6ii3KGh9yk4BLcPnbqJvrtCzMMZqHkBtFkrRfprI=&c=PXrRhvQWn60yYTao25KMjSb-cAVYw46jkPK9NRPxYfJ7GsdIWToaNA==&ch=ilj3n0H-WP4hfxtiiI6hG58YZKGtfDKxxF9vORfYXih64sL15iT9pQ==)
---
|
---
## Hitting the Road: South Georgia Swing
---
Last week, our team traveled to Valdosta to join Senator Russ Goodman and Representative John LaHood as part of our statewide education tour to highlight state resources made available by the State Legislature.
---
|
---
|
---
We also stopped in Moultrie, GA for the South Region FFA Rally.
Volunteers shared with more than 300 students the ways that conservative governance has delivered training, support, relief, and opportunities for Georgia's thriving agriculture industry -- and 19 students registered to vote!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
## Election Reminders
---
No candidate secured over 50% in the State Senate District 21 special election, triggering a runoff scheduled for September 23, 2025.
Democrat Debra Shigley now faces Republican Jason Dickerson.
There is also a statewide election for PSC, county referendums, and municipal elections on the November 4, 2025 ballot.
Check out this new feature to add the November election on your calendar so you don't miss out! ⬇️
---
| [ADD TO YOUR CALENDAR](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IbFit6jSAWbRQCnLDZraTRUN_LYFfYHT0JJFuxDbWdWsuf16WUAp5dY9MqFeiYIQihGM_Ak6dye4ZZIyFlbxf3XJsy3wz0j_rKyouJPY1IUFOBOrFOjbFztUd8JC14iE9R0UkATz7RYhXnMppI6W1j2RRnjmRNybUXE4APHkkDo=&c=PXrRhvQWn60yYTao25KMjSb-cAVYw46jkPK9NRPxYfJ7GsdIWToaNA==&ch=ilj3n0H-WP4hfxtiiI6hG58YZKGtfDKxxF9vORfYXih64sL15iT9pQ==)
---
|
---
|
## Help Welcome our Fall Interns
---
| |
---
| We're excited to welcome our fall 2025 interns! These bright and driven young leaders are already making an impact, helping with outreach, research, and communications. They represent the future of Georgia leadership, and we're thrilled to have them on board.
---
| |
---
| In the News
---
| [AJC:](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IbFit6jSAWbRQCnLDZraTRUN_LYFfYHT0JJFuxDbWdWsuf16WUAp5dY9MqFeiYIQSgF5AdZonf1ZiQDNMHe_OYolzObfRGizmcoFuaEFRR9-pj0VPeTazA94rCzS8gbPdFnvJiJInJJKZJVNFMbVLH6NwdhH_xWnb6rWmKOtiCIzIPa-vb0TXToEHE6CdC2_7m-49qAuonY87PE2dSscDXZrIuQG4SvIlNhXCPexMx79xq6O2rYCiOwOF0T3TckWbHfLsGFRIPo=&c=PXrRhvQWn60yYTao25KMjSb-cAVYw46jkPK9NRPxYfJ7GsdIWToaNA==&ch=ilj3n0H-WP4hfxtiiI6hG58YZKGtfDKxxF9vORfYXih64sL15iT9pQ==) Nearly 478,000 inactive voter registrations are being canceled in Georgia, a move Greater Georgia's Terry Fye says is common sense for protecting election integrity.
[AP:](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IbFit6jSAWbRQCnLDZraTRUN_LYFfYHT0JJFuxDbWdWsuf16WUAp5dY9MqFeiYIQQE6TwCfGRNA-n_vpDQenX-jB7C7miz32IyxMTadCNb8NQD_NFogPkOZVg9BlWIwWlL7QI3SwM2muUIsAsWn90PbRZxizzyb1JQy9BC7Qgjo8OvMOUriZp_1Z0Tnd03s6INh4g-97MmGlo1hn4vUzgLJRiBCBR4_nSoYYf9yQ-R1skAFMaNddCUYQkkqOd9Vv&c=PXrRhvQWn60yYTao25KMjSb-cAVYw46jkPK9NRPxYfJ7GsdIWToaNA==&ch=ilj3n0H-WP4hfxtiiI6hG58YZKGtfDKxxF9vORfYXih64sL15iT9pQ==) Fulton County is being fined $10,000 a day until it appoints Republican nominees to its election board as required by law.

clean_body: Election Season Loading... | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter September 2025 | As election season heats up, Greater Georgia is on the move registering new voters, engaging neighbors across the state, and safeguarding fair, secure elections rooted in Georgia's values. Here's what we're working on as we head into the final stretch before this November's General Election. | | | Psst... We've been keeping a secret! The word is out -- Greater Georgia has launched our == yet! We are making sure every eligible Georgian who shares our values has the opportunity to vote this November and in the critical 2026 midterms. We'll be in mailboxes, on cell phones, at rodeos, and grocery store parking lots... and we will need YOUR help to make sure more than 120,000 Georgians who share our core beliefs get registered in time to vote. | Use the link below to sign up to receive details about upcoming Greater Georgia volunteer opportunities, or contact Dylan Blitz at dylan@greatergeorgia.com. | == | Hitting the Road: South Georgia Swing Last week, our team traveled to Valdosta to join Senator Russ Goodman and Representative John LaHood as part of our statewide education tour to highlight state resources made available by the State Legislature. | | We also stopped in Moultrie, GA for the South Region FFA Rally. Volunteers shared with more than 300 students the ways that conservative governance has delivered training, support, relief, and opportunities for Georgia's thriving agriculture industry -- and 19 students registered to vote! | | | Election Reminders No candidate secured over 50% in the State Senate District 21 special election, triggering a runoff scheduled for September 23, 2025. Democrat Debra Shigley now faces Republican Jason Dickerson. There is also a statewide election for PSC, county referendums, and municipal elections on the November 4, 2025 ballot. Check out this new feature to add the November election on your calendar so you don't miss out! ⬇️ | == | | Help Welcome our Fall Interns | | | We're excited to welcome our fall 2025 interns! These bright and driven young leaders are already making an impact, helping with outreach, research, and communications. They represent the future of Georgia leadership, and we're thrilled to have them on board. | | | In the News | == Nearly 478,000 inactive voter registrations are being canceled in Georgia, a move Greater Georgia's Terry Fye says is common sense for protecting election integrity. == Fulton County is being fined $10,000 a day until it appoints Republican nominees to its election board as required by law. == Speaker Burns pledges support for Georgians impacted by paper mill closures. | | | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | == == == | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988 | Atlanta, GA 30355 US | |

Peter,
Standing up for our democracy has never been more important. As Minnesota’s Attorney General, I’ve gone to court again and again to hold Donald Trump and his allies accountable — and I’m not backing down now.
The good news is, you have a powerful tool to join this fight: Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program.
Here’s how it works: Just donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign today, then return the form you receive in the mail. In a few weeks, you’ll get every dollar back.
When you chip in, you’re not just making a refundable donation — you’re helping prove that Minnesotans are ready to stand together against Trump’s cruel agenda and keep building a people-powered movement that puts working families first.
[**Will you make a refundable $75 contribution to help us build momentum today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114838591/568314611/1043099821?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjc5MTk3My1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AI-ukxwBmUPus5X7MvvTOsLnXSFngpEAiBfaObjGuaQ=)

name: Nancy Northup
subject: The next big fight is here
body:
Attacks on abortion pills = attacks on our health | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114838746/568315131/2141984067?sourceid=1150874&utm_campaign=26emama-0901aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY1OTNiOC1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFYzUGc8Ju_v6eiWwRAjolVumvWNw5xTV7Ry78Jy_Jg=&emci=6c3879c8-4988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=db6593b8-c68c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114838748/568315132/2141984067?sourceid=1150874&utm_campaign=26emama-0901aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY1OTNiOC1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFYzUGc8Ju_v6eiWwRAjolVumvWNw5xTV7Ry78Jy_Jg=&emci=6c3879c8-4988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=db6593b8-c68c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter—

[**The next major attack on abortion access is already here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114838750/568315134/1824768205?sourceid=1150874&utm_campaign=26emama-0901aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY1OTNiOC1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFYzUGc8Ju_v6eiWwRAjolVumvWNw5xTV7Ry78Jy_Jg=&emci=6c3879c8-4988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=db6593b8-c68c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Abortion pills like Mifepristone are essential to safe, accessible abortion care—used in more than 60% of abortions nationwide. [**That's exactly why anti-rights politicians are targeting them.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114838751/568315136/1824768205?sourceid=1150874&utm_campaign=26emama-0901aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY1OTNiOC1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFYzUGc8Ju_v6eiWwRAjolVumvWNw5xTV7Ry78Jy_Jg=&emci=6c3879c8-4988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=db6593b8-c68c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Restricting medication abortion hits people who are already struggling to make ends meet the hardest. It means care depends on owning a car, living in the "right" zip code, or having enough money to travel. That's not freedom. That's injustice.

[**Every person deserves safe, accessible abortion care.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114838754/568315137/1824768205?sourceid=1150874&utm_campaign=26emama-0901aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY1OTNiOC1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFYzUGc8Ju_v6eiWwRAjolVumvWNw5xTV7Ry78Jy_Jg=&emci=6c3879c8-4988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=db6593b8-c68c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) **Full stop.**

With a blatantly anti-abortion administration in power and a Supreme Court that has failed time and again to protect our rights, [**it is up to each of us to defend our rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114838755/568315138/1824768205?sourceid=1150874&utm_campaign=26emama-0901aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY1OTNiOC1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFYzUGc8Ju_v6eiWwRAjolVumvWNw5xTV7Ry78Jy_Jg=&emci=6c3879c8-4988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=db6593b8-c68c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

The good news? _We are not powerless._

The Center for Reproductive Rights will continue standing up for our rights in courtrooms across the country. [**We are proud to have you by our side in this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114838756/568315139/1824768205?sourceid=1150874&utm_campaign=26emama-0901aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjY1OTNiOC1jNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FFYzUGc8Ju_v6eiWwRAjolVumvWNw5xTV7Ry78Jy_Jg=&emci=6c3879c8-4988-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=db6593b8-c68c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

In solidarity,

Nancy Northup

clean_body: Attacks on abortion pills = attacks on our health | | | ---|--- Peter— Abortion pills like Mifepristone are essential to safe, accessible abortion care—used in more than 60% of abortions nationwide. Restricting medication abortion hits people who are already struggling to make ends meet the hardest. It means care depends on owning a car, living in the "right" zip code, or having enough money to travel. That's not freedom. That's injustice. Full stop. With a blatantly anti-abortion administration in power and a Supreme Court that has failed time and again to protect our rights, The good news? We are not powerless. The Center for Reproductive Rights will continue standing up for our rights in courtrooms across the country. In solidarity, Nancy Northup President & CEO | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Thomas Massie
subject: I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcdqqruopvvopmmcji67fcllb0c3ga4q27vjcvh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z59m38sglfp16j8egbsnok245fl0kgcoti5vhh9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z71h718mkr19v5if3379cq6g04mcc3elsdg8jo08_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8do275g093advrge9np8gskp21nt7rf8r226ud0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
---

name: AMAC Action
subject: Correcting the Narrative on Transgender Radicalism
body:
This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights.

| |
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvim21i99lm6pii568ampo604bciocipimod4e1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zto6mtdi1s20u9ohb7pacf13cup4tf7dh505hku0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.** But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have 'banned access' to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings?_ __Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker rooms”?_**_Or_****...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** _Or..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**_Or..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.**** ** **[And that’s why I need your immediate response: Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkf8i3o779j4b83aai654rapa8p8v7jta83osrl0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgrtfa0mc5kh59cgqa5rto14tujq6k1ake237am8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---
**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo6fv7slgnugk1kvnt55vk8hvuhs40ce40hjokro_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it... The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. >From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere. _**They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough.**AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female......he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders. During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse.We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. **[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0tnoc05unvln68hama14l189846pik5t8fbgiug_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbaf3v6h2qsqv8de6snavvgohls3gajjo3hko5h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---
Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight. **To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, [we need your answers to the AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z34u11a23l1647krf8tcgfrs21eldpe3r3bf4qfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)**Thank you in advance for your help.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0gd4spkrap57llh1h52gldusar80b9cbp8j57a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---
| | [ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkiuc0s6lhhoqev19bvh2mesl7ti99ak4hhp1gro_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze08h434fmprvuov5iuqmb9ek1h175vocejppic0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---
_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4llo9d42lothtk14q01bjiasesqjt2eut6ej7bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zohqpdjujpi5hrtukeha0kffag7r5m3baa946c38_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cpim1p74c9h2bs)
---

The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

clean_body: This is not normal. This is dangerous. | | Friends, Donald Trump just crossed a line we haven't seen in over a century and a half. On Truth Social, he posted a meme inspired by Apocalypse Now -- helicopters flying over Chicago, explosions in the background. | This isn 't some edgy joke. It's a wannabe dictator threatening military-style action against American citizens. Do you know the last time something like this happened? The Civil War in the 1860s. That's how far gone Trump is -- and how dangerous this moment has become. No Dem Left Behind was built for moments like this. We don 't sit back when democracy is under threat -- we go straight to the places MAGA thinks they've locked down. We support Democrats running in the hard fights, where most of the political establishment won't even show up. Trump wants a nation at war with itself. Let's remind him -- we're still fighting for each other. -- No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. body:
Peddling anti-science views and pushing out the public health officials who keep us safe is nothing but a recipe for disaster

| **_POLITICO: RFK Jr. says CDC director’s firing is just a start_** **URGENT:[Sign our petition to keep the CDC focused on science, _not politics_ →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114840974/568322013/-496121814?refcode=email_090825_cdc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFhNzdlMi1jYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkyig9gWV8QikB7-LqIL0trVVl2Uqr5qPvQEy_whrM0=&emci=f17a1508-ab8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2aaa77e2-cb8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114840975/568322014/-496121814?refcode=email_090825_cdc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFhNzdlMi1jYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkyig9gWV8QikB7-LqIL0trVVl2Uqr5qPvQEy_whrM0=&emci=f17a1508-ab8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2aaa77e2-cb8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)
---
**FIRST:** HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. replaced an entire panel of vaccine experts at the CDC with anti-science allies.
**THEN:** RFK Jr. directed the FDA to alter its vaccine policies, vastly narrowing eligibility for this year’s COVID-19 vaccines — potentially putting MILLIONS of Americans at increased risk.
**NOW:** **He is forcing out top CDC officials as he continues to mold America’s public health policies to fit his conspiracy theory-shaped worldview.**
At every turn, RFK Jr. and this administration continue to put politics over public health. **It’s not just shameful — it’s putting American lives in direct danger.**
Peddling anti-science views and pushing out the public health officials who keep us safe is nothing but a recipe for disaster. **[So we’re calling on this grassroots team to help us sound the alarm and pressure the administration to reverse course before it’s too late. Can you add your name to our petition and amplify our message?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114840976/568322015/-496121814?refcode=email_090825_cdc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWFhNzdlMi1jYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jkyig9gWV8QikB7-LqIL0trVVl2Uqr5qPvQEy_whrM0=&emci=f17a1508-ab8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2aaa77e2-cb8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: They want revenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
We just made history, and now is not the time to let up

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-Ww)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, **I need to ask you something that might feel small -- but matters a lot.** Will you chip in **just $1** today to help us stop the Democrats from taking the Senate? You may not have donated in a while. I get it. But if you ever believed in what we've done together -- the tax cuts, the conservative judges, the border wall -- **I 'm asking you to come off the sidelines for just one dollar**. Because just a couple weeks ago, while you were going about your life, the Senate passed President Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill" and it was signed into law just days later. We pulled an all-nighter to get it done. Why? Because it **locks in permanent tax relief** , **imposes work requirements for welfare** , and **invests over $170 BILLION into border security** , including:
* $46.5 billion for the wall

* $45 billion to expand detention facilities

* $29.9 billion to hire 10,000 new ICE agents

This is real progress -- the kind we dreamed about just a few years ago. But now the Democrats smell blood. They're outraising us, outspending us, and targeting _our_ Senate seats -- even in red states. **They want revenge.** If we lose this next election, everything we just won could vanish. They'll tear it all down. That's why I'm writing you -- not for $10, not for $100 -- **just for $1**. Not because $1 will flip the Senate, but because **it 's a signal that you haven't given up.** **👉[Chip in $1 Now >>](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** Your name on our donor list tells me we're not alone -- that this still matters to you. When Republicans see 10,000 patriots step up with just one dollar, it tells our entire movement: **we 're still in this fight.** You stood with us once. I hope you'll stand with us again -- even if it's just for $1. **For America,**
**Ted Cruz**
---
[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---

Houston, TX 77265

name: Steve Daines
subject: What are we waiting for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Paid Democrat activists are already flocking to our cities. Leftist propaganda and disinformation are spreading at an alarming rate online. | Fellow American, I need to be blunt.

Our fundraising for the month of September is off to a slow start, severely hindering our ability to reach voters and counter the spread of the Left’s disinformation campaign.

That’s why I’m forced to ask, _**what are we waiting for?**_

Paid Democrat activists are already flocking to our cities. Leftist propaganda and disinformation are spreading at an alarming rate online. All of it bankrolled by a small army of ultra-liberal megadonors bent on ending our Senate Majority and undoing all of President Trump’s achievements.

We don’t have the luxury to wait around until 2026, because the Democrats sure aren’t.

We need to be running at full speed right now, and we can’t do that if our fundraising numbers continue to lag behind. Because I guarantee you, Democrats aren’t having the same problems.

clean_body: Paid Democrat activists are already flocking to our cities. Leftist propaganda and disinformation are spreading at an alarming rate online. | Fellow American, I need to be blunt. Our fundraising for the month of September is off to a slow start, severely hindering our ability to reach voters and counter the spread of the Left’s disinformation campaign. That’s why I’m forced to ask, what are we waiting for? Paid Democrat activists are already flocking to our cities. Leftist propaganda and disinformation are spreading at an alarming rate online. All of it bankrolled by a small army of ultra-liberal megadonors bent on ending our Senate Majority and undoing all of President Trump’s achievements. We don’t have the luxury to wait around until 2026, because the Democrats sure aren’t. We need to be running at full speed right now, and we can’t do that if our fundraising numbers continue to lag behind. Because I guarantee you, Democrats aren’t having the same problems. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

body:
Sherrod Brown is the leader we need to fight for workers in Ohio and across the country.
$10, Peter.
**That’s how much Sherrod Brown and Heartland Patriots are asking folks like you to donate to help flip Ohio’s Senate seat.**
$10 because Sherrod just announced that he’s running again – giving us the leader we need to win in Ohio!
$10 because as you read this, corporate special interests are planning to do and spend whatever it takes to crush his momentum.
$10 because Sherrod’s closing in on a midnight deadline but still falling short of the $500,000 he needs to give this campaign the strongest start possible.
We know $10 might seem small in the face of millions in GOP spending. But this is a grassroots movement, and when folks chip in $10 or even $25 at a time, it adds up quickly.
**Sherrod Brown is the champion we need to fight for workers in Ohio and across the country.[So please, Peter: Contribute $10 or more, split between Sherrod’s campaign and Heartland Patriots, right away. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Trump is undoing protections for millions of acres of wild forestland
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Look at this headline:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114842417/568326684/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGVjYTVlMS1jYzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xlpYfOf3pqY-DfJxxtc9MaSLhj7k6B2B8Ny7JXZZBOc=) My team just sent me this article, and I can’t believe this. **Look at this headline:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114842421/568326687/765895058?refcode=email_090825_wildforests&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGVjYTVlMS1jYzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xlpYfOf3pqY-DfJxxtc9MaSLhj7k6B2B8Ny7JXZZBOc=&emci=e5d79792-788a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=00eca5e1-cc8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5643047) **The Trump administration is plotting to immediately rescind the 2001 Roadless Rule, which protects almost 60 million acres of American forests, preventing road construction and development that would damage the untouched forestland.** This is an incredibly shortsighted and backwards decision. Ending protections for America’s wild forestlands would harm our recreation & tourism industry, place an even bigger burden on the underfunded and understaffed U.S. Forest Service, and — _contrary to the administration’s stated goals_ — actually increase the risk of wildfires in Oregon and across the country. Look, I introduced the _Roadless Area Conservation Act_ earlier this year to enshrine these protections into law, because this policy is simply too critical to leave up to the whims of Donald Trump and his corrupt administration. **It’s clear that we cannot trust the Trump administration with the responsible stewardship of America’s national forests.**** [So I’m turning to this grassroots team to amplify our message. Please, before it’s too late, sign onto our petition to protect America’s wild forestland →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114842424/568326691/765895058?refcode=email_090825_wildforests&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGVjYTVlMS1jYzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xlpYfOf3pqY-DfJxxtc9MaSLhj7k6B2B8Ny7JXZZBOc=&emci=e5d79792-788a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=00eca5e1-cc8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5643047)** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114842426/568326695/765895058?refcode=email_090825_wildforests&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGVjYTVlMS1jYzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xlpYfOf3pqY-DfJxxtc9MaSLhj7k6B2B8Ny7JXZZBOc=&emci=e5d79792-788a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=00eca5e1-cc8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=5643047)**

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Masked ICE agents are terrorizing communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, As someone who has spent my career fighting corruption and abuse of power, I am deeply alarmed by the rise of secret police tactics being used by ICE agents for civil immigration enforcement around the country. **Masked federal agents abducting people off the street or from the inside of courtrooms is not only terrifying and contrary to democracy – it is simply un-American. ** That is why I introduced the **_No Secret Police Act_** — a crucial step to ensure transparency, accountability, and fairness in immigration enforcement. The bill requires all DHS and ICE agents to clearly display their official identification and badges during civil immigration enforcement operations. It also mandates public reporting of arrests so that the American people can be certain that our immigration officials are following the law. The current secretive practices of this administration undermine trust, sow fear in communities, and put vulnerable Americans at risk. Today, I’m asking you to stand with me in demanding an end to rogue operations, making it clear that no federal agency is above the law. **[Add your name today as a citizen co-sponsor of the _No Secret Police Act_ and join the fight to protect our democratic values. Together, we can hold federal agents accountable and restore trust between law enforcement and the communities they serve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114843642/568331890/299614332?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA5NDQ2ZS1jZThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8Wro_ze_qOOY8Nss8VrdDVgCkyat56s6JqMRvG43hE=&emci=b62fc400-ba8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=c409446e-ce8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114843643/568331901/299614332?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDA5NDQ2ZS1jZThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8Wro_ze_qOOY8Nss8VrdDVgCkyat56s6JqMRvG43hE=&emci=b62fc400-ba8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=c409446e-ce8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13556823)

Dan

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: No one is above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hey Peter,
Even those sworn to uphold the law must answer to it.
That’s why Rep. Jasmine Crockett and I introduced the CLEAR ID Act —to make sure immigration enforcement officers can’t hide behind masks or deceptive tactics.
Our tax dollars shouldn’t fund operations in which officers conceal their identities. If they’re entering our communities, they should do so face-to-face, openly, and transparently. They need to identify themselves verbally and visibly, so people understand what’s going on, so they can cooperate, so they can seek recourse if someone abuses their power.
Too often, we hear of people in street clothes, unmarked vehicles, and masks grabbing people off the street or at their school, hospital, or place of work and denying them their rights.
If our neighbors and loved ones have to show or prove their IDs, so should these officers. If our medical and tax records can be used to track Trump’s targets, those carrying out his orders need to identify themselves, too.
And now, criminals are impersonating these officers to rob and attack people.
The CLEAR ID Act protects everyone: it safeguards communities, strengthens public trust, and helps officers by making it harder for impostors to operate.
This is about accountability, transparency, and safety—plain and simple. If that’s how you think the United States of America should operate, rush $5 or $10 today to help us take back the House and demand accountability. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250908_clearid_actrs&amount=10]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250908_clearid_actrs]
Undaunted,
Maxine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250908_clearid_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250908_clearid_actrs] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .

They need to identify themselves verbally and visibly, so people understand what’s going on, so they can cooperate, so they can seek recourse if someone abuses their power. Too often, we hear of people in street clothes, unmarked vehicles, and masks grabbing people off the street or at their school, hospital, or place of work and denying them their rights. If our neighbors and loved ones have to show or prove their IDs, so should these officers. If our medical and tax records can be used to track Trump’s targets, those carrying out his orders need to identify themselves, too. And now, criminals are impersonating these officers to rob and attack people. The CLEAR ID Act protects everyone: it safeguards communities, strengthens public trust, and helps officers by making it harder for impostors to operate. This is about accountability, transparency, and safety—plain and simple. If that’s how you think the United States of America should operate, rush $5 or $10 today to help us take back the House and demand accountability. [] DONATE TODAY [] Undaunted, Maxine [] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients. Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare. To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [] . DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] [] Maxine Dexter for Oregon PO Box 12209 Portland, OR 97212 United States Paid for by Maxine for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The moment in the Oval Office that vindicated me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
After everything, the TRUTH will set me free – I truly believe it!
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1355903/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdENmOWtKQnJNMw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDg/LbmNsZ2tCU1FtbA/qP2hpZHM9bmNwTEJTZ1pwc1F6TkVscw/gaL8CqQ/set160d1a56)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Volunteer AFG
subject: Help Us Elect Toni Atkins!
body:
Hello supporter,

We have several volunteer opportunities this week for you to help elect
Toni Atkins as California's next Governor. Some people might think, "the
election's months away," but we win by starting early! If we want Toni's
vision for California to become a reality,* it's going to take all of us* -
starting right now.

Sign up for an event with us below:
[image: Science Google Form Header (3).png]

*Coffee & Calls for Toni *

We are hosting Coffee & Calls for Toni
<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfwrFMSXvQFi6-6274ZdK--QCUYK2RGdHkuzbixZuAWlgWBjw/viewform?usp=header>
every Sunday at our SD HQ.

What: Enjoy fresh coffee, connect with fellow supporters, and help us
reach voters for Toni!

When: Every Sunday from 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM

Where: Mission Hills, San Diego

Click here
<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfwrFMSXvQFi6-6274ZdK--QCUYK2RGdHkuzbixZuAWlgWBjw/viewform?usp=header>to
register for a Sunday that works best for you today!

[image: Science Google Form Header (2).png]

*Join us at a virtual phone bank for Toni!*

What: Phone voters in San Diego County to help us build our support and
volunteer base

When: Tuesday 9/16
<https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/5GKxAQxMQUylD87I4fkqgA> and Thursday
9/18 <https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/x1-6dfB1QZqaMKXIIdX10Q>

Where: Hosted on Zoom

We hope to see you at an event soon! If you would like to stay in the loop
on all volunteer opportunities, you can join us on Outreach Circle.
<https://outreachcircle.com/KLV849>

Thanks for your continued support,

Team Toni

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Something powerful happened:
body:
---
Derek, In the last few weeks, we’ve sent several messages focused on Trump and his allies’ attempts to dismantle our democracy — by redrawing congressional maps, threatening to attack voting by mail, and even sending the National Guard into cities like Washington, D.C., as a means of consolidating power. We’ll be honest: We did not know how Democrats would respond to messages like these — especially after such a draining reality of living under the Trump administration. But after we sent those initial messages, something powerful happened: Teri from Utah chipped in $5. A few minutes later, Suzanne from Texas contributed $10. Then, Carlos from New Jersey pitched in $15. And suddenly, we had a whole movement of people committed to fighting back against Trump’s authoritarianism. With the stakes so high, we need to keep building momentum. With your donation today, we’ll send a powerful message to Trump and his allies: Democrats aren’t giving up. We’re standing together, we’re fighting back, we’re organizing, and ultimately, we’ll flip Congress and prevent another two years of chaos and destruction. **[We’re building a movement rooted in community, and you’re an instrumental part of that effort. So today, we’re asking you to join Democrats like Teri, Suzanne, and Carlos by making your first contribution to the Democratic National Committee:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250908_4548_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4548_22930333_4P-P8C&akid=4548%2E22930333%2E4P-P8C)**

name: Dawn Moore
subject: A short note about my husband Wes
body:
I know how much your support would mean to him.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)
Hi, Peter. It’s Dawn Moore, First Lady of Maryland.
Most people in Maryland know my husband Wes as governor. But to our family, his most important role is dad.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-1?refcode=em-20250908-1&refcode2=574_1086043_K5DGNj&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)
No matter how busy his schedule gets, Wes still makes time for Saturday night family dinners and for playing football out in the yard with our kids. It’s in those moments that I’m reminded why I fell in love with him all those years ago. ❤️
**Wes has always been my ride-or-die.** But now, I’m far from the only one who gets to witness his loyalty, drive, and commitment in action. Ever since he was sworn in as governor, all of Maryland gets to bear witness to the work he puts in each day to lighten burdens and create opportunities for all Marylanders.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-1?refcode=em-20250908-1&refcode2=574_1086043_K5DGNj&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)
On the day that Wes and I got married, I vowed to always be his greatest protector – that I’d have his back _no matter what._ That’s why today I’m asking you to join me in supporting Wes as he fights tirelessly to continue making progress for the people of Maryland.
**[Can you chip in $5 – or any amount you can – so we can keep Wes fighting for Maryland? I know how much your support would mean to him.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-1?refcode=em-20250908-1&refcode2=574_1086043_K5DGNj&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250908-1&refcode2=574_1086043_K5DGNj&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)**
Thank you,
Dawn Moore
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250908-1&t=2&refcode2=574_1086043_K5DGNj&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=574%2E1086043%2EK5DGNj)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

| | Peter, The battle for our Second Amendment is reaching a breaking point. The anti-gun lobby will stop at nothing to flip Congress and trample our God-given rights. That's why I'm writing you today, because the future of gun rights in America depends on what we do next. We have a game-changing opportunity: Electing Brandon Herrera to the U.S. House of Representatives. Brandon is a relentless champion for the Second Amendment. He doesn't just talk about standing up for gun owners--he lives it, fights for it, and bleeds for it. **But make no mistake: The Washington elite, anti-gun billionaires, and their media allies are targeting this race because they know how critical it is.** If we lose our pro-gun majority, the gun grabbers will:
* Ram through unconstitutional gun bans and Red Flag confiscation laws

# Vivek defends Capitalism, slams misguided socialists about to takeover NYC
Responding to a new Gallup Poll revealing that only 54% of U.S. adults view capitalism favorable while 39% view socialism favorably, Ohio gubernatorial candidate Vivek Ramaswamy went on CNBC **[to defend the merits of free market capitalism](https://substack.com/redirect/c9aa2de4-6fe7-4f3b-8286-b9574f7358db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and warn against the short-sighted economic idealism of the left.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c9aa2de4-6fe7-4f3b-8286-b9574f7358db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Ramaswamy pointed to the lack of financial literacy as a source for the embrace of socialism by many Americans.
"The best way to combat the popularity of socialism is actually to make everyone a capitalist by making them an owner in those uncapped, upside equity creating assets," Ramaswamy explained.
Ramaswamy admitted that affordability is a major real issue for many Americans, then criticizing Mamdani's rent control agenda as counterproductive to driving down housing costs.
"That isn't the way to do it," he said. "The way to do it is to actually increase the supply of new home construction,... What gets in the way? Rent restrictions. Red tape."
"A lot of those far-left policies, while well-intended, are actually resulting in hurting the people they intended to help," he added.
**[Watch Vivek's socialism take down on CNBC:](https://substack.com/redirect/c9aa2de4-6fe7-4f3b-8286-b9574f7358db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# Trump's Tariffs brought in a record breaking $31 BILLION in August
The U.S. Treasury raked in a record $31.4 billion in August 2025 tariff revenue, the **[largest monthly haul this year,](https://substack.com/redirect/ac0daaa5-9eb4-4434-a96e-f9a0679973c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as Trump's trade policies reshape global commerce amid legal challenges.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ac0daaa5-9eb4-4434-a96e-f9a0679973c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tariff Revenue Soars:** Total 2025 tariff collections hit $183.6 billion, nearly doubling last year's pace, with August's $31.4 billion setting a new monthly record.
* **Legal Battles Intensify:** A federal appeals court ruled Trump exceeded emergency powers, prompting a Justice Department appeal to the Supreme Court, though steel and aluminum tariffs remain unaffected.
* **Economic Impact Debated:** Tariffs boost federal coffers but raise consumer prices as businesses pass costs along, fueling concerns about inflation and economic uncertainty.
* **Debt Reduction Proposed:** Texas Rep. Moran's TRUST Act aims to funnel excess tariff revenue into a fund to tackle the $37 trillion national debt starting in 2026.

* * *
* * *
# Trump's new man at the Fed could be installed before the Sept rate decision
President Trump's nominee, Stephen Miran, could join the Federal Reserve Board **[in time for a pivotal September rate-cut vote](https://substack.com/redirect/18604f8f-77a6-4458-b447-37086ad3706b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , intensifying tensions with Fed Chair Jerome Powell over monetary policy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18604f8f-77a6-4458-b447-37086ad3706b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Miran 's Confirmation Looms**: Stephen Miran, Trump's pick for the Fed Board, awaits Senate confirmation, potentially influencing the September 16-17 FOMC meeting.
* **Trump Pushes Rate Cuts** : Trump demands lower interest rates, clashing with Powell's cautious 4.25%-4.5% rate stance amid tariff-driven inflation concerns.
* **Kugler 's Exit Opens Door**: Adriana Kugler's shock resignation allowed Trump to appoint Miran, aligning the Fed closer to his economic agenda.
* **Cook 's Potential Removal**: Trump's effort to oust Governor Lisa Cook could secure a Fed Board majority, amplifying his monetary policy influence still further.

* * *
* * *
# The S&P 500 welcomes Robinhood and Applovin to the party
AppLovin and Robinhood surged 7% after S&P Global **[announced their inclusion in the S&P 500 index,](https://substack.com/redirect/18ad2207-fee0-4ef3-9523-434ac8bf0fc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** effective Sept. 22, spotlighting their meteoric rise in tech and fintech sectors.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2791d726-10ba-441f-ad85-2ae653f3d5fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **AppLovin 's Explosive Growth**: AppLovin's stock soared 278% in 2023 and over 700% in 2024, driven by its targeted ad software for mobile apps, though 2025 growth slowed to 51%.
* **Robinhood 's Fintech Milestone**: Robinhood's inclusion, replacing Caesars Entertainment, marks a win for fintech, with its $91.5 billion market cap reflecting its role in democratizing trading.
* **MarketAxess, Caesars Out** : MarketAxess and Caesars Entertainment, down 17% and 21% year-to-date, respectively, are replaced, signaling a shift toward tech-driven companies in the S&P 500.

* * *
* * *
# Tesla's still king of the EV market but for how much longer?
Tesla's U.S. electric vehicle market share **[plummeted to 38% in August,](https://substack.com/redirect/962dbfdf-8c67-48b9-92ac-3c8a786d50e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a near eight-year low, as rivals like Hyundai and Toyota surge with aggressive incentives, outpacing Elon Musk's once all conquering model lineup.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0ea91ad9-b7d8-4695-ba1d-de58bf305d3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Competition Outpaces Tesla:** Rivals Hyundai, Honda, Kia, and Toyota boosted EV sales by 60-120% in July, leveraging higher incentives to capture market share.
* **Aging Lineup Hurts:** Tesla's focus on robotaxis and humanoid robots has delayed new, affordable EV models, leaving its lineup outdated compared to newer rivals.
* **Musk 's Politics Impact Brand:** Elon Musk's right-wing political ties and Trump association have played a part in alienating some customers.
* **Financial Pressure Looms:** With federal EV tax credits expiring in September, Tesla faces tough choices between profit-destroying incentives or further market share losses.

* * *
* * *
# Fed Gov's mysterious resignation has people asking questions
The intrigue surrounding former Federal Reserve Governor Adriana Kugler's abrupt resignation in August **[continues to deepen.](https://substack.com/redirect/9451f23f-5069-495c-b412-d0425d3d6145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9451f23f-5069-495c-b412-d0425d3d6145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Kugler 's Mysterious Exit Deepens:** Adriana Kugler resigned from the Federal Reserve Board on August 8, 2025, citing a return to Georgetown University, but her faculty page lists no teaching and still notes her as on leave.
* **Property Records Spark Questions:** A CNBC review found conflicting descriptions of Kugler's primary residence in her financial disclosures and Maryland tax records, which she attributes to a county tax official's error.
* **Trump Eyes Fed Control:** Kugler's exit allows Trump to nominate a third governor, moving him closer to a majority on the seven-member board, intensifying his push to influence monetary policy.

* * *
* * *
# College kids cash in on OnlyFans
As tuition costs soar, college students nationwide are **[flocking to OnlyFans,](https://substack.com/redirect/2a63a935-b1b4-4f3a-810c-9ccdd97fc6b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** creating explicit content for quick cash, sparking alarm over safety risks and shifting cultural norms on campuses.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2a63a935-b1b4-4f3a-810c-9ccdd97fc6b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Skyrocketing Tuition Drives Trend** : Rising college costs, averaging $38,270 annually, may be pushing students to produce on OnlyFans to fund their education, with some facing loan debt in the hundreds of thousands of dollars.
* **Cultural Shift Normalizes Platform** : Since 2023, students are openly embracing the use of OnlyFans, with documentary filmmaker Rock Jacobs noting a move from secrecy to pride in explicit content creation.
* **Psychological Risks Alarm Experts** : Psychotherapist Jonathan Alpert warns that OnlyFans' instant gratification may foster dependency, tying students' self-worth to online validation and subscribers.
* **Family Values Under Threat** : Jacobs argues the platform's rise undermines traditional family values, raising concerns about long-term societal impacts as students prioritize fame and fortune through explicit content generation.

* * *
* * *

Legal Battles Intensify: A federal appeals court ruled Trump exceeded emergency powers, prompting a Justice Department appeal to the Supreme Court, though steel and aluminum tariffs remain unaffected. Economic Impact Debated: Tariffs boost federal coffers but raise consumer prices as businesses pass costs along, fueling concerns about inflation and economic uncertainty. Debt Reduction Proposed: Texas Rep. Moran's TRUST Act aims to funnel excess tariff revenue into a fund to tackle the $37 trillion national debt starting in 2026. MarketAxess, Caesars Out : MarketAxess and Caesars Entertainment, down 17% and 21% year-to-date, respectively, are replaced, signaling a shift toward tech-driven companies in the S&P 500. Tesla's U.S. electric vehicle market share a near eight-year low, as rivals like Hyundai and Toyota surge with aggressive incentives, outpacing Elon Musk's once all conquering model lineup. body:
Last month, I visited Crater Lake and spoke about the negative impact Donald Trump’s budget cuts will have on national parks.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848294/568346139/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I5NjMxNC1kNzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vuhe5g7FKubOsmLh574eRZLExqJboaxkN6UmZbUpkLA=&emci=14231f29-d689-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=83b96314-d78c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **Crater Lake National Park is a national jewel in Southern Oregon.** From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, he's taken aim at the National Park Service through steep budget and staffing cuts. It's painfully clear that Trump is hellbent on destroying national treasures like Crater Lake, which has been beloved and visited by millions of people from around the world. Last month, I visited Crater Lake to sound the alarm on the consequences Donald Trump's budget cuts will have on national parks, including Oregon's own Crater Lake. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848295/568346140/-2044921950?refcode=2025-09-08-craterlake&recurring=&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=83b96314-d78c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2I5NjMxNC1kNzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vuhe5g7FKubOsmLh574eRZLExqJboaxkN6UmZbUpkLA=) Earlier this year, thousands of National Park and U.S. Forest Service workers were fired under the guise of necessary "budget cuts" from the Trump administration. Parks are understaffed. They don't have the money they need for repairs. Trash is piling up. And they don't have the manpower to handle busy tourist seasons. We will not sit idly by as the Trump administration commits the largest jewel heist of our national treasures, and we must continue to advocate for the protection of our public lands. Our parks are hurting, and together, we must stand up for them. **National parks are our national inheritance, and we owe future generations our strongest possible commitment to protect these national treasures.** More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: Last month, I visited Crater Lake and spoke about the negative impact Donald Trump’s budget cuts will have on national parks. | | | | Crater Lake National Park is a national jewel in Southern Oregon. From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, he's taken aim at the National Park Service through steep budget and staffing cuts. It's painfully clear that Trump is hellbent on destroying national treasures like Crater Lake, which has been beloved and visited by millions of people from around the world. Last month, I visited Crater Lake to sound the alarm on the consequences Donald Trump's budget cuts will have on national parks, including Oregon's own Crater Lake. = Earlier this year, thousands of National Park and U.S. Forest Service workers were fired under the guise of necessary "budget cuts" from the Trump administration. Parks are understaffed. They don't have the money they need for repairs. Trash is piling up. And they don't have the manpower to handle busy tourist seasons. We will not sit idly by as the Trump administration commits the largest jewel heist of our national treasures, and we must continue to advocate for the protection of our public lands. Our parks are hurting, and together, we must stand up for them. National parks are our national inheritance, and we owe future generations our strongest possible commitment to protect these national treasures. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. | | Last month, I joined Governor Bob Ferguson to hand out free lunches at Lynnwood Elementary. **After handing out lunch, I heard firsthand from the Edmonds School District staff about how President Trump's Big Ugly Law could impact food insecurity in Snohomish County.** When President Trump fast-tracked his Big Ugly Law earlier this summer, he cut approximately $186 billion in Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) funding through 2034. **Every month, around 1 million Washingtonians rely on SNAP benefits to purchase food.** The Big Ugly Law puts 14,000 people in Northwest Washington at risk of losing food assistance through SNAP benefits. [**We need to stand up for our communities and our values, and tell President Trump to keep his hands off SNAP. Sign our petition to let Trump know that his ugly SNAP budget cuts go against Northwest Washington values, and we, as voters, will not let this stand.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848318/568346223/1220137377?contactdata=gOTsyQNnWOZGmGDnFSoqrCzHz85lVKFJ6bpNKHWzzEvSZTbXNty0NnkrNbkIH+JjEA9j+T+tUvC0y2XPiClxiXSOk+1Euc57hlHtJ3OTKIJD2OUNyQu7MV1FrQl6g1kRTN1HTdEDzHZu2YfOURcu7Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzAxOGQzNS1kNzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=es6LPwpu14wAu86SYXnvkshThIeavn-OsxCmXJx-EIc=&emci=d5b173a8-d289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f3018d35-d78c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9494239) **[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848319/568346224/1220137377?contactdata=gOTsyQNnWOZGmGDnFSoqrCzHz85lVKFJ6bpNKHWzzEvSZTbXNty0NnkrNbkIH+JjEA9j+T+tUvC0y2XPiClxiXSOk+1Euc57hlHtJ3OTKIJD2OUNyQu7MV1FrQl6g1kRTN1HTdEDzHZu2YfOURcu7Q==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzAxOGQzNS1kNzhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=es6LPwpu14wAu86SYXnvkshThIeavn-OsxCmXJx-EIc=&emci=d5b173a8-d289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f3018d35-d78c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9494239)** **The Big Ugly Law is literally taking food away from hungry families to pay for one of the largest tax breaks in American history, which is largely going to the richest Americans and the largest corporations.** We need to let Trump know that we do not stand for these destructive budget cuts, and we will continue to fight them every step of the way. name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Constitutional Sheriffs Founder Richard Mack Endorses David Flippo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Law Enforcement leaders know who will protect NV-04 in Congress! Will you join our team? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fce116ced0f6/welcome-to-team-flippo-10340046?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=8f10b11515&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | I proudly announce that **Constitutional Sheriffs and Peace Officers Association founder**** Richard Mack** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04**. Sheriff Mack has a long career of public service to the people of Graham County and is a staunch defender of constitutional rights. In order to protect the rights of Americans, Mack founded the CSPOA. Sheriff Mack is a proponent of law enforcement being given the resources and ability to enforce the law to protect law-abiding citizens fully. I am grateful to have his support, and here is what he had to say about our campaign:****
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=7d09167d7c&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=1339c1020f&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE NOW")
---
| “I proudly endorse Lt. Col. David Flippo for Congress. As a constitutional sheriff, I have spent my life defending the rule of law, individual liberty, and the God-given rights of the people. I see that same commitment in David Flippo.

He is a proven warrior, a man of principle, and a constitutional conservative who understands that government’s first duty is to protect freedom, not control lives. David will fight for border security, personal responsibility, and the America First values this country was founded on.

Nevada needs leaders who answer to the people, not to political elites. David Flippo has my full support because I know he will stand firm for the Constitution and never back down.”

Our message resonates with law enforcement professionals nationwide because they have seen firsthand the consequences of “weak on crime” politicians like Steven Horsford! Policies that seek to defund the police, provide leniency to repeat offenders, and implement cashless bail make our communities less safe and allow the criminals to have the upper hand! I have dedicated my life to service, and in Washington, **I will have the backs of law enforcement officials like Sheriff Mack!**

We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=7e9c041326&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE TODAY")
---
| For God and Country,
Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.) _Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress_
Nevada’s 4th Congressional District
_**[www.Flippo4NV.com](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=c4d91c7d55&e=273c9a71fb)**_
---
