name: Christina Gagnier
subject: Summer on the trail in CA-40:
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848610/568347185/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)
Peter,

It’s been a busy summer on the campaign trail. From protests to town halls and community visits, I’ve been in every corner of CA-40 -- meeting with folks, hearing their concerns, and talking about how we flip this district.

I’ve shared some highlights below that capture the energy and determination I’m seeing everywhere we go. But, if you’re short on time, the quickest way to help is by **[chipping in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848611/568347186/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)** today so we can keep building momentum and reaching more voters.

Thank you!

Christina
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848612/568347187/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)
---
* * *

I stood shoulder-to-shoulder with folks at the **Rage Against the Regime** protest, channeling frustration into action. It was a vivid reminder that people in CA-40 are done being taken for granted -- they’re demanding answers and pushing for change.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848613/568347188/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)
I hosted our first virtual town hall as part of our **“While They Hide, We Decide”** program. More than 100 people from all around tuned in to talk about health care, affordability, and how we flip CA-40. It was clear that when voters have a voice, they use it.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848614/568347189/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)
I stopped in Laguna Woods last month as part of our **Big Ideas & Ballots Opportunity Tour** across the district. I had a blast speaking directly with local residents and leaders about the issues impacting our communities. This kind of on-the-ground engagement fuels this campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848615/568347190/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)
We kicked off September in Brea with another stop on our tour. Folks from across the district packed the room to share their hopes for CA-40 and talk through the bold ideas that will flip this seat. The energy was electric, and it’s exactly what we’ll carry into the fall.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848616/568347191/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)
* * *
**[This race is winnable, but we have to meet our goals to keep the field program going. If you’re with me, chip in $3 so we can expand our team of organizers and put more volunteers on doors before ballots drop.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114848617/568347192/1631137775?refcode=em-9.8.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM2MzA3Ny1kODhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnTNjIK7AN1az_DTvQUylUDI04PScdM_X5KJg981duA=)**

Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Did you get my note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
humbly asking one more time

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 217 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5749?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5749?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5750?t=4&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now so I can continue fighting for Michigan's working families in the U.S. Senate.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 25,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 29% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5749?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5749?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5749?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5750?t=8&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=799%2E49239%2EUhrG_V)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

Fellow Conservative,

I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris last November. _**Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States?**_

**As a former Navy SEAL, I can’t.** Tim Walz personifies everything that I’m not: **arrogant, overconfident, hateful, mean-spirited, progressive, deceitful — and on top of it all, a liar.**

And here’s the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse. She’s more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous.

_They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota._
_They both begin their speeches with land acknowledgments._
_They both see Republicans not as a loyal opposition, but as enemies to be crushed._

And if they get their way, they’ll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE.

**[Will you chip in a dollar or two to my campaign today to help me stop these hard-left lunatics in their tracks?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=829ab52d8696499098fa0d39cdc28265&_e=7xJScX5eF7sbFTKR61pAO0a-VeZkD7e0wrl_Pal1iTONLPTaXz1tjWsQvMpnBF7xLwack5lhbPmM5AcZqgSdm3on_BiPnGdSXNeOgqeQr8XhSSwXOTLbVF2KP7WD3acb1y2bWXJj4lc28RW6E98XEsD-kYRqTdYmkLlSo5BMzxOimDZntzVY6HMEPNiYLbQ34KpQ0xRFhRN1pHROwdT7okzuAT5D_tWSk_cOSL_4uBz3OJ0Ag72bvvb16Fu4NIBGFJk_zpCYD-ExBk-C_WIJpWU6GWxA73eE56Xhu_doG8M7HqwmM4J5VI4hBsrdhM0n_In3ZfKr1tGjdqLxrcvAq2eznAS65jihOtlDvTWjlehfWWlYIS0a44iUtUxJx4InJlaAVx2QjivedXiLHk1-UbDK9oYYSyjmGwh6TaG1Q3EsZubalmIrF4l5eY-S_TO2mBAlKgPaRHclbfa6tiXboY2G-U8BQlI6G3USv0Xc5wITod0GxZSrKMBUMNLJhsBjo8_tan31dbpQawFlLMTOu9RDaM3rADYnVYCesY_MygC9ApxgsRKHMUN1QZqKaNcQDeV2nUtga-pITn3U8vhJ3v2msAWC7wsZu54Y1Lg_RtVWrgeJ1vQ-I2Zw2qUv9MZ3nUDIPL64xpyEA5ZGZYHBGlPXetlTkgVp7F5Je2E9PVxUjGyTIKL4doADSKxHxOVToSQXzDfyZVZJsKmYd4KBaJxbK6lC6FfuEv_B1vEC8DFb6jS58UuFaerUTfu6mNBe) **

_**It’s about you.**_
_**It’s about me.**_

It’s about anyone who believes in this country’s founding values. Walz and his allies think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’re “a**holes.” They think we’ll take it.

I’ve faced far worse. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11. **I’ve served our nation in over 70 countries. I know what it takes to win against chaos and extremism. And I know what it means to serve something bigger than yourself.**

This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. But with your help, I can deliver our team a win in this critical battleground race.

clean_body: Minnesota Governor Tim Walz is openly rooting for Trump’s death. | Fellow Conservative, I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris last November. Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States? As a former Navy SEAL, I can’t. Tim Walz personifies everything that I’m not: arrogant, overconfident, hateful, mean-spirited, progressive, deceitful — and on top of it all, a liar. And here’s the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse. She’s more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous. They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota. They both begin their speeches with land acknowledgments. They both see Republicans not as a loyal opposition, but as enemies to be crushed. And if they get their way, they’ll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE. This fight matters. This isn’t just about insults, or even about Walz. It’s about you. It’s about me. It’s about anyone who believes in this country’s founding values. Walz and his allies think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’re “aholes.” They think we’ll take it. I’ve faced far worse. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11. I’ve served our nation in over 70 countries. I know what it takes to win against chaos and extremism. And I know what it means to serve something bigger than yourself. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. But with your help, I can deliver our team a win in this critical battleground race. If you’re as outraged as I am that Walz would wish death on the President of the United States, You have a choice. Close this email and let them get away with it — or join me, and help stop Tim Walz and his radical allies in their tracks. I’ve been in tough fights before. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: I'm an immigrant. I’m angry. I’m worried.

body:
I refuse to stay silent.
| | | | |

And I need your help to stop Donald Trump’s authoritarian TAKEOVER. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a16b2bf-fb93-4120-887c-782fe4328389/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My name is Raja Krishnamoorthi. The attacks on immigrants across the country are despicable. As an immigrant and the father of first-generation brown children, I refuse to stay silent. I’m doing everything in my power to protect the families and children living in fear that their parents will be ripped from their homes, schools, jobs, and communities by ICE. From standing up to Kristi Noem in the House Oversight Committee to getting kicked out of ICE detention centers for doing my job, I’ve led the fight against Trump’s authoritarian agenda. Democrats need someone willing to fight in the Senate now more than ever. But that’s made me a top target for Republican attacks. [That’s why I’m scrambling to hit my $10,000 midnight goal to power my fight to flip the Senate blue and put an END to this authoritarian takeover. Please, split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80b63410-78e4-4560-bbe3-89fb46e6737e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Peter, this is personal to me. My parents immigrated to the U.S. from India when I was a baby to give us a better life — and they did. I went from living in Public Housing and depending on SNAP to eat — to a Law School graduate, U.S. Congressman, and candidate for Senate. The Trump administration’s cruel, xenophobic policies mean that so many immigrant kids like me are scared right now. So yes — I’m angry. And I’m worried. But if I’ve learned anything in my life as an immigrant in this country, it’s that success comes from translating anger and worry into action. That’s why I’m running for Senate: to fight with everything I have against Trump and his MAGA maniacs. [But I need you to take action with me, Peter. Please, split $10, $25, or even $50 between me and Blue Amp Action to elect Trump’s biggest nightmare and flip the Senate BLUE >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td971e173-417f-4093-a9e1-f160bd8c7c79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10d777c5-8717-4e17-bd53-00886066b1ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: GIFFORDS
subject: 8 weeks, $8
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s crunch time.
#

Hello,
Today marks exactly 8 weeks until the November election. With the stakes so high, we’re asking you to make your first contribution of the year to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight.
$8 because millions of voters will go to the polls for the first time since Trump took office.
$8 because we’ve endorsed candidates who could flip their seats from red to blue.
$8 because the NRA is “deploying staff and resources” ahead of the election to protect their seats.
$8 because Gabby is traveling across the country to hold Republicans accountable, but we need more support to keep sharing our message.
While the NRA and gun lobbyists rely on extreme right-wing billionaires, our movement for gun safety is powered by grassroots donations -- just $8 at a time. We’re humbly asking for your support as early voting kicks off.
[**Please, contribute $8 -- or more, if you can spare -- to GIFFORDS PAC today. Your donation will be immediately put to work standing up against the Trump administration and reaching voters >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250908-1-b&t=1&akid=10851%2E3935704%2ELJXNzT)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Why Angelenos deserve better than Jimmy Gomez
body:
Jimmy Gomez is more focused on political opportunism, and it shows.
#
Peter,
Last week, Justice Democrats made our second endorsement of the 2026 cycle: Angela Gonzales-Torres. Angela is running for Congress in California’s 34th district — right in the heart of Los Angeles.
This is a primary challenge, and Angela is taking on incumbent Rep. Jimmy Gomez: a sell-out, corporate-backed, do-nothing Democrat.
**In a moment, we’re going to explain why Angelenos deserve better than their current representative.[But first, will you split $5 to help Angela unseat Jimmy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250908-agt?refcode=em20250908-37005&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37005_1203867_mCGnri&akid=37005%2E1203867%2EmCGnri)**
Here’s why we’re getting involved in this primary race:
As the daughter of a deportee, Angela is a born-and-raised, working-class Angeleno who understands this community’s most pressing issues because she’s lived through them. Jimmy, on the other hand, went to Washington D.C. and shut the door behind him, leaving his community behind. He is an establishment Democrat in a young, deep blue seat, but fails to fight for his community with the heart and courage they deserve.
---
CA-34 is suffering under Jimmy’s watch. This district has some of the highest instances of eviction notices served in all of Los Angeles, is one of the poorest communities in California, and is in the poorest 20% of all Congressional districts nationwide.
---
While his constituents struggle to get by, Jimmy has gladly taken checks from corporate and billionaire-funded Super PACs. While Angelenos are facing a historic housing crisis, he is raking in contributions from the real estate and investment banking lobbies, and looking the other way.
---
Jimmy secured an A rating from the cryptocurrency industry and has voted repeatedly to loosen regulations on Crypto — votes that only greenlight Donald Trump’s crypto corruption and make Trump billions of dollars richer, while putting everyday Americans at financial risk.
---
He also received $2.3 million from the far-right megadonor-funded lobby group, AIPAC, just last cycle — and as a result, has failed to sign onto the Block the Bombs Act, to sign on to the only bill calling for a ceasefire in Congress, or to push for an end to the genocide in Gaza.
---
During Jimmy’s two terms in Congress, rents have risen, critical environmental cleanups still haven’t happened, and too many Angelenos are still having to work two and three jobs just to make ends meet. He is a corporate Democrat who has sold out his community for PAC checks, and Los Angeles deserves better.
---
Angela is the working-class candidate committed to taking on the status quo and actually delivering for her fellow Angelenos. But taking on an incumbent is a tough, expensive task — and that’s why it’s so critical we can show her we have her back.
**[Pitch in whatever you can afford to fuel Justice Democrats and Angela’s campaign to win this competitive primary and build our progressive, working-class movement in Congress!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250908-agt?refcode=em20250908-37005&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37005_1203867_mCGnri&akid=37005%2E1203867%2EmCGnri)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250908-agt?refcode=em20250908-37005&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37005_1203867_mCGnri&akid=37005%2E1203867%2EmCGnri)**
— Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250908-37005-footer&t=2&refcode2=37005_1203867_mCGnri&akid=37005%2E1203867%2EmCGnri)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.

Lancaster, PA 17603

While Angelenos are facing a historic housing crisis, he is raking in contributions from the real estate and investment banking lobbies, and looking the other way. Jimmy secured an A rating from the cryptocurrency industry and has voted repeatedly to loosen regulations on Crypto — votes that only greenlight Donald Trump’s crypto corruption and make Trump billions of dollars richer, while putting everyday Americans at financial risk. He also received $2.3 million from the far-right megadonor-funded lobby group, AIPAC, just last cycle — and as a result, has failed to sign onto the Block the Bombs Act, to sign on to the only bill calling for a ceasefire in Congress, or to push for an end to the genocide in Gaza. During Jimmy’s two terms in Congress, rents have risen, critical environmental cleanups still haven’t happened, and too many Angelenos are still having to work two and three jobs just to make ends meet. He is a corporate Democrat who has sold out his community for PAC checks, and Los Angeles deserves better. Angela is the working-class candidate committed to taking on the status quo and actually delivering for her fellow Angelenos. But taking on an incumbent is a tough, expensive task — and that’s why it’s so critical we can show her we have her back. — Justice Democrats Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 1390 Columbia Ave #261 Lancaster, PA 17603 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE Statement on California Voter Fraud Charges
body:
Charges Are an Indictment of State’s Weak Election Integrity Laws |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE Statement on California Voter Fraud Charges **
**Charges Are an Indictment of State’s Weak Election Integrity Laws**
**Washington, D.C. --** Last week, Orange County’s District Attorney [announced](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=7917fe6390&e=ea91f782ea) that a California woman has been charged with five felonies after illegally registering her pet dog to vote and casting mail-in ballots in the dog’s name in two elections. The incident exposes California’s shamefully lax voter registration and mail ballot safeguards, and RITE applauds the District Attorney for his diligence in filing these important charges.

California barely does the minimum federal law requires to verify voter registrations. Making matters worse, it also automatically mails ballots to voters whose registrations it has not verified. This reckless combination of ask-no-questions universal mail balloting and careless registration standards resulted in the casting and counting of at least one fraudulent ballot in the 2021 gubernatorial recall election.

The federal Help America Vote Act (HAVA) requires individuals registering to vote to provide a Driver’s License number or last four digits of their social security number. Those who do not must present an acceptable form of ID before they vote in a federal election. For those voting by mail and who do not provide ID, the state must treat their ballot as a provisional ballot. California does not require this for those voting in a non-federal election such as the 2021 recall or the upcoming ballot referendum on redistricting. The result is cases like this, where pet dogs register to vote and automatically receive a mail ballot from the state who counts it without further questions.

California’s mail ballot signature verification process is also of no help in cases like this because it uses the signature from the initially fraudulent application to compare against the signature on the fraudulent mail ballot.

The upshot is that California law enabled an alleged fraudster to successfully cast a ballot in her dog’s name. The only reason any of this was discovered was because she also tried to cast a vote in a federal election, in which the ballot was challenged and set aside. California could easily impose the HAVA ID requirement for both state and federal elections, but it has not done so. California could also stop automatically mailing ballots to unverified voters, but it continues with this unjustifiable practice. Until California makes changes like these its elections will continue to be at risk for similar fraud.

“California laws create the perfect conditions that enabled this brazen example of registration and mail ballot fraud,” said RITE President Justin Riemer. “This should be a wakeup call for California legislators to bolster its registration verification and tighten up its universal mail voting policies. If past is prologue, they will do nothing.”

RITE is at the forefront of pursuing litigation and investigations to shore up weaknesses in states’ voter registration and mail voting systems. Our litigation in states like [Pennsylvania](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=9ce74ddfb8&e=ea91f782ea) aims to fix porous processes that fail to verify the eligibility and identity of individuals before they are registered and can vote. RITE also actively litigates to ensure states are verifying the identity of those casting mail ballots.
###

---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Why I’m talking to the NYT about freezing my eggs…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends — this morning, the New York Times published an interview with me discussing my egg freezing journey and my legislation to expand fertility coverage for members of the military.
(This is a pretty long email so if you don’t have time to read the whole thing, I’ll ask right now: Will you sign this petition in support of my legislation to include fertility treatments in the health care coverage our military receives? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/IPxqytQwzEmzev-2loF40A2] I’m working to get a big show of support before the House passes our annual defense spending bill.)
So: I’m 36, and I want kids one day. But I also spend six hours on a plane twice a week flying back and forth between San Diego and Washington, DC — and when I’m not in the air, my job is the busiest it’s ever been, and the stakes the highest they’ve ever been. So doing what I can to increase my chances of successfully starting a family later on is a no-brainer to me.
I froze some eggs in 2021 but my doctor recommended I do another round of egg retrieval, so I spent time during our August district work period getting daily blood work, giving myself shots, and taking estrogen pills — resulting in 11 eggs being retrieved.
Why am I telling you this, and why did I talk to the NYT about it?
Well, for one thing, I really believe that we need to dispel the stigma around freezing your eggs . It shouldn't be thought of as something you have to do if, for whatever reason, you aren’t in a position to have a baby during medically prime reproductive years — instead, I look at it as empowering. I’m taking agency in my life and my future, and making the right decision for myself.
Beyond ending these outdated and pointless stigmas, I also want to educate my colleagues in Congress about all of this. For my generation, conversations about fertility treatments, egg freezing, or IVF aren’t unusual — they’re a normal part of planning for the future. But Congress is still dominated by older men who’ve never had to think about any of this — let alone address it in thoughtful legislation! I believe that’s part of why our laws are out of step with the lives we’re actually living, and I’m working to change that.
Finally, I’m working hard to pass this legislation to expand coverage of fertility treatments to members of the military and their dependents — and if talking about my own experience helps drive awareness and attention to it, I’m more than happy to do that.
Why do we need this legislation? Freezing your eggs is really freaking expensive. I’m extremely fortunate to be able to pay out-of-pocket — but I’m well aware that the vast majority of Americans can’t do that. A lot of private-sector insurance plans cover fertility treatments, including IVF and egg freezing, including the ones that Members of Congress have access to. But the health care our military gets doesn’t. That’s just wrong.
We ask our service members to deploy during their prime reproductive years, spend time away from their partners or spouses, and expose themselves to high-risk environments — it’s no coincidence that military families experience a higher rate of infertility than civilians. And unless we expand fertility coverage, we’re also asking them to pick between having a family and serving their country.
I refuse to make that request of the remarkable people who have volunteered to serve — which is why I wrote this legislation and why I pushed for it to be included in this year’s defense spending bill, the NDAA (National Defense Authorization Act).
I did the same thing last year, but Speaker Mike Johnson personally insisted on removing it during final negotiations. (Why? You’d have to ask him, but I’m pretty sure whatever his reason, it’s a bad one.)
So this year I’m asking for your loud support! If you agree our military service members deserve to have fertility treatments covered by insurance just like private-sector workers, please add your name today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/IPxqytQwzEmzev-2loF40A2]
After you sign, will you forward this email to a few friends who could sign on, too? The more attention we can get on this, the better a shot we have at getting it passed.
If you want to read the full New York Times article, you can do that here [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/09/08/us/politics/sara-jacobs-egg-freezing-pregnancy-bill.html?unlocked_article_code=1.kU8.Wihx.1wAPVOo2KI6K&smid=url-share] .
Thanks so much for reading and for your support.
-Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Huge new endorsement in our race for Michigan's Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
State Rep. Joe Tate — my former primary opponent — just endorsed me to be Michigan's next U.S. Senator!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114851021/568355408/-873513011?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTI4MGE1OS1kZThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6plzSCyNXdsBTp7G2qF61S5GnreVcKKkq0GgE3lFpSY=)
---
I have incredible news to share with you.

**State Rep. Joe Tate — my former primary opponent — just endorsed me to be Michigan's next U.S. Senator!**

I'm honored to have Joe’s support. Throughout his time in the State House, including as Michigan's Speaker of the House, he's fought hard for Michiganders and achieved real results for the people of our state.

This endorsement is a big deal. Joe knows this Senate race is pivotal, and I know he'll fight hard alongside us to ensure we defeat Trump’s handpicked MAGA candidate, Mike Rogers, and take back the Senate for Democrats. **But with election experts calling our battleground race a "Toss-Up" and a GOP super PAC already hauling in $5 million to defeat me, I need a surge of grassroots support at this key moment to compete and win.**

[_**So can I count on you to split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Hillary Scholten’s to help me compete against Trump and Rogers' millions, keep Michigan blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114851022/568355409/-873513011?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTI4MGE1OS1kZThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6plzSCyNXdsBTp7G2qF61S5GnreVcKKkq0GgE3lFpSY=)
| [DONATE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114851023/568355410/-873513011?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTI4MGE1OS1kZThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6plzSCyNXdsBTp7G2qF61S5GnreVcKKkq0GgE3lFpSY=)

clean_body: State Rep. Joe Tate — my former primary opponent — just endorsed me to be Michigan's next U.S. Senator! | = I have incredible news to share with you. State Rep. Joe Tate — my former primary opponent — just endorsed me to be Michigan's next U.S. Senator! I'm honored to have Joe’s support. Throughout his time in the State House, including as Michigan's Speaker of the House, he's fought hard for Michiganders and achieved real results for the people of our state. This endorsement is a big deal. Joe knows this Senate race is pivotal, and I know he'll fight hard alongside us to ensure we defeat Trump’s handpicked MAGA candidate, Mike Rogers, and take back the Senate for Democrats. But with election experts calling our battleground race a "Toss-Up" and a GOP super PAC already hauling in $5 million to defeat me, I need a surge of grassroots support at this key moment to compete and win. = | = I'm proud to have you on this grassroots team, and grateful for whatever you can donate today at this big moment. Haley * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . DON'T MISS OUT!

Megyn Kelly announced today that she will be hitting the road with her first ever nationwide tour “Megyn Kelly LIVE,” bringing the
highly successful show “The Megyn Kelly Show” to live audiences starting October 23, 2025.

At each stop, Kelly will be joined by some of the most influential speakers of our time including
Donald Trump Jr., Eric Trump, Adam Carolla, Tucker Carlson, Charlie Kirk, Ben Shapiro, James Woods, Glenn Beck, Jillian Michaels,
Victor Davis Hanson
and many other special guests as they react to the latest in news, culture, and more.

As a subscriber, you get early access to limited VIP passes to Meet Megyn Kelly and to buy tickets on Monday, September 8th at 1
p.m. ET.

clean_body: Don't Miss Out! Get your tickets to the first ever nationwide tour "Megyn Kelly LIVE"! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] Moms for America is a proud supporter of the Megyn Kelly LIVE Tour and we have been able to secure our members with pre-sale tickets and a limited number of VIP Meet and Greet Passes... GET EARLY ACCESS AND BEAT THE BOX OFFICE TO THE MEGYN KELLY LIVE TOUR. STARTS MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 8TH AT 1 PM EST PRESALE TICKETS HERE [] USE PASSCODE: MK2025 [] DON'T MISS OUT! Megyn Kelly announced today that she will be hitting the road with her first ever nationwide tour “Megyn Kelly LIVE,” bringing the highly successful show “The Megyn Kelly Show” to live audiences starting October 23, 2025. At each stop, Kelly will be joined by some of the most influential speakers of our time including Donald Trump Jr., Eric Trump, Adam Carolla, Tucker Carlson, Charlie Kirk, Ben Shapiro, James Woods, Glenn Beck, Jillian Michaels, Victor Davis Hanson and many other special guests as they react to the latest in news, culture, and more. As a subscriber, you get early access to limited VIP passes to Meet Megyn Kelly and to buy tickets on Monday, September 8th at 1 p.m. ET. 2025 TOUR DATES Thursday, October 23 Sugar Land, TX, Smart Financial Centre ––––––– Friday, October 24 San Antonio, TX, Majestic Theatre ––––––– Saturday, October 25 Fort Worth, TX, Dickies Arena ––––––– Wednesday, November 5 White Plains, NY, Westchester County Center ––––––– Thursday, November 6 Jacksonville, FL, Moran Theater ––––––– Friday, November 7 Miami, FL, James Knight Center ––––––– Saturday, November 8 Atlanta, GA, Gas South Arena ––––––– Thursday, November 20 Bakersfield, CA, Dignity Health Arena ––––––– Friday, November 21 Anaheim, CA, Honda Center ––––––– Saturday, November 22 Glendale, AZ, Desert Diamond Arena TICKETS WILL SELL FAST! PRESALE TICKETS HERE [] USE PASSCODE: MK2025 [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. name: Mamdani UPDATE via Our Revolution
subject: SOS: New Mamdani Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1011&refcode=email-20250908_v&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Billionaires have already spent $19 MILLION trying to stop Zohran Mamdani
from becoming New York City’s next mayor.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250908&t=1061&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]Headline: These billionaires have already spent $19 million in a bid to
defeat Mamdani

They’re THROWING money at Mamdani’s opponents because Wall Street and CEOs
behind mega-corporations know that Mamdani poses a real threat to the
status quo. And a new poll is showing that as the race tightens, it could
work:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250908&t=1062&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]Headline: New poll shows Cuomo beating Mamdani in NYC mayor's race if
all other candidates drop out

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250908nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]This is crunch time. Our organizers are ramping up to expand our ground
game across the city to reach as many voters as possible. Can you pitch in
$10, $27, or whatever you can to fuel Our Revolution’s field work and help
elect Mamdani?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250908nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250908nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250908nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250908nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250908nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250908nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The sheer number of rich and powerful men lining up to take Mamdani down
is growing by the day. Shocking new reports just dropped that Trump may
offer a job to current NYC Mayor Eric Adams, who is running as an
independent, to get him to drop out and consolidate the race.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33255?source=email-20250908&t=1060&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]Headline: Trump Mulls offering NYC Mayor Eric Adams admin post to boost
Cuomo: report

We CANNOT let Trump and his billionaire backers silence the will of the
people. Which is why Our Revolution organizers are rapidly scaling up,
spreading out across key neighborhoods in Brooklyn and Queens to canvas,
hitting the subways to talk to as many people as possible, and recruiting
more phone bankers to get the word out.

Billionaires may be able to pay for slick TV ads and attack mailers, but
they can’t buy the trust built one doorstep at a time, or the solidarity
that comes from voters sharing their own stories. We have the people on
our side. We have the momentum. But to win, we need resources now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250908nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9351%2E5885482%2EONWU4G ]Please chip in whatever you can today and fuel Our Revolution’s work to
help Mamdani win in New York – because the only thing stronger than $19
million from billionaires is the people, organized and determined.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Team ODP
subject: An update on Loser LaRose’s voter purge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114851374/568356566/-311051470?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Purges_250908_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2IwMTYyZi1kZjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VlcDHpHvmXdsH3TiU9SE4PYdiDG-2sMcb-46eWEuZ4=) Have you checked your voter registration, team?

We’re asking because _you_ might have been purged by Loser LaRose as part of his four-year process to “clean up” Ohio’s voter rolls by deleting _hundreds of thousands of Ohioans_. LaRose can call this whatever he wants, but we know the truth: **this is voter disenfranchisement at its finest, ripped right out of the MAGA playbook.**

[**_We’ve launched a full-scale campaign to make sure we can re-register every eligible purged Ohio voter ahead of the 2026 elections – where we’ll have the chance to flip the Senate blue and win the governor’s mansion. Can you chip in to help us reach Ohioans in every corner of the state?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114851375/568356567/-311051470?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Purges_250908_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2IwMTYyZi1kZjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VlcDHpHvmXdsH3TiU9SE4PYdiDG-2sMcb-46eWEuZ4=)

LaRose thinks that if he can silence the voices of working families, young people, and communities of color, Republicans will win at the ballot box next year. He knows the very voters he’s purging are the ones who will send the GOP packing.

**He’s hoping we’ll stay quiet while he rigs the game.**

We’re contacting purged voters, helping them re-register if eligible, and making sure they’re ready to cast their ballot and make their voices heard in the most consequential elections in our state’s history. But we can’t do it alone.

[**_So we’re asking: will you join us in this fight for our democracy by pitching in anything you can right now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114851376/568356568/-311051470?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Purges_250908_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2IwMTYyZi1kZjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5VlcDHpHvmXdsH3TiU9SE4PYdiDG-2sMcb-46eWEuZ4=) clean_body: | = Have you checked your voter registration, team? We’re asking because you might have been purged by Loser LaRose as part of his four-year process to “clean up” Ohio’s voter rolls by deleting hundreds of thousands of Ohioans. LaRose can call this whatever he wants, but we know the truth: this is voter disenfranchisement at its finest, ripped right out of the MAGA playbook. = LaRose thinks that if he can silence the voices of working families, young people, and communities of color, Republicans will win at the ballot box next year. He knows the very voters he’s purging are the ones who will send the GOP packing. He’s hoping we’ll stay quiet while he rigs the game. We’re contacting purged voters, helping them re-register if eligible, and making sure they’re ready to cast their ballot and make their voices heard in the most consequential elections in our state’s history. Peter,

The first Bill I’ll sponsor as the youngest U.S. Senator in history? A constitutional amendment to end the D.C. Cartel.

12 years. That’s it.

Two terms in the Senate. Six in the House. Then pack your bags and go home. Will it pass? Maybe not. But **we’ll find out who’s addicted to power. And we’ll name names.**

| [ **SUPPORT TERM LIMITS** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=3a0d43d612744ec69a93c86f282beff0&_e=RlBrrVN3R7H_QI4lTWPxS3jCAIRNjvMzi2WDtPXPuVPgPgn5yuSNQGKeN_NFmcYSWruPh5P3qc03jWwo2Qi9ORwGYIf84eTHBeYNeq-gvobNCjlVYUDB7jY2rTeUn_aGvd4IA8spuVAy-B4ik7C5SGyb0QNNsRLIpDt0dl6ZHrtmFM6Fkr4VVzYcafNHVIv41yPyr-fWUXgG1mfN586sIsdjsZ7E_b7Sw9forGoa1cqklbhCCk7AQfSJi1I6fUuBDG_vRINRtJjEEEIH9sKDGfgLEmHdVMjf5Y1C26t9wQ-yD2GW8IatMMVfnRDdRKvBwER5XrT25yvJ32Hly91wGSoHl9FmlXhq4vVenhwt_kG6ziEAjW1TTeR6x-Dux-708it_Uez96Stl6RBhZAqcjVINVN9-1mUb7Lfv8RqwaXk6MgWiUI4SxEIprD287SE-_jftDwHAHNL1_PfWNNTHPT-_w4vS7C4M-LrhCP_qdKSi5mwrd1R0Mp-zrsk8oH8Zp9PsYJyJ8qng3Hw5SRTAD2YxHbiquZWx1O1nMOlaQZRHdBTFeb-2lz04pfc4xaWf)

Chuck Schumer, Mitch McConnell, and every other career politician who’s clung to their seat while America rotted—they’re on notice.

They built a system to stay forever. To get rich. To protect each other. And **they think no one will stop them.**

****But I’m not bought. I’m not afraid. And I’m coming straight for the source.** **

You want to drain the swamp? You start with a term limit. We’re going to bring this fight to the floor—and to the people.

September 8, 2025
I will never forget when as a young physician doing a volunteer year in Haiti seeing a mother with her six-month old baby. The baby's muscles were totally rigid so that it was impossible for him to lie flat. His jaw was clamped shut and when he attempted to cry, an eerie humming emanated from his clenched lips. It was an obvious case of tetanus.
I placed an intravenous line in the child to hydrate him and a nasogastric tube in his stomach to feed him. I gave him antibiotics, but the tetanus immunoglobulin was not available. The baby died.

Horrors like this were not uncommon in Haiti where there was little vaccination. I saw many patients maimed by polio. Children frequently died from measles.
Any reader interested in what happens when there is a lack of vaccines can read Chapter 9 from my book, _The Neglected and Abused: A Physician 's Year in Haiti_, by clicking the below link. There is no charge.
https://www.joebentivegna.com/Haiti/tableofcontents.htm
No one in their right mind wants to see these tragedies reoccur in the United States. But it could happen as many supposed "experts" in public health have lost their credibility with many citizens. This culminated with the Secretary of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., firing numerous public health officials.
A major incident causing public distrust occurred in 1980 when the prestigious medical journal, _The New England Journal of Medicine_ , [published a study](https://substack.com/redirect/cd9d42cc-9545-463c-939b-d3ce22efe001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that stated opioids were not addictive. This was pure idiocy. A drug company, Purdue Pharma, used this study to goad public health bureaucrats to ease up on the safeguards governing the prescription of these drugs. They then launched an army of opioid salespeople to seduce a class of greedy doctors to push these drugs on patients. The result, hundreds of thousands of deaths and millions of addicts.

Corrupt judges looked the other way and allowed the owners of the Purdue Pharmacy to keep much of their ill-gotten gains. This is chronicled in the book, _[Empire of Pain: The Secret History of the Sackler Dynasty](https://substack.com/redirect/93c44e74-cd7a-4f71-841c-c99adbb7b404?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ and the Netflix movie, _[Painkiller](https://substack.com/redirect/92dd43e0-acbc-47ef-a73f-717354078589?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , for any reader who desires more information.

But the real damage was done by government policy during the COVID epidemic. While data showed that the vaccines were lifesaving in certain groups such as the elderly, the diabetic, the immunocompromised and and the obese, the data supporting the COVID vaccine for children was dubious at best. But the vaccine was pushed on everybody. Now there is anecdotal evidence that heart problems and cancers increased in the younger population as a side effect of the vaccine. Nobody knows the truth because the drugs companies have not released the data yet. Plus, the fact that the CEO of Moderna, the manufacturer of the mRNA COVID vaccine, took home $400,000,000 increases skepticism as to whether this was just another corporate money grabbing scam.

These "experts" closed churches during the COVID epidemic while keeping strip clubs open. Maybe the "experts" thought the COVID virus was religious and would attend church but avoid strip clubs.

Furthermore, the government led by Dr. Anthony Fauci, decreed that masks and social distancing of six feet would prevent COVID's spread. Later Fauci admitted that there was no evidence that this was true. Fauci even stated that taking the vaccine reduced COVID's spread. This was nonsense. A vaccine does not prevent a patient from contracting or spreading a disease, it merely triggers a stronger immune response so that the patient has a mild case of the disease when infected. Every doctor knows this, and it is why Biden was forced to pardon Fauci from being accused of perjury.

But the political implications of this are devastating. Now many people who voted for Trump believe that all vaccines are a scam. Florida's Surgeon General, Dr. Joseph Ladapo, has stated that vaccines in Florida are now voluntary. Obviously, Dr. Ladapo has never been to Haiti. Technically, this policy does not apply to measles, polio and tetanus vaccines, but it is unlikely that the average voter knows or understands this.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e2982910-8274-4a0c-a9db-e4837e51a8e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

A reasonable compromise would be to review the latter recommendations for childhood vaccination. For example, infants are now given the Hepatitis B vaccine. But Hepatitis B is a disease that is either sexually transmitted or contracted from IV drug use. This combined with the fact that it is only effective for seven to eight years means it is not necessary in infants unless the mother is infected.

But public officials like Kennedy and Ladopa must take care in their actions and words. Vaccines have saved millions upon millions of lives and publicly challenging their efficacy could result in disastrous cases, such as the poor baby I tried to save in Haiti.

clean_body: But our Children are Receiving Too Many Vaccines | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more But our Children are Receiving Too Many Vaccines | | | Sep 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | September 8, 2025 I will never forget when as a young physician doing a volunteer year in Haiti seeing a mother with her six-month old baby. The baby's muscles were totally rigid so that it was impossible for him to lie flat. His jaw was clamped shut and when he attempted to cry, an eerie humming emanated from his clenched lips. It was an obvious case of tetanus. I placed an intravenous line in the child to hydrate him and a nasogastric tube in his stomach to feed him. I gave him antibiotics, but the tetanus immunoglobulin was not available. The baby died. Horrors like this were not uncommon in Haiti where there was little vaccination. I saw many patients maimed by polio. Children frequently died from measles. clean_body: We have to fight the ENTIRE Republican Party. | NBC NEWS : RNC moves to give early backing to former chair running in key Senate race Peter — The RNC is officially ALL IN for our opponent... and they just used an exception to their rules to get money in his coffers as fast as possible. = Republican Party officials made it all clear that when Donald Trump endorses a candidate, NO ONE will challenge him. They also see North Carolina as the TOP U.S. Senate race of 2026 — they are ready to do anything it takes to defeat us. Starting now, we have to be ready to fight the ENTIRE Republican Party apparatus. The GOP may think they can buy this seat by pouring national party funds into North Carolina to prop up their Big Oil lobbyist candidate, but with you on our side, we will show them that they’re wrong. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Let’s do this, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=260598ab46b44262bcf3197fd1e486fa&_e=3fd6ZWGLg8-HgLzc7vksihqr3c-9otBrCt7lP9b4YHlyMvtrz9KGDqryg_tpbpfzWO9S4yj43g56jFIoTYlRAPvLk0Tl0gzP4Vu2lQvUxTyz_klVi_W3KQspvxYilCw8OOKppGPOLH4QCx-9KVEJj3PdVGuEGy-RhS5PA6oUns42dLHXMO5bWjfzXZup-GxCQD_nqkisnFbHjwZ4z1vFLCh8INUjtl11_0P579iwy_ofvtvJNE-L1l6OGTeRvZCuy0GmVLW3DKLiRSxL6aD5DI0iOxvvMDDkbyM8OGzjEr5cygpwgY4GjAdK5-4kNFJaBtTdWPl3KXKr5SCcW4hJxGoLCHTAgc2rRX7RoEBuTNOxh8exuRkux2Tn-bazVp_OKb_1kitCYVPUuwxbEX2492YwtOCm7pVfAWjm4u0oAstl7yxmrSHN98juH9RxA728dGm4JZRagxS2ey3BJZU9E8P6H8W0jTzg9WYyLpsdsbGtzpzIIvUZHGNhu-WNjrZ0vBaQ2eWoL4BlWb_bgDrjsDnL65jOZ2q9bJ7StYXqb9oiQPOShT8FvlmN0psQ92aKgRDuHswgxSOPEBuC_--E-TtxyfKkZUHYAgztiIMZk0V_KVXgx9qK5ktxiXB5aNKUvJ-KbDx3Z9qqJHM8iLA-DA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=260598ab46b44262bcf3197fd1e486fa&_e=3fd6ZWGLg8-HgLzc7vksihqr3c-9otBrCt7lP9b4YHlyMvtrz9KGDqryg_tpbpfzWO9S4yj43g56jFIoTYlRAPvLk0Tl0gzP4Vu2lQvUxTyz_klVi_W3KQspvxYilCw8OOKppGPOLH4QCx-9KVEJj3PdVGuEGy-RhS5PA6oUns42dLHXMO5bWjfzXZup-GxCQD_nqkisnFbHjwZ4z1vFLCh8INUjtl11_0P579iwy_rDjA6jqcmVl0gD0pHItuQSQyLZpiIJWnVx-LPTYYNkb6GxSiVdbdGSaQK2VIvh2I7b7FHkax42JIIjKLzU_8TRan_dvAF1iQm2wCKUd-H3851JeuEBj-ubtFOxac-DLFzsrasuOz1DXA_yxR8aVTbHexW5ZJ81Gc8ffhCDZmpMFCMLMno7L8tbxX2xOeSQPsuVkvAb-wcendWNNVQZ014Rn6A-9ymltd5XdaIljmz0KALwh9xe6_eZnM4I1F47TWr0lUvE3aLj6wIUds1HxqVuWrErpFpYsq7KNFxUJyB0NJqb3UcB6-oL0zg-YyUUggZwX71ccKSlY3ux_yD0IEO8zbzBMamTUdDLCQYvduj49m32RB7OAQ9IlnmsIW0ajH3LTfRJrsoeei2tA11AC_tMYqA9r0MwuKiiw_7Kqfjr5Q%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=260598ab46b44262bcf3197fd1e486fa&_e=3fd6ZWGLg8-HgLzc7vksihqr3c-9otBrCt7lP9b4YHlyMvtrz9KGDqryg_tpbpfzWO9S4yj43g56jFIoTYlRAPvLk0Tl0gzP4Vu2lQvUxTyz_klVi_W3KQspvxYilCw8OOKppGPOLH4QCx-9KVEJj3PdVGuEGy-RhS5PA6oUns42dLHXMO5bWjfzXZup-GxCQD_nqkisnFbHjwZ4z1vFLCh8INUjtl11_0P579iwy_rLvSFBlu-ItXdkG-rjGFCWo5eIK7jUDOGnq28vRiqhJfxmyQTNwBOf55B65oII6vQqBAoMdXRcq1y2avTOpByD1UjLc11HzhI26FoDfiPel2X_RlqkvWuqWGOcZVnpunx0Ceaz-e9qrpvhiZRB1anuBM-3gJyYIQhOQSEHbS3zTaNmnyKl14B9TxKQrAN3-n1fRXyUW9wz3aqiPoJ_6jzqQyl2DVM0eGUZqAueEf7FqlbFqPt5vZ12HsZkK-cLomK8dlr-EwVkO_FSEZD_Zupw7gYs2xc4B7nFItieLh2v1a6MaNaIwvahLbPlKJIvjDHVbTkeqdolSBM7ohO7gX676r1QCei4neZ5AQR6_80dFH4xODRXxq4TtHVyKmKfAqASqTSjEa7Jsde1-UYHWDAM1POZY0vfYDzRPosS45DfrA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Hi Peter, Summer recess is over, and Congress is back in session. Leaving home in Vermont to go back to DC is always tough, but I’m fired up because we’ve got a _big_ fight on our hands. Republicans are rushing a spending bill to keep the government running. But I’m not giving them a free pass to hand massive tax breaks to billionaires, force rural hospitals to close, or kick millions off their health care. **And oh yeah, I'm not going to let them try to cover up the Epstein scandal either. The American people deserve answers.** These are just a few of the issues I’m focused on. But what about you? What matters most to Vermonters right now? What do you want Congress to address? How can I be helpful? **[Take a few minutes to let me know by filling out my September Survey:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114852228/568359744/400781214?contactdata=EMMirggJkEtN9gm3RoE5EMV64JjmCLTT6MFHkezSeD6oys0QVtYFcp2ia5n3erT+c+gTYTQBbctaNaE/oPlprja5CfRVaKqj/q+45Iw/gK8tD4M9hPRxOdmDzmXylCEioZwkmacQRqJvKY/BYJK8fGA1iivJDoNEcXlmJYYYSI4=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_SUR_GEN_AC_20250908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ExMTM0Zi1lNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=km5Tydx4glwmq0H50rDLj0Zef6b8-VXJVhBtw0nyTn0=&emci=6711020e-e48c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=23a1134f-e48c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=43402272)** | [Take the Survey Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114852229/568359745/400781214?contactdata=EMMirggJkEtN9gm3RoE5EMV64JjmCLTT6MFHkezSeD6oys0QVtYFcp2ia5n3erT+c+gTYTQBbctaNaE/oPlprja5CfRVaKqj/q+45Iw/gK8tD4M9hPRxOdmDzmXylCEioZwkmacQRqJvKY/BYJK8fGA1iivJDoNEcXlmJYYYSI4=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_SUR_GEN_AC_20250908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ExMTM0Zi1lNDhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=km5Tydx4glwmq0H50rDLj0Zef6b8-VXJVhBtw0nyTn0=&emci=6711020e-e48c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=23a1134f-e48c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=43402272)

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. This is serious, team: Ever since Donald Trump took office, Republicans across the country have been doing everything in their power to suppress as many Democratic votes as possible:

**FIRST:** They gerrymandered the Congressional maps in Texas to try to steal seats for the GOP!

**THEN:** Missouri Republicans said they would follow Texas and are trying to suppress Democratic voters as well.

**AND NOW:[_Louisiana is redrawing its maps, specifically to suppress and divide votes from predominantly Black districts in the state._](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68284?t=7&akid=23376%2E4449941%2EO-Vc6x)**

**No American should be denied the right to vote because of their race.** That’s why passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ has never been more critical than right now, team.

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68284?t=8&akid=23376%2E4449941%2EO-Vc6x)
So, we’re kicking off a major campaign urging Congress to pass the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ , and we need 2,999 more signatures from Top Democrats in your area by 11:59 PM tonight.
[ **Your signature has never been more impactful, friend. If you stand with us against the GOP’s non-stop attacks on voting, add your name to our widespread petition demanding Congress pass the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act _→ **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68284?t=9&akid=23376%2E4449941%2EO-Vc6x)
[ADD MY NAME NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68284?t=10&akid=23376%2E4449941%2EO-Vc6x)
---
Thank you,

_Fight For Reform_

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: FEC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
September is different for campaigns like ours. Let us explain.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1804%2E791427%2ER8A-60)

Friend — September is different for campaigns like ours. Let us explain:
At the end of the month we are legally required to report our fundraising totals for the entire quarter to the FEC.
After we file that report it gets published online for all to see. That means everyone who’s watching this campaign — from AIPAC to MAGA to the media — will be waiting to see not just how much we raised but how many people chipped in.
Will our FEC report show a groundswell of grassroots support? Will it prove that our campaign will be hard to beat?
Or will our report show to everyone who wants to take Ilhan down that our campaign is vulnerable? That we don’t have the funds to go up against millions in Super PAC spending?
The answer to these questions depends on you, and everyone else on Team Ilhan.
To be honest, our fundraising has been down all summer. We need a huge September to make up that lost ground before we file our FEC report
That’s why we are asking you today: **[Make a contribution towards Ilhan’s FEC deadline at the end of the month.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250908-1-180&t=2&akid=1804%2E791427%2ER8A-60)
We’ve always relied on grassroots, small-dollar donors to hit our fundraising goals, and this FEC period can’t be any different. There’s no billionaires waiting to swoop in and save the day with a huge check. We need you!
**[Please, use this link or the buttons below to chip in to Ilhan’s campaign today. It’s really important that we beat expectations and come out of this FEC deadline with a formidable movement that will be impossible to beat.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250908-1-180&t=3&akid=1804%2E791427%2ER8A-60)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=692%2E181023%2EjshMcu)
_Hi team, this is Jocelyn Benson. My friend, Mikie Sherrill, asked to reach out. Read her message below, and split a contribution to help us win!_
* * *
I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision:
**I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — _earlier than we originally planned for._**
I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, [**I hope you’ll split a few dollars between my team and Jocelyn Benson to help close our budget gap and fund this new ad buy →**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-sherrill.JfODNg&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250908_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=692%2E181023%2EjshMcu)
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-sherrill.mfoTQL&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250908_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=692%2E181023%2EjshMcu)
---
Here’s why we made this choice:
Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me.
But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support.
And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. **Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.**
This is how we do it. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor.
To be candid with you, I made this choice because I believe that our grassroots team will come through the way you always have and help us power this campaign to victory. To close our budget gap and fund this big ad buy, we’ve set a goal of 100 online donations before midnight tonight. [**If you could step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Team Benson, I would be incredibly grateful.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-sherrill.JfODNg&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250908_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=692%2E181023%2EjshMcu)

I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision: I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for. I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, Here’s why we made this choice: Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me. But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support. And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.
