body:
Paige has a slim lead. Rob "Secret Helicopter" Bresnahan can spend millions to close that gap. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114853559/568364578/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE912_20250908_PA08_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056958&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTNjMWRiOS1lNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eG_j3OY8bbAoL-_n5OGdNxb0ZNG2trnHY8c4PMXuhY=) Peter — Last week, EMILYs List proudly endorsed Scranton's Mayor Paige Cognetti for Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District on the day she launched her campaign to turn this swing House seat blue.

We know what it takes to win tough races, and early support will be the difference between victory and defeat. That's why your help right now matters so much. ****[**Will you chip in today to help elect candidates like Paige Cognetti and flip the U.S. House in 2026?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114853561/568364581/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE912_20250908_PA08_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056958&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTNjMWRiOS1lNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eG_j3OY8bbAoL-_n5OGdNxb0ZNG2trnHY8c4PMXuhY=)**** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114853566/568364582/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE912_20250908_PA08_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056958&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTNjMWRiOS1lNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eG_j3OY8bbAoL-_n5OGdNxb0ZNG2trnHY8c4PMXuhY=)
---
Peter, meet Paige:
* First elected mayor of Scranton in a special election in 2019, then reelected in 2021.
* Her slogan was "Paige Against the Machine" and she took on corruption, cut red tape, and made her city safer.
* Former advisor to Pennsylvania's Auditor General and Scranton School Board director.
* New polling shows her with a razor-thin 45% to 43% lead over **GOP Rep. Rob Bresnahan.**

Now meet her opponent, Rob:
* Voted for the 2025 GOP billionaire budget bill that threatens health care for 203,000+ people in his district.
* Supported cutting $2.54 billion in district funding.
* Backed ludicrous anti-choice legislation that criminalizes doctors.
* Is mired in scandal: used an undisclosed shell company to conceal that he owns a private helicopter, and placed more than 617 stock trades worth $7.24 million this year alone — many conveniently timed with Trump and GOP policy moves.

Even Republicans are raising red flags about Bresnahan's corruption. Voters are fed up and momentum is on our side — but he's sitting on piles of cash and ready to spend whatever it takes to hold his seat.

****[**That's why it's so critical for grassroots Democrats to step up early. Donate now to power Paige’s campaign, and support EMILYs List women running nationwide to flip the House in 2026:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114853571/568364590/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE912_20250908_PA08_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1056958&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTNjMWRiOS1lNjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9eG_j3OY8bbAoL-_n5OGdNxb0ZNG2trnHY8c4PMXuhY=)****

clean_body: Paige has a slim lead. Rob "Secret Helicopter" Bresnahan can spend millions to close that gap. | = Peter — Last week, EMILYs List proudly endorsed Scranton's Mayor Paige Cognetti for Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District on the day she launched her campaign to turn this swing House seat blue. We know what it takes to win tough races, and early support will be the difference between victory and defeat. That's why your help right now matters so much. **= | = Peter, meet Paige: First elected mayor of Scranton in a special election in 2019, then reelected in 2021. Her slogan was "Paige Against the Machine" and she took on corruption, cut red tape, and made her city safer. Former advisor to Pennsylvania's Auditor General and Scranton School Board director. New polling shows her with a razor-thin 45% to 43% lead over GOP Rep. Rob Bresnahan. Now meet her opponent, Rob: Voted for the 2025 GOP billionaire budget bill that threatens health care for 203,000+ people in his district. Supported cutting $2.54 billion in district funding. Backed ludicrous anti-choice legislation that criminalizes doctors. Is mired in scandal: used an undisclosed shell company to conceal that he owns a private helicopter, and placed more than 617 stock trades worth $7.24 million this year alone — many conveniently timed with Trump and GOP policy moves. Even Republicans are raising red flags about Bresnahan's corruption. Voters are fed up and momentum is on our side — but he's sitting on piles of cash and ready to spend whatever it takes to hold his seat. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being in this fight, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, Federal and Gubernatorial, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. The contrast couldn't be clearer. While Georgians just had their health care costs SKYROCKET thanks to Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill" and now face the prospect of mass layoffs thanks to his tariffs... **...**** _Marjorie Taylor Greene is focused on making herself rich thanks to lucrative book deals about her "service" in Congress._** It's clear she doesn't take her role as a Member of Congress seriously. If she did, she'd be focused on lowering the cost of living, creating good-paying jobs, building a fairer economy, and standing up for rural Georgians. **But instead, she 's focused on herself** -- making herself rich, advancing her political career, going viral on social media, and securing her next Fox News appearance. At such a critical moment, Georgians need real leadership.__**_They need someone like Shawn Harris in their corner._** [**That 's why we're asking you personally to stand with Shawn as he fights to defeat MTG and restore real leadership to the U.S. Congress. Peter,

Iowa has long been a national leader in renewable energy. More than two-thirds of our state’s electricity comes from wind power. Fifty wind energy companies operate here, supporting around 9,000 hardworking Iowans. These investments power our homes with some of the lowest electric bills in the country and bring real money into our state.

**That’s why it’s so disappointing to see Mariannette Miller-Meeks turn her back on wind energy by supporting D.C. elites' plan to kill it nationwide.** She has often boasted about standing with Iowa’s renewable energy projects and even offered legislation to expand them. _But when it came time to put her vote where her mouth was, she voted for Donald Trump’s big, ugly bill._

It strips away billions of dollars in tax incentives and economic tools that make our wind energy industry possible. That means fewer jobs, higher electric bills, and stalled progress in one of the most successful renewable energy programs in the country.

Renewable energy cuts costs for families and creates jobs right here in Iowa. **Representatives who vote against our state’s best interests are voting against Iowans.**

Mariannette Miller-Meeks can’t have it both ways. Her votes have consequences and it's time to hold her accountable.

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

body:
9/11-Truthers aren’t going to tell Mark Warner how to do his job....

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114854115/568366277/1341216162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Loomer5_250908_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDI3MWQxOC1lOThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFoITlhYeDAa8odncSIcczsK6xJpqPoTj2fpRWUm_qo=) Derek,

This shouldn’t be a controversial statement:

Unelected, unappointed right-wing bloggers should not be calling the shots on issues of national security – _especially anyone who has a history of 9/11 denialism, Islamophobia, and associations with white nationalism._

**But that’s exactly what’s happening in the Trump administration.**

Right-wing conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer went on an online rampage against Senator Warner – and called on the Trump administration to cancel Warner’s routine oversight meeting with members of the national intelligence community. **And so they did.**

And since then, we’ve been absolutely pummeled with lies and attacks from Laura Loomer – including calling to remove Senator Warner from the Senate Intelligence Committee.

Look, Senator Warner is not going to back down from this fight. He’s not going to let online trolls like Laura Loomer prevent him from serving his constituents and providing oversight of our national intelligence operations.

**But he’s going to need our help to keep up the fight. Our race could be a top Republican target next year. And the more Senator Warner speaks out against Donald Trump and his dangerous administration, the more we need to be prepared for an expensive reelection campaign.**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We're in the homestretch now, and you deserve to know exactly what we're doing to flip Virginia blue.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Abigail Spanberger is running for Governor in Virginia and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**rush a split donation between Abigail's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250908-1-90&t=1&akid=6183%2E6688874%2Eior_dt)
---
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250908-1-90&refcode2=6183.6688874.ior_dt&t=2&akid=6183%2E6688874%2Eior_dt)
---
Team, we have just two months to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. [**Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Mark Kelly to power our work?](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250908-1-90&t=3&akid=6183%2E6688874%2Eior_dt)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250908-1-90&t=4&akid=6183%2E6688874%2Eior_dt)**
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
[**Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $3 or more to my campaign and Mark Kelly to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250908-1-90&t=5&akid=6183%2E6688874%2Eior_dt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Mark Kelly and Abigail Spanberger instantly._

clean_body: We have to make each day left in this campaign count. Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Abigail Spanberger is running for Governor in Virginia and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and Team, we have just two months to go until Election Day! I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face. And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources. My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here. I've given voters my word: As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward. That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills. With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to: ✅ Visit every corner of Virginia. ✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks. ✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen. It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Mark Kelly and Abigail Spanberger instantly. | | | | | | | | | ** I'm grateful to have you on my team, Abigail Spanberger Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

Friend, I recently joined Anderson Cooper on _CNN_ to talk about the threat that Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. poses to the health of the American people.
He has done nothing but spread misinformation and ridiculous conspiracy theories, increase health care costs, and endanger the health and well-being of every single American.
That’s why I called on Kennedy to resign when he testified before the Senate Finance Committee. And if he refuses, I’m calling on Donald Trump to fire him.
**Are you with me, friend? If so, I’m counting on you to be one of the 5,000 members of this team to speak out alongside me. Please respond to our live poll before midnight tonight and make your voice heard:**
**Should Robert F. Kennedy Jr. be fired?**

clean_body: was really hoping it wouldn't come to this, Patriot... I hate to tell you this, but I got word that we fell short of our CRUCIAL Fundraising Deadline Goal last night. This is a crushing blow. But I'm not about to quit on our movement, Patriot. I've launched an internal extended deadline for the next ten minutes to give us one more shot at reaching this key Goal! Now, you have a choice. You can: Give up on our fight to keep Virginia red. The country will think conservatives aren't committed to building a better tomorrow for our nation and here in Virginia. completely counting on you! I know we can finally reach this Goal and close the MASSIVE fundraising gap between me and my Leftist opponent. don't ignore this request - I'm begging you. I can't thank you enough for your support, Patriot. I can't wait to see your donation process. God bless,Winsome | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Robert Garcia
subject: My new district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
I’m running to defend democracy
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114854749/568368682/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzgxZTVlMi1lYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVprV0kaGFWyWoEbU2c9eNaMq_93a_R5WH0FhOM0NO0=)
Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman, Robert Garcia.
We're all seeing the news: Democracy is under attack.
Donald Trump and Texas MAGA extremists are using redistricting in Texas to rig the next midterm elections. But here in California, we’re fighting back. If Texas is going to punch, California will punch harder.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114854750/568368683/789508428?refcode=250908_RG_newdistrict-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzgxZTVlMi1lYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVprV0kaGFWyWoEbU2c9eNaMq_93a_R5WH0FhOM0NO0=)
We just learned about California’s new map – and I have big news: If passed, I’ll be running in the new 42nd District.
This district includes my hometown of Long Beach and stretches along the coast through Huntington Beach and Newport Beach.
**But I’ll be honest: this is a much tougher district.** In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. _Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114854751/568368684/789508428?refcode=250908_RG_newdistrict-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzgxZTVlMi1lYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVprV0kaGFWyWoEbU2c9eNaMq_93a_R5WH0FhOM0NO0=)
I love my current congressional district, but I understand the stakes. Democracy is on the line.
**So I’m ready to fight and run in this new, harder district. But I’m going to become a top target for national Republicans. They’re going to spend millions and pull out all the stops to try and defeat me – to silence _us._ **
Here’s what they don’t know: this amazing grassroots team is ready to fight back. Because that’s what this moment calls for: speaking out, getting involved, and fighting for a democracy that represents _all of us._
**[Can you rush a grassroots donation today to help me kick off my campaign in this new, tougher district – and to help Democrats flip the House, end Trump’s power grab, and defend our sacred democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114854752/568368685/789508428?refcode=250908_RG_newdistrict-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzgxZTVlMi1lYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVprV0kaGFWyWoEbU2c9eNaMq_93a_R5WH0FhOM0NO0=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114854753/568368686/-309737922?refcode=250908_RG_newdistrict-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzgxZTVlMi1lYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVprV0kaGFWyWoEbU2c9eNaMq_93a_R5WH0FhOM0NO0=)
Thanks for being by my side. I'm ready to fight — let's get to work!
Robert
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114854754/568368687/-309737922?refcode=250908_RG_newdistrict-RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzgxZTVlMi1lYjhjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iVprV0kaGFWyWoEbU2c9eNaMq_93a_R5WH0FhOM0NO0=)

clean_body: I’m running to defend democracy = Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman, Robert Garcia. We're all seeing the news: Democracy is under attack. Donald Trump and Texas MAGA extremists are using redistricting in Texas to rig the next midterm elections. But here in California, we’re fighting back. If Texas is going to punch, California will punch harder. = We just learned about California’s new map – and I have big news: If passed, I’ll be running in the new 42nd District. This district includes my hometown of Long Beach and stretches along the coast through Huntington Beach and Newport Beach. But I’ll be honest: this is a much tougher district. In 2024, our district voted for Kamala Harris by 32 points. Our new district voted for Kamala Harris by less than half that. = I love my current congressional district, but I understand the stakes. Democracy is on the line. So I’m ready to fight and run in this new, harder district. But I’m going to become a top target for national Republicans. They’re going to spend millions and pull out all the stops to try and defeat me – to silence us. Here’s what they don’t know: this amazing grassroots team is ready to fight back. Because that’s what this moment calls for: speaking out, getting involved, and fighting for a democracy that represents all of us. = = Thanks for being by my side. I'm ready to fight — let's get to work! Robert = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

## Churches Are UNDER ATTACK
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12768.1.f4c81c603f2d77a027cc020ac13bdcdf)
---
Right now there is a **MAJOR escalation** of attacks upon Churches in the United States of America. Since 2018 there has been an **increase of over 700%** according to the **Family Research Council**. In 2018 there were 50 reported attacks on churches (**less than 1 per week**). In 2024 there were 415 reported attacks on churches (**more than 1 per day**). I want to **offer two thoughts**. **First to the Pastors** reading this.
Take measures at your church to prevent these attacks. At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12769.1.421e0bde0974b8f2aa7fab23e3a3242a), I am beyond grateful for our security team that watches over the House every service to make sure our people are _SAFE_. But we also partner with local law enforcement every service as well. The police car stationed at the front of our church, I believe, will prevent 99% of bad actors from even attempting something they should not. **We must be as wise as serpents and as harmless as doves.** **Second to Believers** reading this.
Don't you dare stop attending church! God has not given us a spirit of fear but instead one of power, love and a sound mind (**2 Tim 1:7** ). We are told in **Hebrews 10** that as the Day of the Lord gets near that many believers will stop attending church but we are command not to stop gathering together because we need one another. **Do not let the enemy intimidate you from going to the House of the Lord**. Although the stats are _disheartening_ , history proves that whenever the Church is attacked, she always _flourishes_. These attacks will backfire on the enemy and the Church of the Lord Jesus Christ in America will prevail and be even more effective because of them. **Pray for the Body of Christ and the local churches throughout America.** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---

If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12776.1.d0830600b9b258fc4914153382ab7326)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12777.1.472f006528efdd18f9bd2c3d687cecd5)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12778.1.8b4b037cf49adfdb7c20842a36456174). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12779.1.ced15aed49a5fd35fe0b445f4fd88edc) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12780.1.a58e1a643dfb9ee5130b203233fda884) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24421607.12781.1.c9e18d4d313ef230a83c50fd631a0389) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: Team Downing
subject: Is it time for indictments?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Explosive docs show Obama officials pushed false Russia narrative. Is it time for indictments?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-DXFJq_3BA)Peter,
Barack Obama has just been named in a criminal referral tied to the origins of the Trump–Russia collusion hoax.
[According to newly declassified documents released by Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard](https://trk.emails.troydowning.), Obama and top members of his administration may have manufactured intelligence to create the narrative that Donald Trump colluded with Russia, despite knowing no such evidence existed.
**Now, the Department of Justice has launched a "strike force" to investigate. **
With Attorney General Pam Bondi and FBI Director Kash Patel leading the charge, every shred of evidence is being examined, and no name is off-limits.
_Obama. Brennan. Clapper. Comey. Rice. Clinton. McCabe._
The list goes on.
So we’re asking you, Peter, a top conservative supporter: [Should Barack Obama be investigated, indicted, and arrested?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CAST YOUR VOTE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-6YxA9Cg)This may be the biggest political scandal in American history, and justice cannot be selective.
If the evidence points to crimes, no one – **_not even a former President_** — is above the law.
Time is short, and the DOJ strike force is moving fast. Please submit your critical input before 11:59 p.m.
Thank you,
**GOP Alerts (via Team Downing)**| |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I missed my deadline. This could be very serious.
body:
This is the last thing I wanted to say.
| | | | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
Friend – This is the last thing I wanted to say.
But I have to be honest with you: **I missed my fundraising deadline.**
And in this game, deadlines aren’t just dates on a calendar: **They’re markers of strength.**
**When we miss a deadline, the Democrats and RINO elites smell blood in the water.**
They’ll twist this into a narrative that I’m slipping... _That I’ve lost support._ They’re already scanning the reports, looking for any sign of weakness. And right now, I’m fighting from behind.
**_[That’s why this is so serious, Friend](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_****.**
This campaign has never been about _playing it safe_ or _going along with the status quo._
I’m fighting every day for our values, for our freedom, and for the America we love.
But to keep fighting, I need to show strength, and I need to do it now.
**[We have a narrow window to recover from this setback, and that means I urgently need your help](https://link.email.greene4congress.).**
[RUSH URGENT DONATION >>>](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
You’ve been with me in the trenches before. You know what we’re up against. And I wouldn’t come to you like this if I wasn’t truly counting on you.
If we can rally in the next 24 hours and show a surge of grassroots support, we can flip this narrative. We can prove them wrong. **But I can’t do it without you.**
**_[Please, help keep me in the fight](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
For Our Nation,
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT Call to Action: Last chance to sign & call senators
body:
Tell Congress it’s time to listen to the American people and pass the SAVE Act!
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/GmIZW8ywLYvB1poMO0gjypW7q1oxijHHH522BNaarEw=421)Patriot–Only citizens should vote in American elections, which is why the Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is so important to election integrity, and yet the Senate has not brought it to the floor for a vote.We will be heading to D.C. on Wednesday with Americans’ signatures urging Congress to secure American elections—now! But we still need your help! We need you to:
* [_**Sign the petition**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fonlycitizensvote%2F/1/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/J7OuONV0-gbZZI3GlO6RJiXjGlPnk47HZQyVOSGiGSU=421) immediately supporting the SAVE Act if you haven’t yet.
* Share it with your friends and family immediately: [_**tpp.me/saveactpetition**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp.me%2Fsaveactpetition/1/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/g8uchPIc1rpMqaP929JfOSoGnZauOxcCpXOkeJjCZj0=421)
* Call your senators to tell them that it’s well past time they bring it to the floor for a vote. Find your senators’ [_**contact information**_**.**](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.senate.gov%2Fsenators%2Fsenators-contact.htm/1/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/sTMyodj4NNG_3w8CbHvDL1d86_-FzuP5SQIRKCVYYtw=421)

Americans will not sit back and watch as our votes continue to be diluted by noncitizens due to loopholes in the National Voter Registration Act and the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act.Stand up and make your voice heard, today! Call your senators now and tell them to bring the SAVE Act to vote on the floor of the Senate—and to vote YES! Thank you!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/rXK1iZd9XHzt5_S5Zv1S6oK8oUr5nKkEFwEEwjL_Wz0=421) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/rLKim0NEDC2lZnjk07by3JgQD4Nx9p0QwSq5ApTlMXQ=421)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/v8gbukqD8wqZholSfOSmzHQBVcmnTn8YPd02XKrFmgo=421) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/010001992aefa31f-006454df-c0ce-495a-85ff-664a77557e86-000000/KZYK0ePAZx7Lu_BTckGT9kAdaiA1jShsmFdX6HmfZFc=421).

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: We can't go back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
USA TODAY: SCOTUS has been asked to overturn same-sex marriage.
This is serious: Infamous former county clerk Kim Davis just asked the Supreme Court to overturn marriage equality. In 2015, the Supreme Court ruled in _Obergefell v. Hodges _that marriage equality was the law of the land. It was the moment of hope, love and dignity for millions of LGBTQ+ Americans and their families. We thought it was settled. Yet today, that hard-won right is once again under attack. **Let's send a clear message: We won't go back. We will defend marriage equality. body:
Paid Democrat activists are already flocking to our cities. Leftist propaganda and disinformation are spreading at an alarming rate online. | Fellow American, I need to be blunt.

Our fundraising for the month of September is off to a slow start, severely hindering our ability to reach voters and counter the spread of the Left’s disinformation campaign.

That’s why I’m forced to ask, _**what are we waiting for?**_

Paid Democrat activists are already flocking to our cities. Leftist propaganda and disinformation are spreading at an alarming rate online. All of it bankrolled by a small army of ultra-liberal megadonors bent on ending our Senate Majority and undoing all of President Trump’s achievements.

We don’t have the luxury to wait around until 2026, because the Democrats sure aren’t.

We need to be running at full speed right now, and we can’t do that if our fundraising numbers continue to lag behind. Because I guarantee you, Democrats aren’t having the same problems.

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: the biggest and most competitive election in U.S. Senate history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
**Jon Ossoff’s race in Georgia is going to be one of the biggest and most competitive elections in U.S. Senate history.**
_Cook Political Report_ and _Inside Elections_ have both ranked this election “TOSS-UP,” and NBC News says Jon is Democrats' “most vulnerable Senator” running for reelection.
_And Republicans know it._ That’s why stopping Jon is MAGA’s #1 priority. And it’s why by the time Election Day rolls around, it’s likely that right-wing Super PACs and MAGA billionaires will have poured hundreds of millions of dollars into the race.
**Standing up to an onslaught like that is not something anyone can do alone._Jon needs our help._ So we’re asking:**
[**Can you rush a $5 contribution to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250908-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=739%2E5691347%2EAq6hbN)
Peter, in a race this close, every dollar raised, every door knocked, and every voter reached could be the difference between winning and losing.
In 2021, we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won.
We know with your support, this team can win again.
[**Please use this link to donate $5 today and help ensure we have the resources to build the strongest possible campaign — one that will bring home a landslide victory.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250908-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=739%2E5691347%2EAq6hbN)
Thank you,
Jon Ossoff for Senate
**[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250908-1-subs-b&t=3&akid=739%2E5691347%2EAq6hbN)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=739%2E5691347%2EAq6hbN) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=739%2E5691347%2EAq6hbN) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: "Making America Healthy Again"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
The “Make America Healthy Again” regime is dangerous, Peter. Our public health is the _last_ thing that should be politicized in this country, but the Trump administration is putting millions of people in Hawaii and across the country at risk. Purging the CDC of its top scientists. Relying on false medical data to make health care decisions. Slashing pediatric brain cancer research. Kicking 15 million people off their health insurance. These are just a few of the many things Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has done to destroy every aspect of public health in our country. This was true before he was confirmed by the Senate, and it’s even more true today: **Robert F. Kennedy Jr. represents a grave threat to our country’s health and the future of our country.** **[It’s time for him to resign, Peter. This is personal.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114856759/568375663/1328794144?refcode=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjk0YmU3LWYxOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YwowhF_5BMDKrXh8UjEBmXGHNOhuKZqs0CnQ4CpE4yo=&emci=4cb517e1-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ve been a lot of things in my life — an actor, an activist, a troublemaker. But I never expected to add _cancer survivor_ to that list. In 2022, I was diagnosed with non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Months of chemotherapy. Countless doctor visits. Some very hard days. I survived because of great doctors and decades of scientific research that led to the treatments that saved my life. Now, Donald Trump is systematically destroying that same research, and I refuse to stay silent. Trump decided that American cancer research was somehow too “woke,” so he paused NIH grant-making for over two months, blocking **$1.5 billion** in funding and effectively halting clinical trials that patients desperately need to survive. Here’s what his war on “woke” science has already cost us:
* More than **240 cancer-related NIH grants terminated** (representing an estimated $355 million in lost funding)
* **$35 million** in VA cancer research thrown into jeopardy
* **$420 million** slashed from Defense Department medical research, including breast and ovarian cancer studies

And it’s not just that they're cutting vital research. Trump officials are maintaining a hit list of keywords that trigger grant terminations — words like “trans,” “diverse,” “women,” and “expression.” Think about that. Cancer researchers have lost life-saving grants because of Trump’s hateful “anti-DEI” crusade. It’s despicable. But that’s exactly why I’m staying in the fight. **Cancer made me think even more about the time I have left and how I want to use it. I don’t want to look back with regrets. I want to know that I did everything in my power to fight for the future — for our health and for the generations that come after us.** At JanePAC, we’re building the strongest possible defense by electing bold leaders in key districts where we can actually move the needle — leaders who believe in science and will fight like hell to protect our health and our planet. **[But we can’t do this work without your help. We’re up against Big Oil’s super PACs and an entire MAGA machine that has already proven they will put lives at risk to push their deadly agenda. So when I say it’s now or never, I mean it. Will you help us continue this fight with a grassroots contribution today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114856762/568375668/2105508926?refcode=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjk0YmU3LWYxOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YwowhF_5BMDKrXh8UjEBmXGHNOhuKZqs0CnQ4CpE4yo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114856770/568375674/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjk0YmU3LWYxOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YwowhF_5BMDKrXh8UjEBmXGHNOhuKZqs0CnQ4CpE4yo=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114856773/568375682/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0ff94be7-f18c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZjk0YmU3LWYxOGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YwowhF_5BMDKrXh8UjEBmXGHNOhuKZqs0CnQ4CpE4yo=)

Fellow Conservative,

You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen.

I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. _**On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation.**_

**Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms.** I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love.

Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. >From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. _**This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate.

**_ **But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat.** I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Fellow Conservative, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is **quietly building its war chest**. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters.

**[I’m asking for just $5 today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbb4d23fea794563869adcee6dc18b33&_e=HXm2oQudh-Hyz4BqNVOghkt6KUKXGMdeo_f7kAYBmLGBl5mz32FagVYUFS_rq_7NAcif29xpeAHqB9m3-QlkL7bIttb3reS5X-NARZxHSgxK_u6-3mUMviX25iBl_GJ-YC0ta0e_Ga_oMvlZwnXlRBh6UfoDuRnbFGxdGz8hhJJ24ro27QsTYxW0hTQ5J0x_Z-dn5G7CN5WlUN4AhM6rLInBFPmweToQwkdRiNhXecw7-ltF_k1kZxRsvnbJ6qkMSyGeNfsATSb4GA7R2vz9BFyLs-nCKdyCacutCvoT4P492dFivz1PTJyiZSld6YQehkOfP2-pcwAphUXtlMphfw4fQwmhCjvPeuAgjhJHk8sR0wd-dYxPC_sXXuQlDJfAlvDZezKgPc_hZg0tDUBqmitLwzpSwWPB4IXMPXWnpH7AEBkhmRHGTJsr_XFuWQbGEYp9Pf3Zaeef7ZVjnjOAURACCfTCJD9-j7QJvNkqpdp2cSc6iP0niKzFiPfAkHRBr6-Ce-zsD9pwO5yCA9bWmRuqM6lpn8qe3jPMhw52yvnGq85xXPlUd2CcohiqBjhdsSpngMcpxmuwhFGS3DgdzKf1Lupk94Sa6a4dxc6wfeXkCE-abKj2CqvREEIomDeb8_z8openkIhq4O5Zhu-_XZUkEvMAOHbUt8JgvM-5ZImuF0zdohc-btI4fQ47SMqPEJbamTxd6btMaWmASyGn6SDbejfavsDbB2I0NlXj1DqOcZRlqXIuC0_oXxy5xymZLCHtBrF3QfASI8AiOGjckw%3D%3D)** It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington.

As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, _**not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on.**_

[**CHIP IN $5
**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbb4d23fea794563869adcee6dc18b33&_e=HXm2oQudh-Hyz4BqNVOghkt6KUKXGMdeo_f7kAYBmLGBl5mz32FagVYUFS_rq_7NAcif29xpeAHqB9m3-QlkL7bIttb3reS5X-NARZxHSgxK_u6-3mUMviX25iBl_GJ-YC0ta0e_Ga_oMvlZwnXlRBh6UfoDuRnbFGxdGz8hhJJ24ro27QsTYxW0hTQ5J0x_Z-dn5G7CN5WlUN4AhM6rLInBFPmweToQwkdRiNhXecw7-ltF_k1kZxRsvnbJ6qkMSyGeNfsATSb4GA7R2vz9BBmnGh6Zmvcqlbgqm9_KAN9qKGjvUd8kT8g3ifRqNQrtfGqfLMKQDRPCy7lKr_Pf92F_pKG2Tae-n2NbQtaeC7rEFn_fwnHi9P5hc9jQFI3PxS6xfMPoG9EBBCCT44XQZ24MIqherwvrHCn86zcdQ1uI4PZVawnDwW5P1_lrwMbLFMow6sL8ggp_jaL_rxJeOaEWRkSGf9q2_7jU_EwHS9CtjjTu2V6dto7AukZgldT82NK2AQo7oEBVZDn257QTRJKJwfb60nMj4bYO5wYLXBzngkUKIEf0pueaxqjaZa7B0IlVKWJHJaJVARwtJpUc105VUt4JaxZ9g402LjpXTyBeEbgaaE_veHCC_QxAMc7ALnu13uLdiV-2K6ky23Ybp7WjxCwUfnEGmqV0thucIxBoa04oJjg4Qilx5oWtulqMU-nbaYOuisXiOBKEH6IGdhEGE4nBefrc26WxajbkqdoDaWcloIR96jj9Dc3p38itf2-l3-jkmlqEbAztAsBodg%3D%3D)
**Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable.** I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

Proud Minnesotan **_

body:
| | | **** **** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCt6gt3nev0IDvPxYqGlK4P24QsgmVAMhGXEWSqUv8Zx8XGgsp4Fc4vwO5CLGIl27fAhdeJ8-o8wo4-htL7T0CB9ybCTB_xLqFnClW7UWeJrO27F-K2P2Ey5s5C5pwrVkLJRp-5JqdroVhZz04DAqvV3XlTJLSkDeuZNH2eKkaIvYqhxROcN9l3NC5zcK1NhM0sXrFRkBIYIfL4LdLcCwD9cFLvEB7P9mp_ckvX9aWbRAEn5hxmvBzp5mjeLoqoPFCLlVQCB436zHenLp-IJjJ3k9g3HGpL3H74MsZEpFovZA/4jq/MR0_rdGKTMG868K9k0mXmg/h0/h001.I_G8yhNdkrI22Ls69bDgKNI5dhM5OEMdri1qFPYO9As)
**[Donate today to DEFEAT Republicans - they put RFK Jr in charge of our public health!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAQcHBGZTQyASHdftBqMbHvaM67lJJs1zDETiQ2AQ3s9Kej1bPopPTeswETTx3Jz80uLNWgq2L7z4gR5Ej5jik4SkZr_Awm-Eigi1lOvSacNzCxrz4gZd5woHP0p8z_ktNz8UYNTRFlFwFBfNn9n_hsgYlefN-IpxqKbSluPvjO_zBdD50bKePlYidhkJ6KEzZpUk-KH3rAt9jbrA_QSmMwTo3eC9qDyJ58daXfa0SzNW6jZmu9Y7NORfMmJoqzcR2Mu1PRmTtge8vIiFpZizCy4fJO2NaFAFu7RVtofnUAQQ/4jq/MR0_rdGKTMG868K9k0mXmg/h1/h001.StkE8cPCnuuyjda98pa5IZCcel6FjC0onr8ZLl-oM_w) **
**[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAXTZvBaxwdbCtQWh1rQQdr_KIPOty4KESIlpqVCWOOyGrFYDup1IROXnzbOsUfcM3RM5bcuaKbDCTmvOzPrTXNty0AOlQXVEWf3zQPQ8crOWZcONq6T5tBgT3isIP-xuyE-43KQF5P4521G5vxnFDrzE51I_xT53wbsfpAJajeFafBoE45tWgca6o23CKDXLy9Qph4UpQ4smc-T9QYXMVyfwAbhxbS3Lkqd2joOmN5mAGLXCBD7bfGmSo5m2QFThLRia8qYeUz2sl-b_gMvOITFWWllftmiDbVvx6T-78vVw/4jq/MR0_rdGKTMG868K9k0mXmg/h2/h001.ZH9dd21e0EPOlCRegnjdZm_NBg_RE3gQGXWcKDmaC3I)**
* * *
It’s time to sound the alarm! RFK Jr. and the Republicans backing him must be stopped. Our lives literally depend on it.
Breaking his promises and spouting misinformation, RFK Jr., who has no medical or scientific credentials, recently declared that the COVID-19 vaccine is no longer approved for healthy individuals under 65.
But wait, it gets worse: his so-called “guidelines” have created significant barriers for those who desperately want and need the vaccine.
_Even stage 4 cancer[patients](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUmjuEfvdTi8_1XNweQZyqL2mc3FWwAYoqyeRzavIf5HxA_l4eLRLZ8B9cFCcP4u92vITAT7eRPLg7Cr2rNRNMxeFH5eMiUbtdz0eji2uoE4ilSwOx2OLd_bXwLWHcUUE7_VoLP43U6ehmbrOVo5xcfAn4J5gyhICE80regI-jXFw0sUqsxqAobnbFGvyhOLH-66uDwq1uhlcks8LISRPDfzn3rHntbDWmDWUlZakhbAeD4Oi2Pp-BVc-BXHdZlYpy_QPpnU8FqC8xzjn2WTUFuOKUdGf8vpxnNB4lIfiWDYfAygQhPWcbs17J62Y-k1fQLqpGKq8tiPkWeEZ6yTnsgA48L-5Q1biV8xmVxRUxngnAmuF0rfnc_XU6gTC1bmhaj9pGPlUCzaQbLe40joM5W6fkMzJL9HuhkUeRNW1wGQ/4jq/MR0_rdGKTMG868K9k0mXmg/h3/h001.-K9_Pg5fcVkzWEXkZH_6QmTVb5QyKoAiYettQiV-Spw) and others with serious underlying conditions are being denied the vaccine!_
__Democratic governors are scrambling to allow access to vaccines in their states.
This reckless rollback of vaccine access puts our community directly in harm’s way, endangering countless lives.
**That’s where Able Dems comes in. We are dedicated to electing Democrats with disabilities and our allies, leaders who prioritize evidence, access, and inclusion.**
******[Will you join us in our fight? Breaking his promises and spouting misinformation, RFK Jr., who has no medical or scientific credentials, recently declared that the COVID-19 vaccine is no longer approved for healthy individuals under 65. But wait, it gets worse: his so-called “guidelines” have created significant barriers for those who desperately want and need the vaccine. Even stage 4 cancer and others with serious underlying conditions are being denied the vaccine! Democratic governors are scrambling to allow access to vaccines in their states. This reckless rollback of vaccine access puts our community directly in harm’s way, endangering countless lives. That’s where Able Dems comes in. We are dedicated to electing Democrats with disabilities and our allies, leaders who prioritize evidence, access, and inclusion. **** ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. During major COVID-19 surges, unvaccinated adults faced a much higher risk of death compared to their vaccinated peers. People with disabilities, who often deal with chronic conditions, live in congregate settings, and face barriers to healthcare, have suffered disproportionately throughout the pandemic. Yet, the very person responsible for our nation’s public health continues to insist that vaccines don’t save lives. The facts tell a different story. We desperately need champions who will defend science, protect disability rights, and combat disinformation. That’s why Able Dems is committed to supporting Democrats with disabilities and our allies at every level. ** Thank you for standing with us! -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Congress reconvened in Washington last week, returning to the same chaos and dysfunction that has come to define 2025 as well as to new challenges and affronts to the Constitution, the Congress, and the country. Of course, I was returning from Texas, where President Trump’s authoritarian consolidation of power was on full display in the fight over redrawing Texas’ congressional map in August.
And that is why it is all the more important to me to thank you now for all the ways you are showing up for the important work we are doing to protect our democracy, in August and beyond. Together, we are meeting the moment—in Texas and in Washington. And that is critical.
The challenges we face are unlike any that most of us remember. And our #TeamLizzie volunteers were everywhere in August in response: testifying against the new, discriminatory congressional maps, spreading the work to neighbors about them, and rallying to oppose them. We launched multiple days of action. And our work paid off.
Although Governor Abbott signed the new congressional maps at the end of August, the fight for fair maps continues. The maps are already being challenged in court, where a three-judge panel will hear arguments beginning on October 1. Together, we are going to keep raising awareness, organizing across the state, and fighting back against the dangerous and undemocratic power grab from now to next November.
We have not only the opportunity to win back the House majority in 2026 but also the obligation to do so; to do everything we can to make the redistricting power grab in Texas and beyond backfire; to reject the policies and politics of the Republicans controlling the Congress; and to stand up for the rule of law and the power of the people.
September is going to be a busy month full of expected, and I’m sure, unexpected challenges. But I am ready to continue fighting for Texans and all Americans. And I am grateful to have you and your support in this work. Thank you.
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

clean_body: ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [] Congress reconvened in Washington last week, returning to the same chaos and dysfunction that has come to define 2025 as well as to new challenges and affronts to the Constitution, the Congress, and the country. Of course, I was returning from Texas, where President Trump’s authoritarian consolidation of power was on full display in the fight over redrawing Texas’ congressional map in August. And that is why it is all the more important to me to thank you now for all the ways you are showing up for the important work we are doing to protect our democracy, in August and beyond. Together, we are meeting the moment—in Texas and in Washington. And that is critical. The challenges we face are unlike any that most of us remember. And our #TeamLizzie volunteers were everywhere in August in response: testifying against the new, discriminatory congressional maps, spreading the work to neighbors about them, and rallying to oppose them. We launched multiple days of action. And our work paid off. Although Governor Abbott signed the new congressional maps at the end of August, the fight for fair maps continues. The maps are already being challenged in court, where a three-judge panel will hear arguments beginning on October 1. Together, we are going to keep raising awareness, organizing across the state, and fighting back against the dangerous and undemocratic power grab from now to next November. We have not only the opportunity to win back the House majority in 2026 but also the obligation to do so; to do everything we can to make the redistricting power grab in Texas and beyond backfire; to reject the policies and politics of the Republicans controlling the Congress; and to stand up for the rule of law and the power of the people. September is going to be a busy month full of expected, and I’m sure, unexpected challenges. But I am ready to continue fighting for Texans and all Americans. And I am grateful to have you and your support in this work. Thank you. Together we can do anything, Lizzie Signature [] DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] 3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098 PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one shot! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW, the polls are TIED. Peter,

I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris last November. _**Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States?**_

**As a former Navy SEAL, I can’t.** Tim Walz personifies everything that I’m not: **arrogant, overconfident, hateful, mean-spirited, progressive, deceitful — and on top of it all, a liar.**

And here’s the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse. She’s more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous.

_They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota._
_They both begin their speeches with land acknowledgments._
_They both see Republicans not as a loyal opposition, but as enemies to be crushed._

And if they get their way, they’ll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE.

It’s about anyone who believes in this country’s founding values. Walz and his allies think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’re “a**holes.” They think we’ll take it.

I’ve faced far worse. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11. **I’ve served our nation in over 70 countries. I know what it takes to win against chaos and extremism. And I know what it means to serve something bigger than yourself.**

This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. But with your help, I can deliver our team a win in this critical battleground race.

clean_body: You probably thought you’d seen it all - turns out, you haven’t | Peter, I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris last November. Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States? As a former Navy SEAL, I can’t. Tim Walz personifies everything that I’m not: arrogant, overconfident, hateful, mean-spirited, progressive, deceitful — and on top of it all, a liar. And here’s the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse. She’s more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous. They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota. They both begin their speeches with land acknowledgments. They both see Republicans not as a loyal opposition, but as enemies to be crushed. And if they get their way, they’ll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE. This fight matters. This isn’t just about insults, or even about Walz. It’s about you. It’s about me. It’s about anyone who believes in this country’s founding values. Walz and his allies think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’re “aholes.” They think we’ll take it. I’ve faced far worse. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11. I’ve served our nation in over 70 countries. I know what it takes to win against chaos and extremism. And I know what it means to serve something bigger than yourself. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. But with your help, I can deliver our team a win in this critical battleground race. If you’re as outraged as I am that Walz would wish death on the President of the United States, You have a choice. Close this email and let them get away with it — or join me, and help stop Tim Walz and his radical allies in their tracks. I’ve been in tough fights before. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: We're Getting Crushed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
To put it short: our opponent is angry. He ran over one of our yard signs with his sign-bedecked armored truck.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/652429d24881/were-getting-crushed?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=cae32be2b7&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friends,
I'm Wilbur with the Dr. Gary Miller for Delegate campaign. I'm here with a report live from the front lines of our dark-horse election.

**To put it short: our opponent is angry**. **He ran over one of our yard signs with his sign-bedecked armored truck.**
---
|
---
| | Over the weekend, Danville held its first inaugural marathon. Over 800 runners went through our hilly city, from Caesar's Casino to the new YMCA. They went through our revitalized Downtown, by our beautiful churches, and across the Martin Luther King Jr. Bridge. Despite the heat, it was a rousing community success for our "Comeback City."

Republican Delegate nominee Madison Whittle was not content with **just putting signs on his rental and commercial properties** around the marathon route. He wasn't satisfied after **self-funding $60,000** of his own campaign war chest. Like this **new breed of Republican firebrands** , his aims are simple and brutal.
**He doesn't want any alternative or opposition to his personal vendettas and right-wing agenda.**
Dr. Gary Miller has served our community as a **cardiologist for 36 years** , running his own small business. On council, he's been an outspoken advocate for **building new housing and repairing our public schools.** His leadership got a new fire station and police station built for our first responders. In his free time, he's an avid outdoorsman and baseball coach, a biker and hiker, one of the big proponents of building the Danville Riverwalk Trail.
Almost everywhere I go, I find someone who got to have more time with their mother or father due to Dr. Miller's service. But we have a lot more work to do before November 4th.
**If we raise $100, we get another batch of yard signs, to replace the ones we just lost.****If we raise $500, we get another round of door hangers to hand out to our neighbors.****If we raise $1000, we get to spread the word on a crucial gospel radio station.**
I've spent almost my whole life in Halifax County and in Danville. It's not as red as you might think.******
But Dr. Miller needs your help.**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=ef744ecfef&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | **No matter what, it's home and it's worth fighting for.**
Signing off,
Wilbur McLaughlinDanville City Public Schools, Class of 2016

---
| | | | | [](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=eceed8e018&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
[](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=d96b7e97db&e=606d7e9aa2)
---

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21128%2E878179%2EWmc-aM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21128%2E878179%2EWmc-aM).**

Peter - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them!

Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this!

You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears.

_U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears_
---
I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. _**I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Peter.**_

There's a saying: _Once a Marine, always a Marine._ Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country.

But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD!

**And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!!** Now, Democrats want me _GONE_. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; _the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative!_

Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be _EVEN CLOSER_! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Peter.

I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | Peter - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them! Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this! You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Peter. There's a saying: Once a Marine, always a Marine. Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country. But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD! And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!! Now, Democrats want me GONE. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative! Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be EVEN CLOSER! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Peter. I'm running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people. Liberal billionaires & Hollywood elites aren't bankrolling me; I'm counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me win! And the fact is , if we don't have the support of every conservative reading this email, I have no idea how my team and I are going to keep up with the millions and MILLIONS of dollars the Democrats have stacked against us, Peter! So please do not sit on the sidelines - make a donation to support me today, Peter! Thanks so much for your support, Winsome Earle-Sears US Marine Corporal | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and **turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them.** Under his watch, the DOJ and it's Civil Rights Division -- _once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department_ \-- has **abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote.** Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. **We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote** under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. **[In the face of escalating attacks on our right to vote, increasing amounts of voter disinformation, and voter intimidation tactics on the rise – will you stand with us and chip in $25 today to help us defend voting rights?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114858711/568382728/1498593520?refcode=090825_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0NGM0NjlmLWY3OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KY0fveXvzL8zTRTIJKfTFL1m9tJ8fY0My63VnOMVGYQ=)**

clean_body: CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | | On her first day as attorney general, Pam Bondi penned a memo requiring DOJ lawyers to “ zealously ” advocate for administration positions or face disciplinary action and potential firing. It's clear we can no longer depend on the office that was created to defend our rights to actually defend them anymore. = | | | = Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them. Under his watch, the DOJ and it's Civil Rights Division -- once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department \-- has abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote. Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. name: David Hogg
subject: This is the stuff that really pisses me off
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We don’t need armored trucks. We need education and healthcare.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250908-1&t=1&akid=2638%2E587540%2Eq7ku55)
Peter, I’m sure you’ve heard about Donald Trump sending the National Guard to DC.
I live here — and this is what the scene looks like passing Union Station these days:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250908_1_dc?refcode=em20250908-2638&amount=5&refcode2=2638_587540_q7ku55&akid=2638%2E587540%2Eq7ku55)
National Guard troops are riding around in a $500,000 MRAP — yeah, a Mine-Resistant Ambush Protected military vehicle designed for war zones — being used to pick up trash on the streets of our nation’s capital.
**This is the kind of stuff that really pisses me off.**
We’ve got Republican politicians who cry about the cost of food stamps. Who say we can’t afford to pay teachers more or expand healthcare. But when it comes to sending armored trucks into our cities like we’re at war with our own people? _Crickets._
Can someone explain to me when IEDs became part of DC’s crime problem?
Let’s be honest: This isn’t about public safety. It’s about control. It’s about Trump flexing like a wannabe dictator. **It's a strongman tactic, not a solution.**
And here’s the thing: If we don’t fight back politically, _it’s only going to get worse._
That’s why we started Leaders We Deserve. Because the only way to stop Trumpism — to stop this twisted version of “law and order” that tramples over civil rights and common sense — is to elect a new generation of leaders who give a damn about people.
Leaders who believe in care, not control.
Leaders who will fund classrooms instead of combat vehicles.
If you’re as sick of this as I am, let’s do something about it. **[Chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us elect young, unapologetically progressive leaders who will fight for our communities — not terrorize them.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250908_1_dc?refcode=em20250908-2638&amount=5&refcode2=2638_587540_q7ku55&akid=2638%2E587540%2Eq7ku55)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250908_1_dc?amount=5&refcode=em20250908-2638&refcode2=2638_587540_q7ku55&akid=2638%2E587540%2Eq7ku55)**
The future doesn’t belong to strongmen. It belongs to _us._ Let’s go claim it.
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250908-1&t=2&refcode2=2638_587540_q7ku55&akid=2638%2E587540%2Eq7ku55)**
