subject: I’m tired, but…I have hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
This work is personal for me. I’m where I am because other women lifted me up, believed in me, and showed me that I belonged in politics. At Emerge, we’re building that same network of support every day for the women who will lead us forward.

| _[_**Please take a moment to read a personal message from our President and CEO, A’shanti Gholar. Anything you can give will make an impact, but if now is not the time, we still hope you’ll continue reading.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114858912/568383364/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNjJjZDczLWY4OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HsSCqckYPw_w9Pv7vf2QLrhWnSzxcyQqRpP6r-8E57g=)_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114858913/568383365/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNjJjZDczLWY4OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HsSCqckYPw_w9Pv7vf2QLrhWnSzxcyQqRpP6r-8E57g=)
---
Peter,

I’ll be honest with you: I’m tired. And I have a feeling that if you are paying attention, you probably are too.

The attacks on our rights are overwhelming. But that’s the point. **The opposition wants us so exhausted and demoralized that we stop fighting back.**

_But then I think about the women of Emerge._

I think about the 6,500+ women we’ve trained, with more than 1,200 alums serving in office today. I think about our alums in Texas who are standing up to extreme gerrymandering, about the Black women of our Seated Together program who are now in Congress, and about every candidate who puts her name on the ballot to serve her community.

**That’s what gives me hope. That’s why I keep going.**

This work is personal for me. I’m where I am because other women lifted me up, believed in me, and showed me that I belonged in politics. At Emerge, we’re building that same network of support every day for the women who will lead us forward.

[_**But here’s the truth: if we fall short of our fundraising goal, we may have to scale back. That means fewer women trained, fewer leaders ready, and fewer victories at a moment when we need them most. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us train more women to run, win, and lead?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114858915/568383367/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNjJjZDczLWY4OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HsSCqckYPw_w9Pv7vf2QLrhWnSzxcyQqRpP6r-8E57g=)

The fight ahead is not easy, but we cannot hand our opponents the victory of silence or surrender. Together, we can turn our anger into action, our exhaustion into energy, and our hope into the women leaders this country so desperately needs.

Thank you for standing with me,

A’shanti F. Gholar
President & CEO, Emerge [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114858917/568383369/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-09-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyNjJjZDczLWY4OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HsSCqckYPw_w9Pv7vf2QLrhWnSzxcyQqRpP6r-8E57g=)

clean_body: This work is personal for me. I’m where I am because other women lifted me up, believed in me, and showed me that I belonged in politics. At Emerge, we’re building that same network of support every day for the women who will lead us forward. | = = Peter, I’ll be honest with you: I’m tired. And I have a feeling that if you are paying attention, you probably are too. The attacks on our rights are overwhelming. But that’s the point. The opposition wants us so exhausted and demoralized that we stop fighting back. But then I think about the women of Emerge. I think about the 6,500+ women we’ve trained, with more than 1,200 alums serving in office today. I think about our alums in Texas who are standing up to extreme gerrymandering, about the Black women of our Seated Together program who are now in Congress, and about every candidate who puts her name on the ballot to serve her community. That’s what gives me hope. That’s why I keep going. This work is personal for me. I’m where I am because other women lifted me up, believed in me, and showed me that I belonged in politics. At Emerge, we’re building that same network of support every day for the women who will lead us forward. = The fight ahead is not easy, but we cannot hand our opponents the victory of silence or surrender. Together, we can turn our anger into action, our exhaustion into energy, and our hope into the women leaders this country so desperately needs. Thank you for standing with me, A’shanti F. Gholar President & CEO, Emerge = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

subject: Sign on to demand RFK Jr’s immediate resignation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=Qdu4Wa2GVCdvp6fYr0aUBU7j9rXqV05rYFM5R%2FAjdz32BnR0Q1gLg6YeJpC6zi4SUycG1%2BwlTaAbhyFk2oaN07jvi5xvWMOhJw4plT9dziCwRTwWM72EfnR8cTg2djxfwfkrNPjcjGa7gS6d4l%2BAloON5T%2BlNddHv1TevJLLHDXh2PrRwKEcqQ6LQ9bXFZpo2bbBBhsMVtRtdTKNxtwQdnUCu1TpW4d%2BCd%2FUvqgF%2BW1Yrv%2BpNCSrjVhKMYG0fNMSt2wdhDvbwlN6HT9SIWXZ476XmeueqRObPOpYdbR4BSKT8yFNxkTDRfeWGJRGzqexRPLxGm8ykJDckurR3qNOZwEaEe6xU1F1qfwc6oKPWZVr5ZFzlAScEiKLAHztdQnssdngsVO03GiNPPaRGzUAsU%2Ffdg7jrM%2BV7LlOCAno0He2LBR5Sj4kYthgGwMpI8mD]

# [#]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/gwM1B9UozEqB-BkrJU-usg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gwM1B9UozEqB-BkrJU-usg2]

Hi, it’s Raul,

The U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services is responsible for ensuring the health and safety of the American public — but that’s not what Robert F. Kennedy Jr. cares about.

He’s on a dangerous mission to dismantle public trust in science by spreading misinformation and gutting critical institutions, and he’ll fire anyone who stands in his way.

We deserve better — and I know we can do better.

Recently, more than 1,000 current and former employees of the Department of Health and Human Services called for Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s resignation in a letter.

We need to stand with them.

Will you join me, members of the Congressional Democratic Doctors Caucus, and other health and scientific experts in demanding Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s resignation NOW? Let’s get 1,000 signatures to match the 1,000 federal health workers who signed on.

[https://secure.ngpvan.com/gwM1B9UozEqB-BkrJU-usg2]

SIGN ON TO DEMAND RFK Jr.’s RESIGNATION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/gwM1B9UozEqB-BkrJU-usg2]

Thank you for being in this fight with me,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: Team NDRC
subject: What Ron DeSantis thinks he’s “entitled to”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is a blatant attempt to rig the rules, and they aren’t even trying to hide it anymore.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114859125/568384127/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYzBkNmRlLWY4OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CwgMKtWsxzv8SxIQOnz_PFSRMdB4l7j-Fhlb_AlKKYk=&emci=dab6c24b-c28c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8bc0d6de-f88c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Did you see what’s happening in Florida, Peter? Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.” You guessed it: He wants an additional congressional seat for Republicans. This is a blatant, out-in-the-open attempt to rig the rules. They aren’t even trying to hide it anymore. DeSantis wants an excuse to do what Texas just did: A mid-decade redraw of their congressional map that will consolidate even more power for the Republican Party — all to make Trump happy. If we don’t stand up and fight back, this power grab could have enormous consequences in the 2026 midterms and beyond. [**Donate to help the NDRC hold the line against these radical attacks by Republicans on the census and our democracy. Every dollar you give will go towards stopping these cynical attempts to silence the will of the people.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114859126/568384128/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLUpdate_email_20250908-NDRC-Tier1-FLUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250908-NDRC-Tier1-FLUpdate_&utm_campaign=FLUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYzBkNmRlLWY4OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CwgMKtWsxzv8SxIQOnz_PFSRMdB4l7j-Fhlb_AlKKYk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

DeSantis’s move is just Republicans’ latest attempt to use their power to rig the rules of the game in their favor and lock in unearned power for years to come.
* In Texas, Republicans forced through a map designed to add five congressional seats to their majority, despite sparking national outrage.
* Missouri Republicans just called their own special session to redraw their maps against outcry and opposition across the state.
* Indiana Republican legislators were summoned to the White House, where they were pressured to follow suit and secure more seats through their own mid-decade gerrymander.

**It couldn’t be clearer: Republicans know they can’t win power fair and square in 2026, so they’re planning to cheat their way into power instead. In fact, Republicans like DeSantis think they’re “entitled” to it.**
[**Rush your donation and we’ll put it right to work fighting attacks on our democracy so that voters can be heard in 2026 and far beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114859133/568384135/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FLUpdate_email_20250908-NDRC-Tier1-FLUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250908-NDRC-Tier1-FLUpdate_&utm_campaign=FLUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYzBkNmRlLWY4OGMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CwgMKtWsxzv8SxIQOnz_PFSRMdB4l7j-Fhlb_AlKKYk=)
We can’t thank you enough for your support in this existential moment for our democracy.
— Team NDRC

clean_body: This is a blatant attempt to rig the rules, and they aren’t even trying to hide it anymore. | Did you see what’s happening in Florida, Peter? Governor Ron DeSantis is demanding a redo of the 2020 Census to “award Florida what we’re entitled to.” You guessed it: He wants an additional congressional seat for Republicans. This is a blatant, out-in-the-open attempt to rig the rules. They aren’t even trying to hide it anymore. DeSantis wants an excuse to do what Texas just did: A mid-decade redraw of their congressional map that will consolidate even more power for the Republican Party — all to make Trump happy. If we don’t stand up and fight back, this power grab could have enormous consequences in the 2026 midterms and beyond. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = DeSantis’s move is just Republicans’ latest attempt to use their power to rig the rules of the game in their favor and lock in unearned power for years to come. In Texas, Republicans forced through a map designed to add five congressional seats to their majority, despite sparking national outrage. Missouri Republicans just called their own special session to redraw their maps against outcry and opposition across the state. Indiana Republican legislators were summoned to the White House, where they were pressured to follow suit and secure more seats through their own mid-decade gerrymander. It couldn’t be clearer: Republicans know they can’t win power fair and square in 2026, so they’re planning to cheat their way into power instead. In fact, Republicans like DeSantis think they’re “entitled” to it. = We can’t thank you enough for your support in this existential moment for our democracy. — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: It doesn’t have to be this way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250908-863&t=1001&akid=873%2E251025%2EuHRdi9 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250908-863&t=1002&akid=873%2E251025%2EuHRdi9 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

In the state that built the American Dream, it shouldn’t be this hard to
get by. But corporate greed and a broken political system have tilted the
rules against us.

Every day, I hear from people who are working harder than ever, only to
feel like the ground is still slipping out from under them. The rent is
too high, the grocery bill keeps climbing, and healthcare is unaffordable.

It doesn’t have to be this way, and that’s why our campaign is centered
around making our economy work for the people who make it run by doing
these three things:

1. Get money out of politics. I’m the only candidate in this race who has
never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and I never will. That’s because I
believe our democracy should prioritize people, not the corporations
writing big checks.

2. Put money in your pocket. Our campaign is fighting for higher wages,
stronger unions, and an economy where one good job is enough to be
successful.

3. Medicare for All. Healthcare is a human right. I literally wrote the
book on Medicare for All, and I’ll fight to guarantee it for every
American, so that no one has to choose between paying their bills or
staying healthy.

This is the roadmap to break the grip corporations have on our economy and
finally build a system that works for all of us — but I can’t win this
competitive race without your support.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250908-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250908-863&refcode2=873_251025_uHRdi9&akid=873%2E251025%2EuHRdi9 ]Please, chip in $10 or whatever you can now to fuel this
grassroots campaign and build the future we deserve.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250908-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250908-863&refcode2=873_251025_uHRdi9&akid=873%2E251025%2EuHRdi9 ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=873%2E251025%2EuHRdi9
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1005&akid=873%2E251025%2EuHRdi9

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

body:
This isn’t just any report.
#
September is one of the most important months of our campaign yet.
**After September 30, Sarah will be legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers for the past three months to the Federal Elections Commission.**
And this isn’t just any report. It’s one of our _last_ reports before 2026, and it’s our _first_ since Donald Trump:
🚫 **Signed his big ugly bill slashing Medicaid** — the single largest cut to health care in American history — to _partially_ pay for tax breaks for billionaires
🚫 **Deployed the National Guard** into our streets to intimidate political opponents
🚫 **Launched his brazen election rigging scheme** , starting in Texas, where Republicans gerrymandered their maps to help the GOP cheat their way into holding the House majority
→ If we post a weak report, it will signal to Trump, National Republicans, and their billionaire donors that they can get away with their cruelty, corruption, and power grab.
→ But if we post a strong report, it will prove that public opinion is on our side and that we have the grassroots power to keep Sarah in Congress, flip the House, and deliver a real check on this president.
[**So let’s report our biggest number yet. Will you pitch in $5 to help Sarah keep up the fight for Delawareans and help House Democrats win?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250908?refcode=em20250908-2326&amount=5&refcode2=2326_21716_Q5OmP_&akid=2326%2E21716%2EQ5OmP_)

Thank you!
Team McBride

Peter,

**Gavin Newsom has SOLVED the violent crime epidemic, and honestly, I 'm impressed. He basically turned water into wine...**

He really got one over on me when his Press Office tweeted out that Alabama has "2X" the murder rate of Los Angeles.

_Well, I did some fact-check digging ..._

**It turns out that if you direct law enforcement agencies to STOP reporting crime data to the FBI, you can ELIMINATE violent crime from your state!**

_That would be akin to playing a football game but not putting 6 points on the scoreboard after your opponent scores a touchdown.**Can you really lose if the scoreboard doesn 't update?**_

Folks, Gavin "Newscum" can twist the data however he wants. The fact of the matter is, Americans are not stupid. We see the chaos, destruction, terror, and violence happening in cities like Los Angeles. We don't need unreported data to prove it.

[**I’m running for Governor of Alabama to show Gavin Newsom how a real Governor acts. Will you chip in $5 to help me win?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=31c2e9b7627544e4b95e82dcd0e2d3b2&_e=Sn4teNnLM7kux7d1J6PUjacTCmhyBh9f7V3ds6iHRemkV2yMJk3FMKmb5xy3CzpEMavRflVjwdb8qupSfBjk_uPPFC_5-gA9WRBTL_67RAVKxw99o8-Q5WVx6cc9hZlCPKhPayjfgIBARo-eN9fyq_s80Hn_jdx-g-C6PADBo3DailZjcblrfpt7uVCCLbi1nOVflmfmrMhIuyhXgq--v2CmykqZFSDI-vEZooOpFFfexPPZDXmuCXB7y_vg5C94OTjrZ1ByUokftktIoMRIEDrzNwUnD2zFMB5M8ElCRFy_46kjq68qe6M9cd_Kcbil1Mic6AIqXvBMy0paG-ZzsbAu9iz48AciUDNgD0nAMOxmqY3W18p7RzbkJyFbJneSDRs_ZjFlEHEGtVi5DAwia0sLmt7Fsq8QTGvqnkSZJV3okoUmwz-PRO-nH4xS3Pf7deDrtwhDoRgtTWibvFZu6qLzAsNgaw4Ib_mKbbwaMZOL_fF-6vm3mC8F83rZYKlczqDCpt4-FzZUlYw7ZXyb35zXG5vZcFZRPANiEHOTCBU13dJO6ViL8JECrYJqDshy)

| [ **SHOW NEWSOM WHAT A REAL GOV LOOKS LIKE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=31c2e9b7627544e4b95e82dcd0e2d3b2&_e=Sn4teNnLM7kux7d1J6PUjacTCmhyBh9f7V3ds6iHRemkV2yMJk3FMKmb5xy3CzpEMavRflVjwdb8qupSfBjk_uPPFC_5-gA9WRBTL_67RAVKxw99o8-Q5WVx6cc9hZlCPKhPayjfgIBARo-eN9fyq_s80Hn_jdx-g-C6PADBo3DailZjcblrfpt7uVCCLbi1N7bvWYnpif-9b7-RAyYU1u7PQq7kpGl7y0pXieEqTr_VVvQt5Frngk7MWk94c77RR_9p81LXKkV_CiqeMUKB4xUXLD4E6utdSavv7BIdBHAv8hwIs6hoWXG_r86T_2ANeJaZZPXxZmpQv9rrhyCafIhEa-v_fQP5fnvEAtGhgYHqbNS_lfZ3yyncngwRClP3WjlcAJZaR-vsOYMiReanEm_zic3-7bai2ZB018mPQxEmIbPxlDfa6NeMXp2LmdB68UIVVVLYwE_NhWqini04bUUGUQMaR5gcuU2rdBBreVGaBycQpHDEOHEiSZjijF2LQWDwuhS0A9PVfvoYeTWMZTu4vWFfX3ec6er6ipu6FvOkB-ymQcFLSge3MuxnKdeM)

[**With your donation, I’ll win this race and set an example for America of what true state governance looks like.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=31c2e9b7627544e4b95e82dcd0e2d3b2&_e=Sn4teNnLM7kux7d1J6PUjacTCmhyBh9f7V3ds6iHRemkV2yMJk3FMKmb5xy3CzpEMavRflVjwdb8qupSfBjk_uPPFC_5-gA9WRBTL_67RAVKxw99o8-Q5WVx6cc9hZlCPKhPayjfgIBARo-eN9fyq_s80Hn_jdx-g-C6PADBo3DailZjcblrfpt7uVCCLbi1vxV-DUj69Ej3Tz_liZ72I0GyJ7uoBlTmaoVbZl3uZjGQhsI9lsyGW-cNvJYLFNb0pDDYohOEqo15n7Ram3eyQaj5FN66YZM50a_D5A8lU_Uq0ODyY1NLY3pOkIPKy7rHsDjjw-llM6tm6tdUxQucxZ7Iq-nUC_kVH2n9fHLrV6_7tPlRGy-ip1wclC2DMi0RJCQMmktXkrLUFQ9eojmGtZVrHoMLVc9WiYmKGt_T0VCrRa-VqOGUO5shZVk4KAJiZNMG9ElyXlkNg_PmbBLiWGqsW79P12Jp74ujN-DAzxfQ8XW_aIBfal0FqGoEWzVBL9j52cyfpTSRTZhFcLa6e_zEP--KuNmdPBDCNRbe76GAzxspYRqeg5diJhKawJ_b)

Thank you,
Coach Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=31c2e9b7627544e4b95e82dcd0e2d3b2&_e=Sn4teNnLM7kux7d1J6PUjacTCmhyBh9f7V3ds6iHRemkV2yMJk3FMKmb5xy3CzpEMavRflVjwdb8qupSfBjk_uPPFC_5-gA9WRBTL_67RAVKxw99o8-Q5WVx6cc9hZlCPKhPayjfgIBARo-eN9fyq_s80Hn_jdx-g-C6PADBo3DailZjcblrfpt7uVCCLbi1394GaOM0G2m-ImdzBpz9rGizM-0tQmt7r_5zoXDD99cFD7lVicASVtZ7bMNQesCu_0-u_2L-cxpDtr6zNHkb2jA5NT6X2fWq8G63twIau-BejWttE-ixDBAAkLuMFnGlYuKA1NdyiAe3ea7YJEvNVfSyXw61ffJCOuRj2-jXwcDjH2vkN9wFIacQEh1fj57G4QnQH0BjOM9xHxQZGGBNkeWkirdjxTjV072NPSp2JWUpsrbFEhtM5KDUVDbBLc8wepVFYxfB1YRakVBokC64HCzP_XJTj-7ZapDUwhY92MWb_fadKlFKdcQlJcGBIo9w68QBj63_crCoQjEShZNo241I1KENSNyvBQyEGzX4YJn4MYjMOLzDfHHqPY5P68c5)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: Here's how he turned water into wine... | Peter, Gavin Newsom has SOLVED the violent crime epidemic, and honestly, I 'm impressed. He basically turned water into wine... He really got one over on me when his Press Office tweeted out that Alabama has "2X" the murder rate of Los Angeles. Well, I did some fact-check digging ... It turns out that if you direct law enforcement agencies to STOP reporting crime data to the FBI, you can ELIMINATE violent crime from your state! That would be akin to playing a football game but not putting 6 points on the scoreboard after your opponent scores a touchdown.Can you really lose if the scoreboard doesn 't update? Folks, Gavin "Newscum" can twist the data however he wants. The fact of the matter is, Americans are not stupid. We see the chaos, destruction, terror, and violence happening in cities like Los Angeles. We don't need unreported data to prove it. | I will not be bullied by a man who takes fake phone calls to avoid talking to victims of wildfires that he could've prevented. Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? subject: It’s ruff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250908-534&t=1&akid=544%2E294397%2Eua_ILS)
Hi, it’s Ollie!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250908_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250908-534&refcode2=544_294397_ua_ILS&akid=544%2E294397%2Eua_ILS)
I’m Judge Chris Taylor’s dog, and the campaign’s unofficial snack inspector, nap enforcer, and zoomies coordinator.
I’ve been hearing a lot of commotion about our campaign. My mom’s former opponent dropped out of the race, and now, we’re not sure who’ll be taking her on next April.
That makes this moment _ruff._
We’ve got to build up our campaign’s treat jar now so we’re ready for any challenge.
I may not be great at fetch (still working on it), but I do know this: **When our grassroots team comes together, we can protect fairness, freedom, and democracy in Wisconsin!**
[**If you’re as excited as I am to win this race, can you pitch in $10 to support my mom, Judge Chris Taylor, today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250908_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250908-534&refcode2=544_294397_ua_ILS&akid=544%2E294397%2Eua_ILS)

Thank you, thank you, _thank you!_
Tail wags,
Ollie 🐾

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: President Trump just told me something important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I’d like to share it with you.
| Friend,
---
One of the things I love most about President Trump is that he always makes sure to show his appreciation and gratitude for those who fight alongside him.
---
**For example, he took the time to post my recent statement and thank me for everything I did to stop Tish James’ sham LAWFARE against him!**
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f0a5355c8b94967b4bfe83eb16be741&_e=A5BatLjHWmm7Ut_Rn9U2SGXO8sktSQdGo2fzBzIS7RHYGBS3tU_jgz6orPZF2-ZMIXA7tsuQKbgPI2PCdr3-3U6cnrcTpH-p8oZZOyjT0_gsaIeQdgW0ESDvda-6HzoIn7ep4Mdpyxlrp5XLOpwDIXn7DhS8gpYu6jTX4301L-OHjPF90sBGX1NDAv8dI8HHY1GJBvc0uZ1jE4ezPei4uUkzW9p-ZjAch0IGczme5Vrokm5-bCKL1Vb5pnRotfK9RjOEEvYlCsKA3UAlN-kC9uQ43BDOtipIpDpbU_Bi5f7fxgse6pgLv2iVvnf16ePvTyJz4LKjDS-nah1wjIUWctp81TniMeNFAuaSGKUWMXvUeDisUZz1zlcMRrhbI9pVLQhD-VfluMwWy5QMEhcmI8LS666UhZwPhZvH3RwxYF-XgEMSETxWvGH0rYokcVbf3UzIxAyNDCGpTl9eDwHtOE_8ot8nghlDoxCbrOLMJ9ZtNgpvcfsvFyRPzluQgCJA6dRhNJsuzyiUnO3ODEussHIYu0EeHRdImTSvo_u31KQ4CZCK-ipVoXl5rqYOIRgAT1BgWCyFgS_P-DptHiZEaP8EqCwfYrcv1d4FCbIC--g%3D)
---
The President’s support and friendship mean the world to me. But really, after all that he’s done for our country, I should be the one thanking _him_.
---
It would have been so easy for President Trump to give up and retire from politics after the disgraceful 2020 election.
---
_**Instead, he went straight back into the lion's den, taking arrow after arrow to defeat the Democrats, vanquish the Deep State, and save our country.**_
---
Despite facing unprecedented LAWFARE from Democrats and their Deep State allies including an attempt to remove his name from the ballot, wrongfully fine him over $500,000,000, and even to JAIL him for LIFE, he _never_ wavered in his mission to Make America Great Again!
---
America would be in a very dark place right now if it were not for his bravery and perseverance in the face of unrelenting opposition. __But instead, our nation is BOOMING again!__
---
Friend, I’ve always done my best to follow President Trump’s example and put America FIRST.
---
**It’s why I withdrew my nomination from what would have been a great job serving in his cabinet as the UN Ambassador to remain in Congress and ensure we had the votes to pass President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill.**
---
But that sacrifice I made – and all the sacrifices that President Trump has made – will be in jeopardy if radical Far Left Democrats take control of the people’s House in the midterms.
---
These radicals won’t just sabotage our America First agenda and work to undo everything that President Trump and our House GOP Majority have accomplished so far...
---
**_...They’ll _IMPEACH_ Trump the second they have the votes to do so! _**
---
As House GOP Leadership Chair, I have no choice but to vigorously fundraise to ensure that we have a war chest that can rival the BILLIONS the Democrats will spend to retake the House.
---
However, unlike the Democrats, President Trump and the America First movement don’t have deep-pocked, liberal megadonors cutting massive checks to bankroll us.
---

clean_body: I’d like to share it with you. | Friend, One of the things I love most about President Trump is that he always makes sure to show his appreciation and gratitude for those who fight alongside him. For example, he took the time to post my recent statement and thank me for everything I did to stop Tish James’ sham LAWFARE against him! The President’s support and friendship mean the world to me. But really, after all that he’s done for our country, I should be the one thanking him. It would have been so easy for President Trump to give up and retire from politics after the disgraceful 2020 election. Instead, he went straight back into the lion's den, taking arrow after arrow to defeat the Democrats, vanquish the Deep State, and save our country. Despite facing unprecedented LAWFARE from Democrats and their Deep State allies including an attempt to remove his name from the ballot, wrongfully fine him over $500,000,000, and even to JAIL him for LIFE, he never wavered in his mission to Make America Great Again! America would be in a very dark place right now if it were not for his bravery and perseverance in the face of unrelenting opposition. But instead, our nation is BOOMING again! Friend, I’ve always done my best to follow President Trump’s example and put America FIRST. It’s why I withdrew my nomination from what would have been a great job serving in his cabinet as the UN Ambassador to remain in Congress and ensure we had the votes to pass President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill. But that sacrifice I made – and all the sacrifices that President Trump has made – will be in jeopardy if radical Far Left Democrats take control of the people’s House in the midterms. These radicals won’t just sabotage our America First agenda and work to undo everything that President Trump and our House GOP Majority have accomplished so far... ...They’ll IMPEACH Trump the second they have the votes to do so! As House GOP Leadership Chair, I have no choice but to vigorously fundraise to ensure that we have a war chest that can rival the BILLIONS the Democrats will spend to retake the House. However, unlike the Democrats, President Trump and the America First movement don’t have deep-pocked, liberal megadonors cutting massive checks to bankroll us. We depend entirely on grassroots support from generous conservatives like YOU. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 -_

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: an update on Trump’s “Alligator Alcatraz”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114860480/568388454/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI0MmZiOWUtZmQ4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7SafA3L8MQ33yQrUEIRsWbDI9hhu_zRH5BXA7k7H0DQ=) Last week, a top Florida official said that the immigrant detention center in Florida that the Trump administration dubbed “Alligator Alcatraz” would soon be empty. “Alligator Alcatraz” should have never opened in the first place. It's unsafe, uninhabitable, and a violation of human rights. That’s why I was proud to lead my colleagues to demand DHS and ICE shut it down — and I was glad to hear it would be empty soon. This was a massive step forward in our fight to treat immigrants with the respect and humanity they deserve. But our fight is far from over. **On Thursday, an appeals court temporarily blocked a judge’s order to dismantle “Alligator Alcatraz,” allowing the detention center to remain open.** So it’s on us to keep pushing forward and demanding the closure of this unsafe and inhumane detention center for good. **[Just like I have since it opened, I’ll keep fighting for the Trump administration to close this detention center and treat immigrants with the dignity they deserve — and I hope you’ll join me in this fight. Help me keep up this critical work in Congress by chipping in today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114860481/568388455/-629675555?refcode=email_090825_alligatoralcatraz&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI0MmZiOWUtZmQ4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7SafA3L8MQ33yQrUEIRsWbDI9hhu_zRH5BXA7k7H0DQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114860482/568388456/-629675555?refcode=email_090825_alligatoralcatraz&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI0MmZiOWUtZmQ4Yy1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7SafA3L8MQ33yQrUEIRsWbDI9hhu_zRH5BXA7k7H0DQ=)

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: the cover-up they wanted you to forget about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114860556/568388791/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250906_PT_Epstein_0_3MO_BWC_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU3NmY1Ny1mZThjLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=If5t4rn9f3B83KbLOV5OjPUA3-bs2TlyD67xhEyHpE8=&emci=573db650-fe8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cde76f57-fe8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098) | I can’t say I’m surprised that House Republicans are doing everything they can to keep the Epstein files hidden.

But what does surprise me is that House Republicans think the American people will accept their cover-up after shutting the House down for a month to avoid the conversation about the Epstein files.

**Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month in Virginia, in what is projected to be the most consequential and competitive election of 2025.** On September 19th, early voting opens in Virginia’s general elections to determine control of the state legislature, the lieutenant governorship, and the governorship. Democrats won the Virginia House in 2023 with a single seat by just 975 votes – an incredibly thin margin. [Every donation to the DLCC helps mobilize organizers and support state legislative campaigns in places like Virginia. This year, we have the chance to do the same and give future Democratic Governor Spanberger the legislative majorities she needs to lower costs for Virginians.

clean_body: Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month in Virginia, in what is projected to be the most consequential and competitive election of 2025. | | | | | ---|--- Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month in Virginia, in what is projected to be the most consequential and competitive election of 2025. On September 19th, early voting opens in Virginia’s general elections to determine control of the state legislature, the lieutenant governorship, and the governorship. Democrats won the Virginia House in 2023 with a single seat by just 975 votes – an incredibly thin margin. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Our win in 2023 blocked Virginia’s far-right governor from enacting his extreme MAGA agenda and the Republican takeover of our public schools. Just 975 votes made the difference in the lives of millions of Virginians. This year, we have the chance to do the same and give future Democratic Governor Spanberger the legislative majorities she needs to lower costs for Virginians. Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. Contributions or gifts to DLCC Victory Fund are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . To unsubscribe and stop receiving emails about our efforts, please | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, please .

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We're in the homestretch now, and you deserve to know exactly what we're doing to flip Virginia blue.
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-2?refcode=em-20250908-2&refcode2=572_1086043_SZ2T9C&akid=572%2E1086043%2ESZ2T9C)
Peter, we have just two months to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. **[Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Wes Moore to power our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-2?refcode=em-20250908-2&refcode2=572_1086043_SZ2T9C&akid=572%2E1086043%2ESZ2T9C)**
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-2?amount=10&refcode=em-20250908-2&refcode2=572_1086043_SZ2T9C&akid=572%2E1086043%2ESZ2T9C)**
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
**[Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $10 or more to my campaign and Wes Moore to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-2?refcode=em-20250908-2&refcode2=572_1086043_SZ2T9C&akid=572%2E1086043%2ESZ2T9C)**
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250908-2?amount=10&refcode=em-20250908-2&refcode2=572_1086043_SZ2T9C&akid=572%2E1086043%2ESZ2T9C)**
I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250908-2&t=1&refcode2=572_1086043_SZ2T9C&akid=572%2E1086043%2ESZ2T9C)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: We have to make each day left in this campaign count. Peter, we have just two months to go until Election Day! I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face. And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources. My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here. I've given voters my word: As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward. That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills. With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to: ✅ Visit every corner of Virginia. ✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks. ✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen. It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond. I'm grateful to have you on my team, Abigail Spanberger

Hey folks, it’s Jon Ossoff.
**Michael Bennet is running to be the next governor of Colorado, and he has my strong endorsement.**
I’ve gotten to know Michael working with him in the Senate. He’s a thoughtful, substantive, hardworking legislator committed to serving working families and defending our Republic from authoritarianism. He has spent more than a decade representing Colorado in the Senate, tirelessly fighting for a better future for families across the state.
We’ve worked together to advance legislation banning members of Congress from trading stocks and to fight the abuses of the Trump Administration.
Governors across the country are critical checks against Donald Trump’s excesses, and I know Michael Bennet has what it takes to lead Colorado and to continue the fight for our Republic from the Governor’s office.

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: This weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This weekend’s back-to-school event in The Bronx was one of over 44 events in our community, where we’ve been able to provide more than 3,000 backpacks to kids as they head back to school.
Kids should be heading back to school without the stress of not knowing if they’ll be able to get the school supplies they need to learn.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250908.XGUw25&refcode=em20250908-9711-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK)
It’s because of grassroots support from everyday people that we are able to do events like these. Thank you to everyone who pitched in and made this event and others just like it possible.
With your support, **we’re running this campaign differently** — focused on making lasting progressive change, year-round community organizing, and ensuring that we re-elect Alexandria next year.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to support Alexandria and our collective movement as we fight for racial, social, and economic justice for all?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250908.XGUw25&refcode=em20250908-9711-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250908.XGUw25&refcode=em20250908-9711-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK)**
No matter what, thank you so much for being a part of this campaign for a brighter future for all.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250908?refcode=em20250908-9711-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=9711_2526796_x8D9rK&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250908-9711-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=9711%2E2526796%2Ex8D9rK)

# Trump goes off at "evil lunatic" who stabbed 23-year-old woman on Charlotte train
President Donald Trump offered condolences to the family of murdered Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska and vowed to "confront" the "evil people" in society after viewing shocking security footage of her being stabbed to death on a Charlotte, North Carolina train.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/32ffcdc4-c99b-49d7-a1d6-9ffa0bdc225d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Description of Attack:** Trump described the incident as involving a "lunatic" and "madman" who "viciously stabbed" Zarutska while she was simply sitting on the train, calling the surveillance footage "not really watchable" due to its horrific nature, with suspect Decarlos Brown Jr., 34, allegedly responsible.
* **Broader Violence Concerns:** The president also referenced the recent Catholic school mass shooting in Minneapolis that killed two children and wounded over a dozen others, pledging to end senseless violence by taking "horrible actions" against such crimes.
* **Cashless Bail Criticism:** Trump blamed cashless bail policies for enabling violent criminals to reoffend, arguing that these policies create a cycle where "a killer kills somebody and is out on the street by the afternoon, in many cases, going out and going again."

* * *
# Scott Bessent allegedly threatens to punch Bill Pulte in heated confrontation
## _" Punch you in your f--ing face!"_
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, 63, allegedly threatened to punch Federal Housing Finance Agency Director Bill Pulte, 37, telling him "I'm gonna punch you in your f--ing face" during an argument at an exclusive Washington D.C. social club, **[the NY Post reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/77afbe2b-bddf-4b31-ae84-f37fb5f8edbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/77afbe2b-bddf-4b31-ae84-f37fb5f8edbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Policy Disagreements:** The conflict stems from overlapping duties and differing views on Federal Reserve policy, with Bessent reportedly advising Trump not to fire Fed Chairman Jerome Powell while Pulte has been pushing to remove central bank officials, including recently referring Board member Lisa Cook to the Justice Department for alleged mortgage fraud.
* **Pattern of Physical Altercations:** This marks the second reported physical confrontation for Bessent, who previously got into a fight with Elon Musk in April over competing IRS leadership candidates, during which Musk allegedly "body-checked" Bessent outside the Oval Office after being called a "fraud."
* **Administrative Tensions:** The incidents highlight broader discord within the Trump administration, with both confrontations occurring over personnel decisions and policy disagreements, while Bessent continues interviewing candidates to replace Powell when his Fed term ends in May.

Look, amid all of the chaos and dysfunction ruling Washington right now, John has just one priority: **delivering real solutions to the challenges facing working families.**
So we’re highlighting the impact of Republicans’ Big Beautiful Betrayal on the American people — and crafting legislation to reverse the worst of their cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and clean energy credits that’ll hike your energy bills.
John is pushing for fair trade policy that lifts up working families, not the fiscal lunacy of shifting tariff deadlines and economic chaos.
And we’re still fighting against any Republican attempts to resurrect their failed scheme to sell off America’s public lands.
**But with so many issues to tackle at once, it’s important that we hear from John’s top supporters _(including you!)_ to take feedback and gauge your priorities. ****[So can you take a minute to fill out our updated priorities survey, and let John know which issues are top of mind for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114861761/568392925/-2113865463?refcode=email_090825_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTMyYmFjZS0wMThkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVoh6qH2DI-V1xPQBOJge3uza9R2gZlkAVsQz6Oq8f8=&emci=edd853e7-ec8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=7932bace-018d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)**

name: Shane Cory
subject: Back the Brave Men who Sacrificed for Tom Homan's Safety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Liberty Fund
body:
Seven veterans answered the call without hesitation. A Navy SEAL quit his job, hugged his family, and shadowed Tom for 30 days.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e317910/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvcVc2VGRGclBCcA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MDg/LbmNsejE2YzNNUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNZbHZ1M05kSVhnNVpscw/gaL9W6Q/s9jd30ef390)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
[****](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) Dear friend,

Back in February, I told you the urgent story of how a team of veterans set aside everything to protect Tom Homan from a deadly threat when the government wouldn't.

It's worth retelling, especially now, as [**we face a tight deadline to cover final costs**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.).

**This is about real liberty—folks free to live without government interference or abandonment**.

It started with a disturbing call to a close friend and veteran on December 23rd.

Tom Homan, set to become Border Czar under President Trump, was already pushing bold plans to secure borders and deport criminal illegals. On Tucker, **Homan declared War on the Cartels before Trump was even sworn in.**

Tom called my friend for a clear reason. **A credible assassination plot against Tom had emerged, and Joe Biden's team did nothing** —leaving Tom and his family exposed.

Tom couldn’t sleep, and he’s the type of man that honestly doesn’t give a damn what happens to him – **his only concern was for his family and his wife he dearly loves**.

The Biden Admin refused to provide Tom with security, and Tom is like us. He can’t afford to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars out of his own pocket to ensure his own safety.

So, Tom did the next best thing and **called a combat veteran in our community**.

I got the next call from my friend who just got off the phone with Tom: “Shane, need you brother. Meet me and the boys at the G.”

Myself and a team of six other serious men were given the briefing and asked to set our lives aside until Inauguration Day when the Trump Admin could take over with a government protection team.

**No one hesitated.**

No one said, “let me check with work” or “let me ask my wife” (they all knew their wives would demand them to take the unpaid job – because we’d all do it for each other).

There were no second thoughts. Every man asked geared up and got to work to stand up the next morning.

The travel was non-stop.

Let me tell you, Tom Homan is a beast with unmatched energy, so we had to move faster than him with advance planning, extraction plans, etc.

No fancy equipment. No intel network**. Just hard men willing to do anything to keep a good man safe.**

But it came at a significant cost, and we have thousands of dollars in unpaid reimbursements we need to cover. [**Can you donate today and help cover the final costs?**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Seven veterans answered the call without hesitation. A Navy SEAL quit his job, hugged his family, and shadowed Tom for 30 days.

The squad: a Special Forces medic, three Army vets, three Marines—all pros in protection. Trackers, ex-LEO, extraction experts.

**Not fancy suits, but tough, bearded guardians who commanded respect and cleared crowds effortlessly.**

They logged over a dozen cross-country trips: advance scouts first, then Tom with the detail, plus family guards working with local cops we deeply appreciated.

Government-run, this would've bloated to hundreds of thousands monthly. **Our volunteers cut corners, but bills for travel and essentials piled up.**

Come January 20th, our SEAL delivered Tom safely to the inauguration, transferring to official protection. Job done.

But in February's appeal, we sought help for reimbursements and bonuses. [**Generous donors responded, yet a $5,720 gap lingers.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Worse, one unpaid protector—a true patriot—has been footing these bills himself, straining his finances.

We must settle this in seven days. **[**Will you donate $75, $150, or any amount today to lift this burden?**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** It's about honoring liberty-loving heroes.

Fast-forward: Tom's 2025 as Border Czar has been a triumph.

He's slashed illegal crossings by 70%, with encounters at historic lows.

Record deportations target criminals, eradicating threats and saving lives. Self-deportations surge as fear of enforcement spreads.

**ICE agents praise him as "one of their own,"** morale soaring under his 30+ years of experience.

But let's not overlook the volunteer veterans who enabled this.

That $5,720 must be paid soon. **[**Your gift of $35 or more could make all the difference—donate before the week ends.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**

Positive words about Tom abound this year.

From viral videos calling him a "hero crushing it" to Trump crediting him for plummeting stats, he's hailed for boosting safety without harming or stealing.

Government like Biden's breeds corruption; ALF works against it by taking on missions like this.

With urgency high, **[**please give what you can—$100 would help hugely**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)****.**

Gratefully,
Shane Cory
President
American Liberty Fund
Veteran, United States Marine Corps

P.S. Biden's disregard for the plot against Tom still boils my blood. Our vets stepped up selflessly, and Tom's 2025 wins validate their risk. [**Help us clear the $5,720 shortfall in seven days.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Paid for by American Liberty Fund

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e317910/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MDg/LbmNsejE2YzNNUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNZbHZ1M05kSVhnNVpscw/gaL9W6Q/scs9d9da7b8)

Friend, We need elected officials at all levels who have the courage to stand up to fascism and the authoritarian-in-chief. But right now, **in my progressive city of Detroit, we have a City Council candidate who is backed by billionaires, aligned with MAGA Republicans, and friendly with Trump**. As a State Representative, she was the only Democrat to join Republicans in forcing the Michigan legislature to end last year’s session early—while we had a Democratic trifecta and while awaiting votes on much-needed policies for water affordability, Black Maternal Health, and voting rights. She has voted against abortion rights and endorsed Republicans who’ve tried to criminalize protesters. Last month, she was the lone Democrat who voted with Republicans to strip Detroit and our communities of millions of dollars of funding for hospitals, public education, proven public safety programs, and institutions such as the Arab American National Museum, the Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History, and the Holocaust Memorial Center. **Thankfully, Detroiters have a choice. And I’m proud to support Denzel McCampbell for Detroit City Council.** Denzel is a long-time ally who will fight to keep the military out of our city and stand up to Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda. Like me, Denzel was born and raised in Detroit, is dedicated to public service, and believes that everyone should have safe, well-resourced, and thriving neighborhoods. He has been a partner in introducing bold policies and strong constituent services programs, which are positively changing the lives of thousands of people. Although Denzel won the Democratic primary as the #1 vote-getter, he is now up against this MAGA Democrat and her corporate donors—and ballots get mailed to voters in just a few weeks! **This weekend, Denzel officially launched his campaign for City Council in November’s general election, and I was there to support him and help him knock on doors and speak with our neighbors.** We recently marched with unions to demand workers’ rights:
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJYfTCgoXxVCxzBQjtX2I3-4zGXrqk0JEsZ8wooV5X69WxHU2-ZQtKsr0JDf8MjoRVo34-o-CTfIm4aE_AdpTtDM4wytdMJLY18cnI89DQnCpLx3V8eee17M2x1Sun8qWeo3lyRInmNipW3I2oy3EB7FrkUgpFJpyyCVPBeq0eHVjvPCB9L2l2aNW-X4Filw6CR8owOOJx7FxKWLIiMnSCtRhA8pR8J7VHZX4GuAPgOj5AUhsEbyaYOD6Z9q2ba5_Bb8Tqjg0cyyIIUuDqrfY2S7m-zh6l9zqMr34IC9lV5lWXUUglTpb89jNluFELhVDZH5Ogx5leyvZOvyAvlla1s13-xgZzWiFxjQHC9a_Bd5eZX8X2EWZ9vbULlxZsLCZme0bK3Nu5UHncp-_4tL1Bp0rIWoQKbJieInLwBtTzi_A/4jq/hqqrCtPqT0C8o3iDFZSVIw/h4/h001.YmqZii_7Kagp-gbfMLwje7JBTtKwYhz6J_5mMVuB3wQ)
Denzel helped found the Detroit Chapter of BYP100, where he led the fight against police brutality and mass incarceration. As an elected Detroit City Charter Commissioner, Denzel led an effort to revise our city’s governing documents to center the needs of residents.
Denzel is also a member of the DSA Metro Detroit chapter and a proud democratic socialist. He’s also part of the LGBTQ+ community, and I was proud to march alongside him at this summer’s Motor City Pride:

clean_body: For over a decade, I’ve seen Denzel fight hard for equity and human rights. | | | Friend, We need elected officials at all levels who have the courage to stand up to fascism and the authoritarian-in-chief. But right now, in my progressive city of Detroit, we have a City Council candidate who is backed by billionaires, aligned with MAGA Republicans, and friendly with Trump. As a State Representative, she was the only Democrat to join Republicans in forcing the Michigan legislature to end last year’s session early—while we had a Democratic trifecta and while awaiting votes on much-needed policies for water affordability, Black Maternal Health, and voting rights. She has voted against abortion rights and endorsed Republicans who’ve tried to criminalize protesters. Last month, she was the lone Democrat who voted with Republicans to strip Detroit and our communities of millions of dollars of funding for hospitals, public education, proven public safety programs, and institutions such as the Arab American National Museum, the Charles H. Wright Museum of African American History, and the Holocaust Memorial Center. Thankfully, Detroiters have a choice. And I’m proud to support Denzel McCampbell for Detroit City Council. Denzel is a long-time ally who will fight to keep the military out of our city and stand up to Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda. Like me, Denzel was born and raised in Detroit, is dedicated to public service, and believes that everyone should have safe, well-resourced, and thriving neighborhoods. He has been a partner in introducing bold policies and strong constituent services programs, which are positively changing the lives of thousands of people. Although Denzel won the Democratic primary as the #1 vote-getter, he is now up against this MAGA Democrat and her corporate donors—and ballots get mailed to voters in just a few weeks! This weekend, Denzel officially launched his campaign for City Council in November’s general election, and I was there to support him and help him knock on doors and speak with our neighbors. | For over a decade, I’ve seen Denzel fight hard for equity and human rights—including the essential right to clean air and affordable drinking water. We recently marched with unions to demand workers’ rights: Denzel helped found the Detroit Chapter of BYP100, where he led the fight against police brutality and mass incarceration. As an elected Detroit City Charter Commissioner, Denzel led an effort to revise our city’s governing documents to center the needs of residents. Denzel is also a member of the DSA Metro Detroit chapter and a proud democratic socialist. He’s also part of the LGBTQ+ community, and I was proud to march alongside him at this summer’s Motor City Pride: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Denzel McCampbell | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for joining me in supporting Denzel and our democracy! In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | | | | Team,

Donald Trump's current term has been a complete disaster -- and we still have 40 months left of his presidency! **If we don't flip the Senate blue, there's _no telling_ how much havoc he'll wreak!**

But with open seats, special elections, and Trump's _tanking_ approval rating, **we have a shot at victory.**

**[That's why we're sending an URGENT swing-seat update -- and asking TOP Democrats like you to chip in $5 to help us fight for the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250908-SenateAlert-BoxFormatFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250908-SenateAlert-BoxFormatFR-ETG-sl1&akid=21172%2E9716520%2E8XPlv3)**
---
| _The Hill_ already ranked these states as the 5 _most likely_ to FLIP, so we need to make sure Democrats are ready to help us fight for ALL of them.

**Georgia** \-- Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic senator up for re-election in a state Trump won last year, **making him a TOP target for the GOP.**

**New Hampshire** \-- A VITAL open seat up for grabs that Republicans will jump at the chance to flip.

**Michigan** \-- An open blue seat that Republicans are desperate to snag after losing here by _just 0.3_ points last year.

**North Carolina** \-- Popular former Governor Roy Cooper has made this open seat a MAJOR flip opportunity for Democrats.

**Maine** \-- Susan Collins’ plummeting approval rating and fired-up local Democrats are creating a perfect storm to send Collins packing for good.
---
| **But here's the thing:** Trump is reportedly _"obsessed"_ with next year's elections and sitting on a MASSIVE warchest for his Republican allies.

**So let's be clear -- flipping the Senate BLUE is the most important thing we can do right now.**

We've got an URGENT midnight deadline to raise $50,000 from generous grassroots supporters, so **we're personally asking you:**

name: Tucker Carlson ALERT [via Conservative HQ]
subject: Do you stand with Tucker Carlson, or have you abandoned him?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj20757hxyfla9rxvwwebq36by04rfh236dhhlb312wsb9fuwl2w9pbr2ia5vgef979l5rs9tnk312la0dvto&__stmp=t2ajpx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ajpx&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3n83mb3bjbq5tchetexefpyfkrofvf34pmeybv45d8ztwgbndj9glpkcjlurl4m7kq0cqwdfhpdo80gkry2rysl8lh0qwiby5dcuyt3ht4z89vgk4npfi4ldkicuevh4g99j0wonj9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ajpx&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ajpx&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ajpx&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ajpx&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3n83mb3bjbq5tchetexefpyfkrofvf34pmeybv45d8ztwgbndj9glpkcjlurl4m7kq0cqwdfhpdo80gkry2rysl8lh0qwiby5dcuyt3ht4z89vgk4npfi4ldkicuevh4g99j0wonj9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ajpx&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2ajpx&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
